translations.english: Alchemy Labs allow you to create potions and poisons by combining ingredients that you find in the world. All ingredients have four effects. You can learn the first effect of any ingredient by selecting it in your inventory and eating it. To learn the other effects, experiment with it. At an Alchemy Lab, you can combine any two or three ingredients and attempt to make a potion with them. If the ingredients share at least one effect, you succeed: you get the resulting potion or poison and learn all of the effects that matched. If none of their effects match, crafting fails and you lose the ingredients. The resulting item is a potion if its strongest effect is beneficial, and a poison if its strongest effect is harmful. Potions may have weaker harmful effects, and poisons may have weaker beneficial effects-it all depends on the effects of the ingredients you used. To use a poison, activate it in your inventory to apply it to your equipped weapon. To use a potion, activate it in your inventory to drink it. If you drink two potions with the same effect, only the most powerful is applied, so wait for one potion to wear off before drinking the next. As you discover ingredients with matching effects, the Alchemy Lab menu will remember the matches for future use. Continue to experiment to learn new effects and find better combinations.
translations.chinese: 可以使用炼金台来混合于世界各地所发现的材料，并炼制出药水或毒药。 所有的材料都有四种效果。你可以吃下任何材料了解到第一种效果。其他效果需要通过实验来发现。 在炼金台，你可以混合任意两种或者三种材料制作药水。如果材料有至少一种共通效果，便能成功调和获得药水或者毒药，并了解到材料共通的效果。如果没有共通效果，那么调便会失败，材料也会浪费掉。 最后的成品，如果最强效果是有益的，就会成为药水；反之若最强效果是有害的，那就会成为毒药。药水也许会含有微弱的有害效果，毒药也有可能包含微弱的有益效果，这取决于你使用的材料。 要使用毒药时，在你的物品栏使用，就会涂抹到你目前装备的武器上。 要使用药水时，在你的物品栏使用即可喝下。如果你喝下两瓶同样效果的药水，只有最强的效果会起作用。因此建议等一个药水效果消失后再喝第二瓶。 如果你发现了新的效果，炼金台功能表会自动记录这些效果供以后使用。持续实验便可以发现新的效果与新的组合。

At an Alchemy Lab, you can combine any two or three ingredients and attempt to make a potion with them. If the ingredients share at least one effect, you succeed: you get the resulting potion or poison and learn all of the effects that matched. If none of their effects match, crafting fails and you lose the ingredients. The resulting item is a potion if its strongest effect is beneficial, and a poison if its strongest effect is harmful. Potions may have weaker harmful effects, and poisons may have weaker beneficial effects-it all depends on the effects of the ingredients you used. To use a poison, activate it in your inventory to apply it to your equipped weapon. To use a potion, activate it in your inventory to drink it. If you drink two potions with the same effect, only the most powerful is applied, so wait for one potion to wear off before drinking the next. As you discover ingredients with matching effects, the Alchemy Lab menu will remember the matches for future use. Continue to experiment to learn new effects and find better combinations. | ZH: 可以使用炼金台来混合于世界各地所发现的材料，并炼制出药水或毒药。 所有的材料都有四种效果。你可以吃下任何材料了解到第一种效果。其他效果需要通过实验来发现。 在炼金台，你可以混合任意两种或者三种材料制作药水。如果材料有至少一种共通效果，便能成功调和获得药水或者毒药，并了解到材料共通的效果。如果没有共通效果，那么调便会失败，材料也会浪费掉。 最后的成品，如果最强效果是有益的，就会成为药水；反之若最强效果是有害的，那就会成为毒药。药水也许会含有微弱的有害效果，毒药也有可能包含微弱的有益效果，这取决于你使用的材料。 要使用毒药时，在你的物品栏使用，就会涂抹到你目前装备的武器上。 要使用药水时，在你的物品栏使用即可喝下。如果你喝下两瓶同样效果的药水，只有最强的效果会起作用。因此建议等一个药水效果消失后再喝第二瓶。 如果你发现了新的效果，炼金台功能表会自动记录这些效果供以后使用。持续实验便可以发现新的效果与新的组合。 | SID: 000BEF

translations.english: You can create potions and poisons by combining two or more ingredients that share a common effect. Experiment with different ingredients to learn their effects.

translations.english: Press and hold [Right Attack/Block] to draw the bow. Release [Right Attack/Block] to fire, or press [Ready Weapon] to cancel the shot. You can also perform a weak bash by tapping [Left Attack/Block]. It takes a moment to fully draw the bow. A partially drawn bow does less damage. When you equip a bow, the weakest available arrows are automatically equipped as well, though you can select a different set of arrows if you prefer. You can select Archery perks that let you hold [Left Attack/Block] while the bow is fully drawn to slow down time and zoom in on your target.
translations.chinese: 按住[Right Attack/Block]拉开弓后，放开便会射出箭矢，或可按下[Ready Weapon]取消射击。另外按下[Left Attack/Block]可发动敲击。 要拉满一张弓需要时间。没拉满的弓所能造成的伤害较少。 装备弓时，你会自动装备可用的箭矢中伤害力最弱者，不过你可以另行选择想使用的箭矢。 习得对应的箭术额外能力后，你将可获得在拉满弓后按下[Left Attack/Block]缩放视野并让时间流动减缓等能力。

When you equip a bow, the weakest available arrows are automatically equipped as well, though you can select a different set of arrows if you prefer. You can select Archery perks that let you hold [Left Attack/Block] while the bow is fully drawn to slow down time and zoom in on your target. | ZH: 按住[Right Attack/Block]拉开弓后，放开便会射出箭矢，或可按下[Ready Weapon]取消射击。另外按下[Left Attack/Block]可发动敲击。 要拉满一张弓需要时间。没拉满的弓所能造成的伤害较少。 装备弓时，你会自动装备可用的箭矢中伤害力最弱者，不过你可以另行选择想使用的箭矢。 习得对应的箭术额外能力后，你将可获得在拉满弓后按下[Left Attack/Block]缩放视野并让时间流动减缓等能力。 | SID: 010D66

A partially drawn bow does less damage. | ZH: 按住[Right Attack/Block]拉开弓后，放开便会射出箭矢，或可按下[Ready Weapon]取消射击。另外按下[Left Attack/Block]可发动敲击。 要拉满一张弓需要时间。没拉满的弓所能造成的伤害较少。 | SID: 0116C2
- MESG:FULL | EN: Archery | ZH: 箭术 | SID: 0115CB

translations.english: Use Workbenches to improve the armor rating of armor. All improvements require components, like metal ingots or leather strips. The components required to improve an item appear below the item on the right side of the screen. If you have a component, it is displayed in white; if not, it is displayed in grey. The amount of improvement depends on your Smithing skill and perks.
translations.chinese: 使用制作台可以提升护甲的等级。 所有强化提升都需要材料，如金属锭或革带。强化所需的材料会出现在屏幕右侧的项目下方。如果你持有相关材料，该材料名称会显示为白色；如果没有，则显示为灰色。 强化值取决于你的锻造技能和额外能力。

translations.english: Press [Ready Weapon], [Left Attack/Block], or [Right Attack/Block] to draw your weapons. Press [Ready Weapon] to sheathe them again. To perform a regular attack, tap [Right Attack/Block] to attack with your right-hand weapon, or [Left Attack/Block] to attack with your left-hand weapon. To perform a power attack, hold [Left Attack/Block] or [Right Attack/Block]. Power attacks do significantly more damage than regular attacks and have a chance of staggering enemies. Move in different directions (left, right, back, or forward) to execute different power attacks. All power attacks cost stamina. If your stamina is too low, any power attacks you attempt become regular attacks instead. If you have two weapons equipped, you can't block. However, you can hold [Left Attack/Block] and [Right Attack/Block] simultaneously for a dual power attack which does extra damage. STRATEGIES Once an opponent is staggered by a power attack, follow up with a quick succession of regular attacks for the kill. Once combat has ended, or if you need to run, always sheathe your weapons so you can move more quickly.
translations.chinese: 按下[Ready Weapon]、[Left Attack/Block]或[Right Attack/Block]可以拔出你的武器。再按一次[Ready Weapon]则会将它们收起。 需要进行普通攻击时，只需点动[Right Attack/Block]使用右手武器，或点动[Left Attack/Block]使用左手武器。 想要使用重击时，需要按住[Left Attack/Block]或[Right Attack/Block]。重击比普通攻击造成的伤害更大，且有机会让敌人失衡。向不同方向移动（前后左右）可以使出不同的重击。 所有重击都会消耗耐力。如果你的耐力值过低，任何重击的尝试最终都会变成普通攻击。 如果你装备了两件武器，就无法进行格挡。然而你可以同时点击[Left Attack/Block]和[Right Attack/Block]进行双重攻击，造成额外的伤害。 技巧提示 一旦你用重击将敌人打入失衡状态，就赶快用一连串普通攻击将其击杀。一旦战斗结束，或者你需要逃跑，就将武器收起，这样才能让你更快地移动。

translations.english: When buying or selling items, your Speech skill and perks improve the prices you get. Trading with merchants also improves your Speech skill. Merchants have a limited pool of gold to spend when purchasing items. This pool increases as they sell items, and will refresh every few days of game time.
translations.chinese: 当你购买和出售物品时，口才技能和额外能力会增加你的收益。与商人交易也是你提高口才的途径。 商人收购物品的金币数量是有限的。你从他们那里购买道具可以增加他们的金币量，但每隔几天游戏时间金币都会刷新一次。

translations.english: You can block attacks with a shield or equipped weapon by holding [Left Attack/Block]. You can only block with a one-handed weapon if the weapon is in your right hand and your left hand is empty. If you are wielding two weapons, you can't block at all. A blocked blow or arrow will still do some damage, and use up some stamina. Enemy power attacks cannot be fully blocked, though their damage and staggering effects will be reduced. Shields are more effective at blocking than weapons, and can also block arrow damage. As your Block skill increases, you can block attacks more effectively, and with less of a stamina cost. You can also select perks that allow you to reduce the damage of spells and dragon breath attacks. While blocking, you can perform a bash attack. Continue to hold [Left Attack/Block] and tap [Right Attack/Block] to perform a Quick Bash that has a chance of staggering enemies. Hold [Left Attack/Block] and hold [Right Attack/Block] to perform a stronger Power Bash that sends enemies flying. Both kinds of bashes require Stamina; if your Stamina bar is too low, you cannot bash. STRATEGIES Block quick, lighter attacks. Bash power attacks, or when an enemy's defenses are down, then quickly counterattack with a flurry of light attacks or a power attack of your own.
translations.chinese: 你可以按住[Left Attack/Block]用盾牌或武器进行格挡。你只能在右手持械左手空置的情况下使用单手武器格挡。如果同时使用两把武器，则无法格挡。 被格挡的攻击仍会造成一定伤害，并消耗一些耐力。敌人的重击无法被完全阻挡，但它的伤害和失衡效果会有所减少。盾牌在格挡方面比武器更加有效，且能够格挡箭矢伤害。 当你的格挡技能提升时，可以更加有效的格挡攻击，消耗的耐力也会减少。你可以选择额外能力以减少法术或龙息对你的伤害。 在格挡时你可以使用猛击。继续按住[Left Attack/Block]并点击[Right Attack/Block]可以进行一次迅速猛击，有可能使敌人陷入失衡。按住[Left Attack/Block]再按住[Right Attack/Block]可以进行强力猛击将敌人击飞。两种猛击都会消耗耐力，如你的耐力值过低，则不能进行猛击。 技巧提示 注意格挡普通攻击。当敌人使用重击时进行猛击，敌人防御下降时快速反击，用连续轻击或重击击杀敌人。

A blocked blow or arrow will still do some damage, and use up some stamina. Enemy power attacks cannot be fully blocked, though their damage and staggering effects will be reduced. Shields are more effective at blocking than weapons, and can also block arrow damage. As your Block skill increases, you can block attacks more effectively, and with less of a stamina cost. You can also select perks that allow you to reduce the damage of spells and dragon breath attacks. While blocking, you can perform a bash attack. Hold [Left Attack/Block] and hold [Right Attack/Block] to perform a stronger Power Bash that sends enemies flying. Both kinds of bashes require Stamina; if your Stamina bar is too low, you cannot bash. STRATEGIES Block quick, lighter attacks. Bash power attacks, or when an enemy's defenses are down, then quickly counterattack with a flurry of light attacks or a power attack of your own. | ZH: 你可以按住[Left Attack/Block]用盾牌或武器进行格挡。你只能在右手持械左手空置的情况下使用单手武器格挡。如果同时使用两把武器，则无法格挡。 被格挡的攻击仍会造成一定伤害，并消耗一些耐力。敌人的重击无法被完全阻挡，但它的伤害和失衡效果会有所减少。盾牌在格挡方面比武器更加有效，且能够格挡箭矢伤害。 当你的格挡技能提升时，可以更加有效的格挡攻击，消耗的耐力也会减少。你可以选择额外能力以减少法术或龙息对你的伤害。 在格挡时你可以使用猛击。继续按住[Left Attack/Block]并点击[Right Attack/Block]可以进行一次迅速猛击，有可能使敌人陷入失衡。按住[Left Attack/Block]再按住[Right Attack/Block]可以进行强力猛击将敌人击飞。两种猛击都会消耗耐力，如你的耐力值过低，则不能进行猛击。 技巧提示 注意格挡普通攻击。当敌人使用重击时进行猛击，敌人防御下降时快速反击，用连续轻击或重击击杀敌人。 | SID: 010CF4
- MESG:FULL | EN: Blocking | ZH: 格挡 | SID: 010D6D

translations.english: You can block attacks with a shield or equipped weapon by holding [Left Attack/Block]. You can only block with a one-handed weapon if the weapon is in your right hand and your left hand is empty. If you are wielding two weapons, you can't block at all. A blocked blow or arrow will still do some damage, and use up some stamina. Enemy power attacks cannot be fully blocked, though their damage and staggering effects will be reduced. Shields are more effective at blocking than weapons, and can also block arrow damage. As your Block skill increases, you can block attacks more effectively, and with less of a stamina cost. You can also select perks that allow you to reduce the damage of spells and dragon breath attacks. While blocking, you can perform a bash attack. Continue to hold [Left Attack/Block] and tap [Right Attack/Block] to perform a Quick Bash that has a chance of staggering enemies. Hold [Left Attack/Block] and hold [Right Attack/Block] to perform a stronger Power Bash that sends enemies flying. Both kinds of bashes require Stamina; if your Stamina bar is too low, you cannot bash. STRATEGIES Block quick, lighter attacks. Bash power attacks, or when an enemy's defenses are down, then quickly counterattack with a flurry of light attacks or a power attack of your own.
translations.chinese: 你可以按住[Left Attack/Block]用盾牌或武器进行格挡。你只能在右手持械左手空置的情况下使用单手武器格挡。如果同时使用两把武器，则无法格挡。 被格挡的攻击仍会造成一定伤害，并消耗一些耐力。敌人的重击无法被完全阻挡，但它的伤害和失衡效果会有所减少。盾牌在格挡方面比武器更加有效，且能够格挡箭矢伤害。 当你的格挡技能提升时，可以更加有效的格挡攻击，消耗的耐力也会减少。你可以选择额外能力以减少法术或龙息对你的伤害。 在格挡时你可以使用猛击。继续按住[Left Attack/Block]并点击[Right Attack/Block]可以进行一次迅速猛击，有可能使敌人陷入失衡。按住[Left Attack/Block]再按住[Right Attack/Block]可以进行强力猛击将敌人击飞。两种猛击都会消耗耐力，如你的耐力值过低，则不能进行猛击。 技巧提示 注意格挡普通攻击。当敌人使用重击时进行猛击，敌人防御下降时快速反击，用连续轻击或重击击杀敌人。

translations.english: Hold [Left Attack/Block] to block. While blocking, tap [Right Attack/Block] to bash, or hold [Right Attack/Block] to perform a power bash. Time a bash or power bash when an enemy is in mid-swing to stagger them, giving you a chance to counterattack.

translations.english: In dialogue, you can sometimes choose to Brawl someone. A brawl is a hand-to-hand fistfight between you and another character. Neither of you can die during this fight. However, if you use a weapon or cast a spell, the fight will turn into a live combat, and you may be guilty of a crime.
translations.chinese: 在对话中，你偶尔可选择打架。打架是指你与另外的角色进行肉搏。你们双方不能死于这场战斗，但如果你使用了武器或魔法，这场战斗也会演化为死斗，而你也有可能因此犯下罪行。

translations.english: In dialogue, you can sometimes choose to Bribe someone. The Bribe option displays the amount of gold needed to successfully bribe the other character; if you can pay the price, the bribe succeeds. The price of a bribe is based on your level and Speech skill. At higher levels, bribes become increasingly expensive, although a high Speech skill can offset this.
translations.chinese: 在对话中，你偶尔可以选择贿赂某人。“贿赂”选项会显示成功贿赂该角色所需的金币，如果你能支付该价格，则贿赂成功。 贿赂所需价格取决于你的等级和口才技能。等级越高，贿赂的价格也会增高，但高口才技能等级可以抵消一部分。

translations.english: After you become well-known in a Hold and befriend its Jarl, you may be offered the chance to buy a house. Houses are for sale in each major city. Once you purchase a house, you can furnish it. Talk with the Jarl's steward for more information. After purchasing a house, you can safely leave your items inside- they will always be there when you return.
translations.chinese: 当你在一方领地成名并成为领主的朋友，你就有机会购买一所房产。每个大城中都有房屋可供购买。 获得房产之后，可以布置家具。领主的总管会提供更多信息。 买房之后，你可以放心将东西存放其中而不会消失。

translations.english: When you open a container, the Containers menu appears. Items above the divider line are in the container, and items below the line are in your inventory. To take an item from the container, select it and press [Activate]. To take everything in the container, press [XButton]. To store an item in the container, select it in your inventory and press [Activate]. WARNING! Do not leave things in containers you do not own! They may not be there when you come back for them. If you want a place to store items permanently, consider buying a house.
translations.chinese: 当你打开容器，将会显示容器的物品菜单。分割线以上的物品在容器中，以下在你的库存中。 选择容器内物品并按[Activate]可以获取该物品。直接按[XButton]则可以搬空容器。想要在容器中储存物品，则在库存内容中选择并按[Activate]。 警告！ 不要把东西放在不属于你的容器里！当你再回来寻找的时候，可能永远都找不到了。如果想要永久性存放物品，可以考虑买个房。

translations.english: The following actions are considered crimes and are reported if you are detected: - Stealing items or horses - Pickpocketing items - Trespassing - Picking a lock - Starting a fight (defending yourself is not a crime) - Killing a non-aggressive character When a crime is reported, a Bounty is placed on your head for the Hold you are in. The amount of that Bounty depends on the seriousness of the crime. Anyone that sees you commit a crime will become a witness. If you manage to eliminate all of the witnesses to a crime shortly after it has been committed, the Bounty will not take effect. When you have a bounty, guards will approach and arrest you. If you run, they'll come after you. If you escape to a different Hold where you do not have a Bounty, the guards there will ignore you. If caught by the guards, you typically have the following options: - Pay your Bounty. Any stolen items in your inventory will be confiscated, including items you stole while undetected, but you are otherwise free to go. - Go to Jail. After being sent to jail, you can attempt to pick the lock of your jail cell and escape. To serve your time, activate the bed in your cell and you will appear outside when your time is served. You will lose progress towards skill increases depending on how long your sentence is. - Resist arrest. Guards will attack you if you resist. If you escape, the Bounty will remain on your head, and guards will try to arrest you if you return. If you yield by sheathing your weapon, the guards may stop attacking, but they will still attempt to arrest you.
translations.chinese: 以下行为属于犯罪，一经发现就会被举报： - 偷窃物品或马匹 - 扒窃物品 - 非法入室 - 擅自开锁 - 贸然斗殴（自卫除外） - 杀死非攻击性角色 当犯罪行为被举报时，当前领地会对你进行悬赏。赏金数额取决于罪行的恶劣程度。任何目击者都会成为证人。如果你犯罪后不久设法清除了所有证人，则不会受到悬赏。 当你遭到悬赏时，卫兵会接近并试图逮捕你。如果你选择逃跑，他们会进行追捕。如果你逃到了没被悬赏的领地，那里的卫兵会无视你。 如果被卫兵抓到，你通常有如下选择： -支付赏金。库存物品中的赃物将被全部没收，包括你在未被发现情况下偷得的物品，但接下来你就可以自由离开。 -蹲监狱。在被送往监狱后，你可以试着打开牢房的锁逃跑。或直接激活你牢房的床进行服刑，服刑结束后即可出狱。根据你服刑时间的长短，你会损失相应的技能熟练度。 -暴力拒捕。如果你选择反抗，卫兵们会进行攻击。如果逃跑，赏金不会消除，一旦你回来，就会再次遭到追捕。如果你选择收起武器，卫兵们可能会停止攻击，但他们仍然会试图逮捕你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: HelpCrimeLong
Translations:
- MESG:DESC | EN: The following actions are considered crimes and are reported if you are detected: - Stealing items or horses - Pickpocketing items - Trespassing - Picking a lock - Starting a fight (defending yourself is not a crime) - Killing a non-aggressive character When a crime is reported, a Bounty is placed on your head for the Hold you are in. The amount of that Bounty depends on the seriousness of the crime. Anyone that sees you commit a crime will become a witness. If you manage to eliminate all of the witnesses to a crime shortly after it has been committed, the Bounty will not take effect. When you have a bounty, guards will approach and arrest you. If you run, they'll come after you. If you escape to a different Hold where you do not have a Bounty, the guards there will ignore you. If caught by the guards, you typically have the following options: - Pay your Bounty. Any stolen items in your inventory will be confiscated, including items you stole while undetected, but you are otherwise free to go. - Go to Jail. After being sent to jail, you can attempt to pick the lock of your jail cell and escape. To serve your time, activate the bed in your cell and you will appear outside when your time is served. You will lose progress towards skill increases depending on how long your sentence is. - Resist arrest. Guards will attack you if you resist. If you escape, the Bounty will remain on your head, and guards will try to arrest you if you return. If you yield by sheathing your weapon, the guards may stop attacking, but they will still attempt to arrest you. | ZH: 以下行为属于犯罪，一经发现就会被举报： - 偷窃物品或马匹 - 扒窃物品 - 非法入室 - 擅自开锁 - 贸然斗殴（自卫除外） - 杀死非攻击性角色 当犯罪行为被举报时，当前领地会对你进行悬赏。赏金数额取决于罪行的恶劣程度。任何目击者都会成为证人。如果你犯罪后不久设法清除了所有证人，则不会受到悬赏。 当你遭到悬赏时，卫兵会接近并试图逮捕你。如果你选择逃跑，他们会进行追捕。如果你逃到了没被悬赏的领地，那里的卫兵会无视你。 如果被卫兵抓到，你通常有如下选择： -支付赏金。库存物品中的赃物将被全部没收，包括你在未被发现情况下偷得的物品，但接下来你就可以自由离开。 -蹲监狱。在被送往监狱后，你可以试着打开牢房的锁逃跑。或直接激活你牢房的床进行服刑，服刑结束后即可出狱。根据你服刑时间的长短，你会损失相应的技能熟练度。 -暴力拒捕。如果你选择反抗，卫兵们会进行攻击。如果逃跑，赏金不会消除，一旦你回来，就会再次遭到追捕。如果你选择收起武器，卫兵们可能会停止攻击，但他们仍然会试图逮捕你。 | SID: 011BA4
- MESG:FULL | EN: Crime and Jail | ZH: 犯罪与监狱 | SID: 011A96

translations.english: Creatures, spells, and traps can infect you with diseases. Diseases have a range of debilitating effects that range from light to severe. Open the Magic menu and check the Active Effects list to see which diseases you are infected with and what their effects are. To cure yourself, drink a Potion of Cure Disease or seek healing at a temple or shrine. The effects of diseases are cumulative, so they will add up over time if left untreated.
translations.chinese: 生物、法术和陷阱都可能导致你染病。疾病具有从轻到重各种使你衰弱的效果。打开“魔法”菜单，检查“激活效果”列表，可以查到你感染的疾病和它们的影响。 你可以服用治病药水或去神殿祭坛寻求治疗。疾病的影响是会积累的，如果不及时治疗，随着时间推移影响会叠加起来。

translations.english: One-handed weapons can be equipped to either your right or left hands. When wielding two weapons, you can perform special power attacks, but cannot block. Spells can also be equipped to either hand. Some Perks give you the ability to Dualcast (cast the same spell with both hands simultaneously) for a stronger effect.
translations.chinese: 单手武器可以同时装备在双手上。当使用两把武器时，你可以进行特殊的强力攻击，但不能格挡。 法术也可以装备在双手上。一些额外能力可以让你进行双手施法（双手同时施放同样的法术）以获得更强的效果。

translations.english: You can find enchanted weapons in the world, or create them yourself at an Arcane Enchanter (see Enchanting). Enchanted weapons use up soul energy with each successful hit and need to be recharged when drained. To recharge an enchanted weapon, select it in your inventory and press [ChargeItem]. Then select a filled soul gem from the list to recharge the weapon with it.
translations.chinese: 你可以在世界各处找到附魔武器或者在奥术附魔台自行制作。附魔武器每次成功击中都会消耗灵魂能量，当其消耗殆尽就需要重新充能。 请在物品栏中选择需要充能的附魔武器并按[ChargeItem]。然后从列表中选择充满的灵魂石为武器充能。

EDID: HelpEnchantedWeapons

- MESG:DESC | EN: You can find enchanted weapons in the world, or create them yourself at an Arcane Enchanter (see Enchanting). Enchanted weapons use up soul energy with each successful hit and need to be recharged when drained. To recharge an enchanted weapon, select it in your inventory and press [ChargeItem]. Then select a filled soul gem from the list to recharge the weapon with it. | ZH: 你可以在世界各处找到附魔武器或者在奥术附魔台自行制作。附魔武器每次成功击中都会消耗灵魂能量，当其消耗殆尽就需要重新充能。 请在物品栏中选择需要充能的附魔武器并按[ChargeItem]。然后从列表中选择充满的灵魂石为武器充能。 | SID: 011BC8
- MESG:FULL | EN: Enchanted Weapons | ZH: 附魔武器 | SID: 011A8E

translations.english: Use Arcane Enchanters to enchant weapons and armor. Enchanting an item requires three things: an enchantment, a filled soul gem, and a weapon or piece of armor that does not already have an enchantment. You can learn enchantments by disenchanting (destroying) enchanted weapons and armor at an Arcane Enchanter. Once you have learned an enchantment, you can use it to enchant any number of items. You can find soul gems throughout the world, and buy them from many merchants. They come in a variety of sizes: larger soul gems can hold the souls of more powerful creatures, which yield stronger enchantments. Most soul gems start off empty, and must be filled with a creature's soul before they can be used. To fill a soul gem, cast the Soul Trap spell on a creature and kill it before the spell wears off. If you have a soul gem of the appropriate size (or larger) in your inventory, the gem will absorb the creature's soul. Any Weapon Enchantment can be applied to any weapon. Select the weapon you want to enchant, the soul gem you want to use, and then the enchantment. A slider bar allows you to select the power level of the Enchantment. Stronger enchantments consume more charges per hit, which means you will have to recharge the weapon more frequently. Some Armor Enchantments can only be applied to specific pieces or types of armor. Select the armor you want to enchant, then choose from the available enchantments, or vice-versa. The soul gem you use determines the strength of the enchantment. Armor Enchantments are permanent and do not need to be recharged.
translations.chinese: 可使用奥术附魔台来为武器盔甲附魔。附魔物品需要三件东西：附魔效果、充满的灵魂石、以及尚未附魔的武器或护甲。 你可以通过分解（摧毁）附魔武器和护甲的方式来学习附魔。一旦你学会了一种附魔，你就可以无限次数地使用它。 灵魂石可在世界各地找到，或者从商人处购买。它们有着不同的大小：大型的灵魂石可以容纳更强大的生物的灵魂，也能做出更强的附魔效果。 许多灵魂石一开始是空的，必须需要填充入生物的灵魂才能使用。对生物施放摄魂陷阱法术并在法术效果消失之前杀死生物，就可以填充灵魂石。此时若你有合适大小（或者更大）的灵魂石，生物的灵魂就会被吸入其中。 武器用附魔可以附在任何武器上。选择你想要附魔的武器、要用的灵魂石，以及附魔种类。之后，会显示滑动条供你调整附魔的强度。强力附魔每次消耗的能量更多，也意味着你需要更加频繁地充能。 某些护甲附魔只能附给特殊种类的护甲。选择你想要的护甲，以及可用的附魔种类，或者选择附魔查看可用的护甲种类。附魔时使用的灵魂石决定了效果的强度。护甲的附魔是永久的，不需要充能。

translations.english: Fast travel is available from the world map. On the map, dark markers indicate locations you know about but have not yet visited, while light markers indicate locations you have discovered. Select any light marker to travel there. You cannot fast travel from interiors or while in combat. While fast traveling, time moves forward depending on how far you go. If you have a horse, it will fast travel with you. If you fast travel to a city, your horse will be placed in the nearest stable.
translations.chinese: 在世界地图界面可以进行快速旅行。地图中黑色标记为你已经知晓但尚未访问过的地点，而高亮标记为已发现地点。选择任意高亮标记都可以进行快速旅行。 你不能在建筑内部或战斗中快速旅行。快速旅行时，时间会随着你旅途的长短向前推进。如果你拥有马匹，它会与你一同进行快速旅行。如果你是前往城市内部，马匹会被安置到最近的马厩中。

translations.english: Items in your inventory can be added to the favorites menu for quick and easy access during gameplay. To add an item to the favorites menu, select it in your inventory and press [YButton]. To remove a favorite, select it and press [YButton] again. While playing, the favorites menu can be accessed by pressing [Favorites]. When the menu appears, you can equip an item with [Activate], [LeftEquip], or [RightEquip], or use it with [Activate]. You can also hotkey an item on the favorites menu by pressing [Left] or [Right] while the item is selected. This gives you instant access to it in game without having to bring up the favorites menu at all.
translations.chinese: 物品栏中的物品可以加入偏好菜单中以快速查看与使用。在你的物品栏中选择物品并按下[YButton]以加入，再次按下[YButton]便可解除偏好设定。 游戏中，你可以按下[Favorites]开启偏好菜单。在菜单中，你可以按下[Activate]、[Mouse2]或[Mouse1]来装备，或者按下[Activate]来使用。 你也可以按下[Left] 或[Right]来为喜好的项目设定热键。这样在游戏中就不需要打开偏好菜单便可快速使用或切换了。

translations.english: Followers are characters who agree to join you on your adventures. Some are trained Hirelings, mercenaries who fight in exchange for gold. Others might be ordinary townspeople inspired by your example who agree to follow you if asked. Most followers can be issued commands. Target your follower, then press and hold [Activate] to enter the command state. While in the command state, you can tell your follower to: - Wait at a specific spot on the ground. - Use an object in the world, such as a lever or chair. - Attack an enemy. - Open a locked door or container. - Pick up items in the world. - Exit the command state by pressing [Cancel]. Note that not all followers can be commanded, and some commands may not be carried out, either because they are physically impossible for your follower (such as picking a lock that is beyond their skill), or because they object to the command (such as being asked to attack a member of their family). Be warned, the guards will hold you responsible for any crimes you command a follower to commit! While followers will attempt to remain at your side, there are some places in Skyrim where they cannot accompany you (such as jail). They will wait outside for you to reappear, but after waiting 3 days, your follower will leave. Should a follower ever leave your service, they will return to their normal lives. You can always ask them to come with you again (although Hirelings may demand a new fee).
translations.chinese: 随从是指那些愿意加入并陪伴你冒险的人，他们有些是佣兵，为了金钱而战；或可能是因为欣赏你，在你同意之下追随于你的普通镇民。 命令大多数随从都会接受你的命令。选择随从，按住[Activate]便可切换至命令模式。在命令模式中，你可以让你的随从： ——在指定的地方等待。 ——与一个物体互动，如操纵拉杆或椅子。 ——攻击一名敌人。 ——打开上锁的门或容器。 ——捡起物品。 ——按下[Cancel]离开命令模式。 注意，不是所有随从都能接受命令，而且有些命令无法实现。这可能是因为随从本身无法完成（比如要他开锁但是他根本不会这门技艺）或者他们本身拒绝命令（比如你命令他攻击他的家人）。 警告，如果你指派随从去犯罪行凶，卫兵会追究你本人的责任！ 虽然你的随从会尽力站在你这一边，但是天际有很多地方是随从无法随你进入的（比如监狱）。这个时候他们会在外面等你出来，不过最多只会等３天，超过时间的话随从会自行离开。 如果随从和你分道扬镳，他们会回归他们自己的生活。你可以随时再度雇用他们（当然得另花一笔钱）。

translations.english: Use Grindstones to improve the damage rating of weapons. All improvements require components, like metal ingots or leather strips. The components required to improve an item appear below the item on the right side of the screen. If you have that component, it is displayed in white; if not, it's displayed in grey. The amount of improvement depends on your Smithing skill and perks.
translations.chinese: 使用磨刀石可以提高武器的伤害。 所有强化都需要材料，如金属锭或革带。强化物品所需的材料会显示在屏幕右侧的物品下方。如果你拥有该材料，则显示为白色；反之则为灰色。 强化的数值取决于你的锻造技能和额外能力。

translations.english: Hirelings are mercenaries found in the major cities of Skyrim. There is one hireling in each city, usually found in the tavern. Because of their combat experience, hirelings are among the most capable followers. Each hireling has a unique personality and skill set. Unlike other followers, Hirelings work only for money. If you dismiss the hireling, replace them with another follower, or leave them waiting for too long (such as while serving a jail sentence), you have a small window of time during which you can hire them back at no cost. Otherwise, you will have to pay their fee to hire them again.
translations.chinese: 佣兵可以在天际各主城中找到。每个城市里都有一个佣兵，通常都在酒馆中。由于他们富有战斗经验，是最有能力的随从。每个佣兵都有独特的个性和技能。 不同于其他随从，佣兵只会为钱工作。如果你想解雇佣兵，用其他随从替换他们，或者让他们等待太久（比如在监狱服刑），你有一小段时间可以免费雇佣他们回来。否则你将不得不重新支付费用进行雇佣。

translations.english: To ride a horse, approach it and press [Activate]. To purchase a horse, visit the stables outside any major city and speak to the stablemaster. Riding a horse you do not own is a crime, and will put a Bounty on your head. When you fast travel to a city, your horse is left for you at the stables outside the city gates.
translations.chinese: 走近马匹按[Activate]即可骑乘。 各大城市外马厩都有马匹出售。盗骑非自己所属马匹是犯罪行为，会被悬赏。 当你快速旅行到一座城中，马匹会留在城门口的马厩里。

translations.english: There are three ways to increase a skill: - Use a skill repeatedly. The lower the skill, the faster it increases from use. The higher the skill, the longer it takes to increase. You can see how far you are from increasing a skill by checking the bar under each skill in your Skills Menu. - Train with another character. You can pay some characters to increase your skills. - Find a Skill Book. Skill Books increase a particular skill when read.
translations.chinese: 提升技能的方法有三： -反复使用一种技能。技能等级越低，提升速度越快；等级越高提升越慢。你可以通过检查技能栏中每个技能下面的进度条来检查距离技能升级还有多少。 -寻找技能训练角色。可以支付一些费用来提高自己的技能。 -寻找技能书。技能书在阅读时可以提升某一特定技能。

translations.english: Your inventory allows you to view, equip, use, and drop items you are currently carrying. To view an item, select it and move [Left Thumbstick] to rotate and examine it, or press [Right Thumbstick] for a closer view. Some items have clues and additional details that are not immediately visible. To equip or unequip an item, select it and press [Activate], [LeftEquip], or [RightEquip]. To add an item to your favorites menu, select it and press [YButton]. To remove a favorite, select it and press [YButton] again. To use an item, select it and press [Activate]. To drop an item, select it and press [XButton].
translations.chinese: 物品栏允许你观看、装备、使用或丢弃你目前持有的物品道具。 选择想要观看的道具，推动[Left Thumbstick]便可旋转并查看它，按下[Right Thumbstick]还可进一步放大仔细观察。有时线索和额外情报会藏在不显眼处。 若想要装备或卸除装备道具，选择道具后按下[Activate]，[LeftEquip]或者[RightEquip]。 选择道具并按下[YButton]，便可加至偏好菜单中。若想解除这个设定，选择后再次按下[Y]即可。 若要使用道具，选择道具并按下[Active]。 想丢弃时，选择道具并按下[XButton]即可。

translations.english: To serve out your time, sleep in the bed in your cell. When you are released, your bounty will be removed, and all of your non-stolen items and equipment will be returned. If you serve your time, you will lose progress toward skill increases depending on how long your sentence is. If you escape, your bounty will not be removed. You can retrieve your items from the jail's personal belongings chest. Your stolen items are placed in the jail's evidence chest.
translations.chinese: 想要服刑，请睡在牢房的床上。当你刑满释放后，你的赏金将被取消，所有非赃物的物品和装备将会归还。如果你选择服刑，你的技能将会随刑期长短而减少。 如果你选择逃跑，赏金不会被取消。你可以从监狱的私人物品箱里取回你的物品。而你的赃物都放在监狱的证物箱里。

translations.english: Quests are listed on the left side of your journal, while each quest's current objective is displayed on the right. To mark a quest as active, select it and press [Activate]. Activating a quest adds its quest target(s) to your compass and world map. Pressing [XButton] will open the world map and display the location of the quest target. The Miscellaneous category includes special objectives that might lead to new quests, locations and rewards. Like quests, you can select a miscellaneous objective and press [Activate] to add its quest target(s) to your map.
translations.chinese: 任务列表会显示在你日志的左侧，每个任务当前的目标会显示在右侧。 想激活任务，可以按[Activate]。激活任务会将任务目标添加到指南针和世界地图上。按[XButton]打开世界地图，可以找到任务目标的位置。 杂项类别包括可能带来新任务、地点或奖励的特殊目标。你可以像激活任务一样选择杂项目标，按[Activate]将其目标添加到地图上。

translations.english: To raise your level, increase any combination of your skills multiple times. To increase a skill, use it repeatedly. The lower the skill, the faster it increases from use. The higher a skill, the longer it takes to increase. Increasing higher-value skills levels you up faster. You can check how far you are from raising your level by looking at the bar on your Skills Menu. When your level increases, you must choose whether to increase your Health, Magicka, or Stamina. You also gain a perk selection, which you can use then or save for later.
translations.chinese: 提升技能次数累积到一定后便可以升级。你需要反复使用技能来提升技能。技能层级越低，提升速度越快。反之技能层级越高，提升速度越慢。 然而提升高等技能可让你等级升得更快。你可以进入菜单的“技能”来查看还要多久才能升级。 当你升级时，你必须选择要提升你的魔力、生命、耐力。同时你能得到一点额外能力点数，点数亦可保留到以后使用。

translations.english: Use [RotatePick] to rotate the lockpick, then [RotateLock] to rotate the lock. When you rotate the lock, the closer the lockpick is to the correct position, the more the lock will rotate before the lockpick breaks. Only when the lockpick is in the correct position will the lock fully rotate and open. Lock difficulty ranges from Novice (easiest) to Master (very hard). The more difficult the lock, the smaller the correct spot is. The better your Lockpick skill, the larger the correct spot will become.
translations.chinese: 推动[RotatePick]调整开锁器位置，并推动[RotateLock]来旋转锁。在你旋转锁的时候，开锁器离正确的位置越接近，锁在开锁器折断前能够旋转的幅度也越大。只有当开锁器处于正确的位置时，锁才能完全旋转并被打开。 锁的难度从新手级（最简单）到大师级（最困难）不等。锁越难开，正确角度的范围越小。开锁技能的提高可以帮助扩大正确角度的范围。

translations.english: In order to pick a character's pockets, you must be sneaking. Approach the target from behind, and press [Activate] to bring up their inventory. Choose the item from their inventory you'd like to steal and select it. Once you've selected the item, it will be added to your inventory provided you weren't detected by the target. It isn't a crime to look in another character's pockets. But any time you steal an item, there's a chance you may be detected. The higher your pickpocket skill, the lower the chance that you'll get caught. It's also possible to plant an item into the target's inventory while pickpocketing. Just select the item from your own inventory, just like you would put something into a container.
translations.chinese: 要进行扒窃，必须先进入潜行状态。从背后靠近目标，按[Activate]便可打开对方的物品栏，并选择想要的物品。一旦你选择了物品，它们会移入你的物品栏。当然，前提是你没有被发现。 查看别人的物品栏并不算是犯罪。但只要你偷了物品，他们便可能会发现你的行为。你的扒窃技能越高，被发现的几率越低。 同时你也可以在扒窃时将物品放到别人的口袋里。只需像将物品放入容器那样，从你的物品栏中选择并存放即可。

translations.english: Press [Shout] to use an equipped power. Each race starts with a unique power; you may acquire additional powers over the course of your adventure. Only one Power can be equipped at a time, and most can only be used once per day.
translations.chinese: 按[Shout]可以使用装备的能力。每个种族都有一项特殊能力，你也可在冒险过程中获取其他额外的能力。一次只能装备一种能力，且大多数每天只能使用一次。

translations.english: Your weapon has been fully drained of charges. To recharge it, select it in your inventory and press [ChargeItem]. Select a filled soul gem to use and press [Accept] to confirm. Your weapon will be recharged and the soul gem will be consumed.
translations.chinese: 你的武器能量已经耗尽。若要充能，请在物品栏中选择该武器并按下[ChargeItem]，选择一颗欲使用的灵魂石后并按下[Accept]确认。你的武器将在消耗掉灵魂石后再次获得能量。

translations.english: Press and hold [Shout] to use a shout. The longer the button is held, the more words of the shout are used. After using a shout, there is a small delay before you can use another. This is indicated by a glow on your compass: when the compass returns to normal, you can shout again. Each Shout is made up of three words. You must learn these words by finding Word Walls scattered throughout the world. After learning a word, you must unlock it with a dragon soul before you can use it. Dragon souls are absorbed by slaying dragons.
translations.chinese: 按住[Shout]使用龙吼。按住时间越长，龙吼的词语就越多。 在使用龙吼之后，会出现一小段时间延迟。当你指南针条上的光亮起时，不能使用龙吼；当指南针恢复正常，即可再次使用龙吼。 每个龙吼都由三个词语组成。你必须通过寻找散布各地的龙语墙来学习这些词汇。学习词语之后，必须用龙魂来解锁，才能使用。龙魂靠屠龙吸收获得。

translations.english: Raw ore can be found throughout the world, primarily in mines. At a smelter, you can smelt this ore into metal ingots, which are needed to forge and improve weapons and armor. The ore or other components required to smelt an ingot appear below it on the right side of the screen. If you have a component, it is displayed in white; if not, it is displayed in grey.
translations.chinese: 世界各地都可以找到矿石，主要的产出地是矿场。你可以用熔炉将矿石熔炼成金属锭，这些金属锭可以用来锻造和强化武器盔甲。 熔炼金属锭所需的矿石和其他材料会显示在屏幕右侧下方。如果你拥有该材料，会显示为白色；反之，则为灰色。

translations.english: Use Blacksmith Forges to craft new weapons and armor. Your Smithing perks determine which materials you can use to forge new items. Forging weapons and armor require components, like leather or metal ingots. The components required to create an item appear below it on the right side of the screen. If you have a component, it is displayed in white; if not, it is displayed in grey.
translations.chinese: 使用铁匠锻炉可以打造新的武器护甲。你的锻造技能决定了你可以使用的材料。 锻造武器和盔甲需要皮革或金属锭等材料。制造物品所需的材料会显示在屏幕右侧的物品下方。如果你拥有该材料，则显示为白色；反之则为灰色。

translations.english: Crouch to enter sneak mode. While sneaking, your current stealth state is displayed on the reticle: - A closed eye means that no one can see you. - An opening eye means that enemies have become alert and are searching for you. - A fully open eye means that someone has detected you. - If the reticle displays DETECTED, an enemy has spotted you and is about to attack. - If the reticle displays HIDDEN, enemies have lost track of you and stopped searching. If you attack while the eye is partially closed, your attack is a considered a Sneak Attack and does additional damage. Your ability to sneak successfully is determined by a number of factors: - Movement: You are hardest to detect while motionless, and easier to spot while moving. - Line of Sight: Enemies are much less likely to detect you if they can't see you. - Light Level: The darker it is, the harder it is for enemies to see you. - Sound: Attacking or casting spells makes noise, which may alert enemies to your presence. Heavier weapons make more noise. Spells produce both sound and light. - Armor: Heavier armor makes more noise when moving. Enemies will react to other sounds in the environment, like arrow impacts or traps. You can sometimes use this to your advantage to lure an enemy out of position.
translations.chinese: 蹲下可以进入潜行模式。潜行时，你当前的状态会显示在准星上： -眼睛闭上代表无人发现你。 -眼睛逐渐睁开代表敌人已经警觉，正在搜寻你。 -眼睛完全睁开代表已经有人发现了你。 -如果准星上显示【警觉】，代表敌人发现你并准备攻击。 -如果准星上显示【隐藏】，代表敌人跟丢了你的踪迹并停止了搜索。 如果眼睛处于半睁开状态，你的攻击会被判定为潜行攻击，可以造成额外伤害。 潜行的成功由许多因素决定： -移动：静止时很难被发现，移动时更容易被发现。 -视线：如果敌人看不到你，则不太可能发现你。 -光照强度：光亮越暗，敌人就越难发现你。 -声音：攻击或施放法术都会发出声响，可能会让敌人觉察到你的存在。武器越重噪音越大。法术会同时产生声音和光。 -护甲：重型护甲在移动时产生的噪音更大。 敌人会对环境中的声音做出发音，比如箭矢或陷阱。有时你可以用这一点来引诱敌人离开你所在的位置。

If you attack while the eye is partially closed, your attack is a considered a Sneak Attack and does additional damage. Your ability to sneak successfully is determined by a number of factors: - Movement: You are hardest to detect while motionless, and easier to spot while moving. - Line of Sight: Enemies are much less likely to detect you if they can't see you. - Light Level: The darker it is, the harder it is for enemies to see you. - Sound: Attacking or casting spells makes noise, which may alert enemies to your presence. translations.english: Soul Gems are stones that can store the souls of living creatures. Filled soul gems are used to create and recharge enchanted items. Soul Gems come in different sizes. The larger the stone, the larger the soul it can store, although larger gems can also hold smaller souls. To fill a soul gem, cast the Soul Trap spell on a creature, then kill it before the spell wears off. If you have an empty Soul Gem in your inventory that can hold the creature's soul, the soul will be bound to the gem. If you have several Soul Gems, the creature's soul will be stored in the smallest gem that can hold it. Note that most Soul Gems can only hold the souls of living creatures. Only Black Soul Gems can hold the souls of humans. Undead, Dwarven constructs, and some other creatures don't have souls you can capture.
translations.chinese: 灵魂石是一种能储存生物灵魂的宝石。充满的灵魂石可以用来制造和充能附魔物品。 灵魂石尺寸不同。石头越大则能储存的灵魂也越大，但大号的灵魂石也可以容纳小型的灵魂。 想要充满灵魂石，需要对生物施放摄魂陷阱法术，并在法术失效前将其杀死。如果你的物品栏中有空的灵魂石，就会直接将该生物的灵魂绑定在灵魂石内。如果你同时持有多个灵魂石，将会由最小的灵魂石来储存该灵魂。 注意，大多数灵魂石只能容纳生物的灵魂。只有黑色灵魂石可以容纳凡人的灵魂。亡灵、矮人机械和一些特殊生物无可捕获灵魂。

translations.english: To equip a spell, open the Magic Menu and find the spell you want to equip. Use [LeftEquip] or [RightEquip] to assign the spell to a specific hand. You can equip a spell in one or both hands, or different spells in each hand. All spells cost Magicka. The cost of a spell is determined by your skill and perks in that spell's school of magic. If you don't have enough Magicka, you can't cast the spell. Many spells take a moment to prepare. Hold down [Left Attack/Block] or [Right Attack/Block] until the hand position changes, then release [Left Attack/Block] / [Right Attack/Block] to cast the spell. You can hold a spell 'ready' as long as you like, but your Magicka will not regenerate during this time. Other spells require active concentration. To cast these spells, hold [Left Attack/Block] or [Right Attack/Block]. The spell is usually cast immediately, and continues until you release [Left Attack/Block] / [Right Attack/Block] or you run out of Magicka. Some spells are cast at the location of the reticle. If the spell has a limited range, the reticle will turn red if it is over an invalid location.
translations.chinese: 你可以打开魔法菜单找到你想装备的法术。使用[LeftEquip]或[RightEquip]把法术分配到特定的手上。你可以用单手或双手装备同一法术，也可以用两只手装备不同的法术。 所有法术都会消耗魔力。法术的成本取决于你对应学派技能和额外能力。如果魔力不足，则不能使用法术 大多数法术需要一定准备时间，按住[Left Attack/Block]或[Right Attack/Block]即可为法术积蓄能量，之后放开按键即可施放。你可以维持法术的待发状态，代价则是魔力在此期间不会恢复。 另外一些法术在按住[Left Attack/Block]或[Right Attack/Block]可瞬时施放并通过按住按键一直保持下去，直到你的魔力耗尽为止。 有些法术只能在准星范围内施放。如果超出有效范围，准星会变为红色。

translations.english: You can equip spells in either or both hands. Casting spells uses Magicka. Most spells take a moment to prepare; hold down [Left Attack/Block] or [Right Attack/Block] for a moment to charge the spell, then release to cast it. Other spells are cast immediately when you hold [Left Attack/Block] or [Right Attack/Block], and continue as long as you hold it.

translations.english: The Tanning Rack is used to turn animal hides into leather, and to cut leather into strips, both common components required for forging and improving weapons and armor. Different types of animal hides will result in different amounts of leather. As a general rule, the larger the animal, the more leather you can create from its hide.
translations.chinese: 制皮架可以将动物皮毛制作成皮革，并将皮革切成条。皮革和革带可以用于制造或强化武器盔甲。 不同种类的动物皮毛产出的皮革数量不同。一般来说，动物越大，可以制造的皮革就越多。

translations.english: Icons on the world map represent cities, towns, dungeons, and other places of interest. An area you have learned about, but not visited, has a dark icon. Areas you have discovered have white icons. The world map also indicates your current location and direction, and the location of your quest targets. You can place a custom marker on the map by selecting an open space or dark icon and pressing [Activate] You can also fast travel to a location you have discovered by selecting its icon and pressing [Activate]. You cannot fast travel from interiors or while in combat.
translations.chinese: 世界地图上的图标代表着城市、村镇、地下城和其他著名地点。你已经了解但还未到达的地点会显示为暗色图标。已经发现的地点为白色图标。世界地图还会显示你当前的位置与方向，还有你任务目标的位置。 你也可以在地图上按[Activate] 来放置一个自定义标记。再次按[Activate] 可以移动或解除。 你可以按[Activate]快速旅行到已经发现的地点。战斗中或室内无法进行快速旅行。

translations.english: If you get into a fight with a friend or guard, you can yield by sheathing your weapon. If your opponent is willing, he will stop the fight. Guards may accept your yield, but they will still try to arrest you if you have a bounty.
translations.chinese: 当你在与朋友或卫兵战斗时，可以通过收起武器投降。如果你的对手愿意罢手，他就会停止攻击。 卫兵们也许会接受你的投降，但如果你被悬赏，那他们还是会试图逮捕你。

translations.english:
[pagebreak]

M A R K A R T H Home Decorating Guide

[pagebreak]

Welcome to your new home! This decorating guide provides a list of packages that you can purchase from the Steward of the hold. Each package contains furnishings and decor for a specific part of your house, and these will be delivered and placed for you upon purchase. All you need to do is provide the gold, and the Steward will take care of the rest. The next time that you visit your home after making your purchases, you will see your new decorations and furnishings in place. Entrance Hall When you purchase this package, floor mats and decorative planters will be added to the hallway just beyond the front door. Living Room This package fills out the home's large, central room with a large dining table, several smaller tables, shelves, a display case and other decor. Sleeping Quarters In addition to improved furnishings and decor for your master bedroom, this package also adds a small dining area between the guest and master bedroom, near the rear of the house. Alchemy Laboratory This package will furnish one the small rooms that adjoin the living room with the implements of an alchemist's laboratory. This includes an alchemy table, several shelves and added decor. Enchanting Laboratory This package adds furniture and decor for a small enchanting laboratory adjoining the living room. This includes an enchanting table, shelves and decor.
translations.chinese:
[pagebreak]

马 卡 斯 城 家装指南

[pagebreak]

欢迎来到您的新家！ 本家装指南将提供可在领地总管处购买的套装清单。每个套装都包含您屋内特定部分的家具与装饰，购买后即会交付。 您只需提供金币，而剩下的都交给总管。等您购买后再次回家时，新的家具装饰已摆放到位。 门厅 本套装会在玄关走廊添加地垫和装饰花盆。 客厅 本套装将填充中央的大房间，包含一张大餐桌、几张小桌、书架、一个陈列柜和其他装饰物。 卧室区 本套装将改善主卧室的家具与装饰，同时在靠近房子后部，客卧与主卧之间的区域增加一个小用餐区。 炼金实验室 本套装将在毗邻客厅的小房间中配置一套炼金工具。包括炼金台、几个架子和其他装饰。 附魔实验室 本套装将在毗邻客厅的小房间中配置一套附魔工具及装饰。包括奥术附魔台、书架和装饰。

translations.english:
[pagebreak]

R I F T E N Home Decorating Guide

[pagebreak]

Welcome to your new home! This decorating guide provides a list of packages that you can purchase from the Steward of the hold. Each package contains furnishings and decor for a specific part of your house, and these will be delivered and placed for you upon purchase. All you need to do is provide the gold, and the Steward will take care of the rest. The next time that you visit your home after making your purchases, you will see your new decorations and furnishings in place. Kitchen This package will provide furnishings and decor for your kitchen, which is the room immediately beyond your home's front door. This includes the lighting of the fire. Bedroom Adds bedside tables, a dresser and a small table with two chairs to the master bedroom. This also includes an upgrade to the bed itself. Alchemy Laboratory This package will place an alchemy crafting table in your basement, along with some shelves and other decor. Enchanting Laboratory This package will place an item enchanting table in your basement, along with some shelves and other decor. Also includes a few practice dummies to test your new enchantments on. Garden When you purchase this package, the small patch of land adjacent to your house will be planted with a wide range of herbs, vegetables and other plants native to Skyrim.
translations.chinese:
[pagebreak]

裂 谷 城 家装指南

[pagebreak]

欢迎来到您的新家！ 本家装指南将提供可在领地总管处购买的套装清单。每个套装都包含您屋内特定部分的家具与装饰，购买后即会交付。 您只需提供金币，而剩下的都交给总管。等您购买后再次回家时，新的家具装饰已摆放到位。 厨房 本套装将为厨房添置家具及装饰，厨房设置在您家前门后面的房间。其中包括火把照明。 卧室 主卧将增添几张床头柜、一个梳妆台和一张附带两把椅子的小桌子。其中包括对床的升级。 炼金实验室 本套装将在地下室放置炼金道具，附带架子和装饰。 附魔实验室 本套装将在地下室放置附魔道具，附带架子和装饰。还包括用来练习新魔法的假人。 花园 您房子附近的小块土地可以用来种植各种花草、蔬菜以及其他天际原生植物。

translations.english:
[pagebreak]

S O L I T U D E Home Decorating Guide

[pagebreak]

Welcome to your new home! This decorating guide provides a list of packages that you can purchase from the Steward of the hold. Each package contains furnishings and decor for a specific part of your house, and these will be delivered and placed for you upon purchase. All you need to do is provide the gold, and the Steward will take care of the rest. The next time that you visit your home after making your purchases, you will see your new decorations and furnishings in place. Living Room This package adds a large table, chairs and a wide range of decor to the living area located centrally on the second floor of the house. Sleeping Quarters When you purchase this package, the master bedroom on the second floor of the house will be decorated with several furnishings and a larger, more luxurious bed. Also, a small dining area will be added just outside the bedroom door that includes a table, chairs and other decorations. Alchemy Laboratory Fills out one of the ground floor rooms with implements and tools for an alchemy laboratory, including an alchemist's crafting table and related decor. Enchanting Laboratory Will stock one of the home's small ground-floor rooms with all of the furnshings for an enchanting laboratory, including an enchanter's crafting table. Also includes several practice dummies on which you can test out your new enchantments. Patio Places a small table, two chairs and other furnishings on the stone patio outside the back of the house.
translations.chinese:
[pagebreak]

独 孤 城 家装指南

[pagebreak]

欢迎来到您的新家！ 本家装指南将提供可在领地总管处购买的套装清单。每个套装都包含您屋内特定部分的家具与装饰，购买后即会交付。 您只需提供金币，而剩下的都交给总管。等您购买后再次回家时，新的家具装饰已摆放到位。 客厅 为位于住宅二楼中心的生活区添置一张大桌子以及椅子和各种装饰。 卧室 为二楼主卧添置装饰家居和一张更大更豪华的床。此外，在卧室门外添加一个小用餐区，包括一张桌子，几把椅子和其他装饰。 炼金实验室 将一楼的一间屋布置上炼金设备，包括炼金台和相关装饰。 附魔实验室 将一楼的一间屋布置上附魔设备，包括奥术附魔台，还有几个测试新魔法的练习假人。 露台 在房子后面的石制露台上添加一张小桌子、两把椅子和其他家具。

S O L I T U D E Home Decorating Guide

[pagebreak]

Welcome to your new home! This decorating guide provides a list of packages that you can purchase from the Steward of the hold. Each package contains furnishings and decor for a specific part of your house, and these will be delivered and placed for you upon purchase. All you need to do is provide the gold, and the Steward will take care of the rest. The next time that you visit your home after making your purchases, you will see your new decorations and furnishings in place. Living Room This package adds a large table, chairs and a wide range of decor to the living area located centrally on the second floor of the house. Sleeping Quarters When you purchase this package, the master bedroom on the second floor of the house will be decorated with several furnishings and a larger, more luxurious bed. Also, a small dining area will be added just outside the bedroom door that includes a table, chairs and other decorations. Alchemy Laboratory Fills out one of the ground floor rooms with implements and tools for an alchemy laboratory, including an alchemist's crafting table and related decor. Enchanting Laboratory Will stock one of the home's small ground-floor rooms with all of the furnshings for an enchanting laboratory, including an enchanter's crafting table. Also includes several practice dummies on which you can test out your new enchantments. Patio Places a small table, two chairs and other furnishings on the stone patio outside the back of the house. | ZH: [pagebreak]

独 孤 城 家装指南

[pagebreak]

欢迎来到您的新家！ 本家装指南将提供可在领地总管处购买的套装清单。每个套装都包含您屋内特定部分的家具与装饰，购买后即会交付。 您只需提供金币，而剩下的都交给总管。等您购买后再次回家时，新的家具装饰已摆放到位。 客厅 为位于住宅二楼中心的生活区添置一张大桌子以及椅子和各种装饰。 卧室 为二楼主卧添置装饰家居和一张更大更豪华的床。此外，在卧室门外添加一个小用餐区，包括一张桌子，几把椅子和其他装饰。 炼金实验室 将一楼的一间屋布置上炼金设备，包括炼金台和相关装饰。 附魔实验室 将一楼的一间屋布置上附魔设备，包括奥术附魔台，还有几个测试新魔法的练习假人。 露台 在房子后面的石制露台上添加一张小桌子、两把椅子和其他家具。 | SID: 010B2B - BOOK:FULL | EN: Solitude Home Decorating Guide | ZH: 独孤城家装指南 | SID: 0107B4

translations.english:
[pagebreak]

W H I T E R U N Home Decorating Guide

[pagebreak]

Welcome to your new home! This decorating guide provides a list of packages that you can purchase from the Steward of the hold. Each package contains furnishings and decor for a specific part of your house, and these will be delivered and placed for you upon purchase. All you need to do is provide the gold, and the Steward will take care of the rest. The next time that you visit your home after making your purchases, you will see your new decorations and furnishings in place. Kitchen Includes a fire pit, a small table and two chairs, as well as a shelf to store cooking supplies. Living Room Provides Wall-mounted shelves, a few side tables and two chairs placed near the fire pit, all near the center of the ground floor. Dining Room Adds a long wooden table and bench, as well as several shelves loaded with cutlery, dishes and cookware. Alchemy Laboratory This package adds an alchemy crafting station, a reading table and chair, and a large wardrobe to the rear area of the ground floor. This also includes the addition of a wall to divide the laboratory from the dining room. Loft This package includes a few chairs and tables to fill out the upper-level loft. Bedroom Adds two bedside tables, a dresser and a small table with two chairs to the master bedroom. This also includes the addition of a wall to give the bedroom added privacy.

白 漫 城 家装指南

欢迎来到您的新家！ 本家装指南将提供可在领地总管处购买的套装清单。每个套装都包含您屋内特定部分的家具与装饰，购买后即会交付。 您只需提供金币，而剩下的都交给总管。等您购买后再次回家时，新的家具装饰已摆放到位。 厨房 包括一个火坑、一张小桌和两把椅子，以及一个烹饪用架。 客厅 提供壁挂式置物架，并在地面层中心的火坑附近添置几张边桌和两把椅子。 餐厅 添置一张长木桌和长凳，以及摆放餐具炊具的架子。 炼金实验室 本套装新增一个炼金工艺台、一套书桌椅，一面放置于底层后方区域的大衣柜。除此之外还会新砌一面墙来隔离实验室与餐厅。 阁楼 本套装包括几个桌椅，用来填充上层阁楼。 卧室 主卧增加两个床头柜、一个梳妆台，还有一张附带两把椅子的小桌子。除此之外会添置一面隔墙，保证卧室的隐私。

W I N D H E L M Home Decorating Guide

[pagebreak]

Welcome to your new home! This decorating guide provides a list of packages that you can purchase from the Steward of the hold. Each package contains furnishings and decor for a specific part of your house, and these will be delivered and placed for you upon purchase. All you need to do is provide the gold, and the Steward will take care of the rest. The next time that you visit your home after making your purchases, you will see your new decorations and furnishings in place. Kitchen Includes a fireplace, a table for two and ample shelving to store your food and cooking supplies. Living Room This package fills Hjerim's spacious ground floor living room with several tables, chairs and shelves. Decorations for the floor and walls are also included. Alchemy Laboratory Adds an alchemy crafting station. Enchanting Laboratory Adds an enchanting crafting station. Upstairs Landing This package adds several weapon racks and display cases, and lines the walls with mounted animal heads. Bedroom Provides an upgrade to your bed, as well as shelving, display cases, improved lighting and other bedroom furnishings and decor. Guest Room Improves the furnishings and decor in your home's guest bedroom, including a finer-quality bed, a small table, and some shelves.

translations.english: When sneaking, if the eye is partially open, someone is searching for you. If it is fully open, they have found you.
translations.chinese: 潜行状态下，眼睛处于半睁，则一定有人在搜寻你，如果眼睛完全睁开，说明你已经被他们发现了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: HUDDetection
Translations:

translations.english: If you have an enchanted weapon equipped, its current enchantment level is shown above your Stamina bar or Magicka bar.
translations.chinese: 如果你装备了附魔武器，它当前的附魔等级将会显示在你的耐力或魔力条上方。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: When your Magicka or Stamina bar flashes, it means you cannot perform the action you just attempted. Power attacks become regular attacks, and spells fail.
translations.chinese: 当你的魔力或耐力条闪烁时，意味着你不能在继续使用刚才的攻击方式。重击将变为常规攻击，而法术也不会奏效。

translations.english: After you use a Shout power, the compass outline will glow brightly. It fades from the center, indicating the time until you can Shout again.
translations.chinese: 当你使用龙吼之后，指南针的轮廓会发光然后自中间开始淡出，示意你再次使用龙吼的时间。

translations.english: Natives of Cyrodiil, they have proved to be shrewd diplomats and traders. They are skilled with combat and magic. Anywhere gold coins might be found, Imperials always seem to find a few more. They can call upon the Voice of the Emperor to calm an enemy.
translations.chinese: 帝国人是希罗帝尔的原住民，精明的交际家和商人。战斗和魔法天赋都很出众。在任何有可能发现金币的地方，帝国人似乎总能比别人找到更多。他们可以用“帝王之音”使敌人平静下来。

translations.english: Tougher creatures have larger souls, which need larger soul gems to hold them. Larger souls make better enchantments and recharge weapons more completely.
translations.chinese: 生物越强，拥有的灵魂越大，承载它所需的灵魂石也就越大。灵魂越大，则附魔效果越好，武器充能越多。

translations.english: There is room in my court for a new Thane. It's an honorary title, mainly, but there are a few perks someone like you could make use of.
translations.chinese: 我的宫廷里还有地方容纳新的武卫。这就是个荣誉头衔，但你也可以持有一些特权。

translations.english: However, I could only grant the title to someone who is known throughout my Hold, and who owns at least one piece of property in my city.
translations.chinese: 然而，我只能把头衔授予给我领地内有名望，且在城里有一块土地的人。

translations.english: You help my people and purchase a house from my steward, and I'll make you my Thane.
translations.chinese: 你需要去帮助我的人民，然后再从我的总管处买一所房子，我就可以封你做我的武卫了。

translations.english: When you get a new quest, it will not become active unless you have no other active quests. Check your journal to see which quests are active.
translations.chinese: 当你获得新任务时，除非当前没有激活状态的任务，它是不会被激活的。查看你的任务日志，看看哪些任务正在被激活。

translations.english: If you have too many quest targets, check your journal to see if you have more than one active quest. In the Miscellaneous category, you can turn each objective on or off.
translations.chinese: 如果你当前有过多的任务目标，请检查任务日志，看看是否有一个以上的任务。你可以在杂项任务里打开或关闭多余的目标。

translations.english: Hailing from the province of Elsweyr, they are intelligent, quick, and agile. They make excellent thieves due to their natural stealthiness. All Khajiit can see in the dark at will and have unarmed claw attacks.
translations.chinese: 卡吉特来自艾斯维尔省，聪明、敏捷、灵活。由于天生的潜行天赋，他们都是当盗贼的行家。卡吉特能在黑暗中保持绝佳的视力，徒手时可以用利爪进行攻击。

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> Sabjorn, This is my third and final offer. I feel that I've been more than generous with the amounts I've stated to buy your meadery. There's no reason for competition to stifle both of our businesses. Unified, we could make Black-Briar Mead a household name and bury anyone else who tries to start a similar business in Skyrim. If you wish to accept my offer, please come to Riften and stay at my manor as a guest. I think you'll find that being a part of the Black-Briar family would be both lucrative and life-saving. Maven</font>
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> 撒布乔恩： 这是我第三次，也是最后一次出价。我觉得我给你酒庄出的价已经足够慷慨了。合则两利，咱们没道理闹得两败俱伤。只要你我合作，咱们就能让黑棘蜜酒成为家喻户晓的品牌，还能让那些试图到天际分一杯羹的人彻底滚蛋。如果你愿意，请到裂谷城来，我愿奉你为上宾。成为黑棘家族的一员是既能赚钱又能救命的好事。 玛雯</font>

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: LetterHonningbrewMeadery01
Translations:
- BOOK:DESC | EN: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> Sabjorn, This is my third and final offer. I feel that I've been more than generous with the amounts I've stated to buy your meadery. There's no reason for competition to stifle both of our businesses. Unified, we could make Black-Briar Mead a household name and bury anyone else who tries to start a similar business in Skyrim. If you wish to accept my offer, please come to Riften and stay at my manor as a guest. I think you'll find that being a part of the Black-Briar family would be both lucrative and life-saving. Maven</font> | ZH: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> 撒布乔恩： 这是我第三次，也是最后一次出价。我觉得我给你酒庄出的价已经足够慷慨了。合则两利，咱们没道理闹得两败俱伤。只要你我合作，咱们就能让黑棘蜜酒成为家喻户晓的品牌，还能让那些试图到天际分一杯羹的人彻底滚蛋。如果你愿意，请到裂谷城来，我愿奉你为上宾。成为黑棘家族的一员是既能赚钱又能救命的好事。 玛雯</font> | SID: 010BD4
- BOOK:FULL | EN: Have Need of Cynric | ZH: 需要希利克 | SID: 01063D

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>Keerava, As of this month, I'm afraid we're going to have to double the cost for Black-Briar Mead. As you're no doubt well aware, there's quite a bit of civil unrest occurring within Skyrim. With this unrest comes increased costs to us for shipment protection, ingredients and labor. I think you'll find your customers more than willing to share in this burden by absorbing the cost through a price increase I recommend you institute immediately. Failure to comply with our new costs will result in an immediate interruption of Black-Briar Mead. Sincerely, Maven Black-Briar
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>基拉瓦： 恐怕从本月起黑棘蜜酒的价格要翻倍了。现在天际内战严重你也是知道的。动荡持续的情况下，运输保护、原料和劳动力成本都在增加。我觉得你的顾客会很乐意分担这个负担，通过提高售价来回本。我建议你立刻涨价。拒不配合的话，我们只能立即中断黑棘蜜酒的供应了。 此致 玛雯·黑棘

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: LetterRiftenBeeandBarb01
Translations:
- BOOK:DESC | EN: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>Keerava, As of this month, I'm afraid we're going to have to double the cost for Black-Briar Mead. As you're no doubt well aware, there's quite a bit of civil unrest occurring within Skyrim. With this unrest comes increased costs to us for shipment protection, ingredients and labor. I think you'll find your customers more than willing to share in this burden by absorbing the cost through a price increase I recommend you institute immediately. Failure to comply with our new costs will result in an immediate interruption of Black-Briar Mead. Sincerely, Maven Black-Briar | ZH: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>基拉瓦： 恐怕从本月起黑棘蜜酒的价格要翻倍了。现在天际内战严重你也是知道的。动荡持续的情况下，运输保护、原料和劳动力成本都在增加。我觉得你的顾客会很乐意分担这个负担，通过提高售价来回本。我建议你立刻涨价。拒不配合的话，我们只能立即中断黑棘蜜酒的供应了。 此致 玛雯·黑棘 | SID: 010C36

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>Talen-Jei, I've checked with Maramal and I'm certain an arrangement can be made to incorporate the traditional Argonian bonding ceremonies should the need arise. It would be our pleasure to receive you at the temple and to have Maramal perform a marriage ceremony between yourself and Keerava, but we'd request the appropriate tithe be made as we previously discussed. Whatever you decide, I wish you both the best of luck and hope to see you here soon. Drifa
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>塔伦-杰： 我已经与玛拉莫核实过了，如果你需要的话，我们可以安排一个传统的阿尔贡婚礼。我们很乐意在神殿接待您们，并请玛拉莫为您和基拉瓦举行仪式，但我们请您按我们之前讨论过的条件，缴纳适当的什一税。无论您如何决定，我们都衷心祝愿你们好运，希望很快能见到你们走入殿堂。 丁雅

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: LetterRiftenBeeandBarb02
Translations:
- BOOK:DESC | EN: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>Talen-Jei, I've checked with Maramal and I'm certain an arrangement can be made to incorporate the traditional Argonian bonding ceremonies should the need arise. It would be our pleasure to receive you at the temple and to have Maramal perform a marriage ceremony between yourself and Keerava, but we'd request the appropriate tithe be made as we previously discussed. Whatever you decide, I wish you both the best of luck and hope to see you here soon. Drifa | ZH: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>塔伦-杰： 我已经与玛拉莫核实过了，如果你需要的话，我们可以安排一个传统的阿尔贡婚礼。我们很乐意在神殿接待您们，并请玛拉莫为您和基拉瓦举行仪式，但我们请您按我们之前讨论过的条件，缴纳适当的什一税。无论您如何决定，我们都衷心祝愿你们好运，希望很快能见到你们走入殿堂。 丁雅 | SID: 010C71
- BOOK:FULL | EN: Mara Smiles Upon You! | ZH: 玛拉的微笑常伴你！ | SID: 01086D

translations.english: <font face="$HandwrittenFont">Christophe, Upon reading your last letter, I was deeply touched. You're right, I was angry, but now I realize my anger was misplaced. It's time to leave our disagreements in the past and rekindle our friendship. I'll be sending someone to fetch you and bring you to Riften. I wish to avoid a scene, so he'll be calling at night. Make sure you pack all your belongings securely, as the journey could be rather treacherous. Maven Black-Briar
translations.chinese: <font face="$HandwrittenFont">克利斯托夫： 来信已阅，甚为感动。你说得对，当时我被愤怒冲昏了头脑，现在悔矣。就让我们把分歧留在过去，重新开始我们的友谊吧。我会派人接你回裂谷城。我不想惹上麻烦，所以他会在晚上到达。把所有东西收拾好，旅行可能会相当危险。 玛雯·黑棘

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: LetterRiftenBlackBriarBannedMare01
Translations:
- BOOK:DESC | EN: <font face="$HandwrittenFont">Christophe, Upon reading your last letter, I was deeply touched. You're right, I was angry, but now I realize my anger was misplaced. It's time to leave our disagreements in the past and rekindle our friendship. I'll be sending someone to fetch you and bring you to Riften. I wish to avoid a scene, so he'll be calling at night. Make sure you pack all your belongings securely, as the journey could be rather treacherous. Maven Black-Briar | ZH: <font face="$HandwrittenFont">克利斯托夫： 来信已阅，甚为感动。你说得对，当时我被愤怒冲昏了头脑，现在悔矣。就让我们把分歧留在过去，重新开始我们的友谊吧。我会派人接你回裂谷城。我不想惹上麻烦，所以他会在晚上到达。把所有东西收拾好，旅行可能会相当危险。 玛雯·黑棘 | SID: 010799
- BOOK:FULL | EN: Letter from Maven | ZH: 玛雯的来信 | SID: 01097B

translations.english: <font face="$HandwrittenFont">Dearest Maven, After our disagreement a fortnight ago, I feared that business had finally gotten the best of our friendship. Since I still have yet to receive a reply to my last letter, it seems my suspicions are correct. I realize my mistake has cost you a lot and all I hope to do is make amends. I'll be staying at the Bannered Mare in Whiterun should you wish to speak with me. Regards, Christophe Bartlet
translations.chinese: <font face="$HandwrittenFont">亲爱的玛雯： 两周前我们意见相左，我很担心我们的友谊最终会被生意所毁。鉴于未收到上封信的回复，看来我所虑不差。我知道我的失误让你损失很大，我所能做的只有尽量弥补了。如果你想和我谈谈，我现住白漫城悬旗母马旅店等你。 此致 敬礼 克利斯托夫·巴特利特

translations.english: <font face="$HandwrittenFont">Maven, This is the final letter I'll be sending to you. I'm sick to death of your underhanded methods. A little competition never hurt anyone and Honningbrew has barely scratched the surface of your business. I've lost two more shipments this month to these so-called "bandits." If I find out you're involved, I'm taking it to the Jarl. Sabjorn
translations.chinese: <font face="$HandwrittenFont">玛雯： 这是我最后一次给你写信了。我已经受够了你的卑鄙手段。区区竞争根本于你我无害，蜜之酿于是你的业务不过是九牛一毛。这个月又有两批货被所谓的“强盗”劫去了。只要我找到你参与其中的证据，我一定上报领主。 撒布乔恩

translations.english: <font face="$HandwrittenFont">Astrid, I thought your people were supposed to be reliable. I've performed the Black Sacrament, I've paid the proper penance and I've waited patiently for results. If you can't handle a simple assassination, I'll find someone who can. I want this contract handled, and I want it handled immediately! Maven Black-Briar
translations.chinese: <font face="$HandwrittenFont">阿斯垂德： 我觉得你的人应该可靠。我已经执行过黑色圣礼，并进行过适当的祈祷，现在我就静候佳音了。如果你连这种简单的暗杀都应付不了，那我就另换别人了。我要求你必须达成这项契约，而且是立刻！ 玛雯·黑棘

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>Lady Maven Black-Briar, I've made inquiries into the loss of your mead shipment to Cyrodiil, and I've come to the conclusion that they were waylaid by a group of mercenaries under the employ of the Empire. According to my sources, these mercenaries were not acting under orders and simply attacked the caravan for supplies. I've forwarded a request for compensation on your behalf to the Imperial Council and the mercenaries in question have already been dealt with accordingly. Again, I wish to extend my deepest apologies for this unfortunate mishap and I assure you that any future shipments into our nation will be met at the border by an Imperial patrol and personally escorted to its final destination. Reginn Limilus Grand Steward, Imperial City Trade Relations
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>玛雯·黑棘夫人： 我调查了您的蜜酒在希罗帝尔丢失一事，结论是它们是被帝国雇佣的佣兵伏击了。据我的消息来源称，这些佣兵并非奉命行事，只是劫掠商队来获取补给。我已代表您向帝国议会递交了一份赔偿申请，相关责任佣兵也会受到相应的处理。我再次对此次不幸的事故表达我最诚挚的歉意。我向您保证，未来任何进入我国的货物都会在边境由帝国巡逻队接手护送到目的地。 帝都贸易总管 雷金·利米卢斯

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>Notice to all employees: Lady Black-Briar has requested that all employees be subject to random searches at my discretion. There's been a rash of missing mead barrels lately, and I won't tolerate it any longer. Any employee caught with merchandise belonging to Lady Black-Briar will be subject to immediate incarceration in Riften Jail. If you have any objections to this posting, feel free to remove yourself from the meadery permanently. Indaryn </font>
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>全体员工注意： 黑棘夫人要求我对全体员工进行随机搜查。近期许多酒桶失窃，我已不能忍受。任何被发现夹带黑棘夫人所属物的员工都会被立即关进裂谷城监狱。如果你对岗位有任何异议，请随时、永久地离开蜜酒庄。 印达林 </font>

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>Notice to all employees: It's come to my attention that the last batch of Black-Briar Private Reserve was simply our standard Black-Briar Mead placed in the incorrect bottles. We sold six cases of the Private Reserve recently and they were all returned. To make amends, we've replaced the cases with the correct supply at our cost. Due to this blunder, the cost of those cases will be removed from this month's wages. Indaryn </font>
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>全体员工注意： 我注意到上一批出货的黑棘私家窖藏只是装错了瓶子的普通黑棘蜜酒。最近卖出去的六箱全被退回来了。为了弥补损失，我们只能自费合适的货源来还回这些酒。此次失误造成的额外费用从本月工资中扣除。 印达林 </font>

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>Notice to all employees: I've discovered my bed filled with skeever droppings that were obviously placed there on purpose by an employee who felt that it was an amusing prank. You have until Middas to either come forward on your own or point me in the direction of the perpetrator of this practical joke, otherwise all employees will be subject to half wages for the next three months. Indaryn </font>
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>全体员工注意： 我发现我床上到处都是恶鼠屎，显然是某位员工故意为之，看来他觉得这很有意思。限他周三前自己站出来，否则接下来三个月全员工资减半。 印达林 </font>

translations.english: <font face="$HandwrittenFont">Indaryn, If you ever dare to create arbitrary rules on my behalf again without informing me first, I'll have Maul personally show you what your insides look like. I trust that we're clear on this issue and I won't have to mention it again. Maven

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>Bolli, I'm sorry to have to tell you this, but your suspicions are likely correct. I've been following Nivenor as you requested, and I'm fairly certain that she's had extra-marital relations with more than one individual within Riften. I have yet to obtain proof of her adultery, so please do not confront her with this information until I've secured it. I'll waive the usual charges for now, but expect full payment once the proof is in my possession.
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>波利： 我很抱歉不得不告知您此事，但您的怀疑可能是对的。我按您的要求一直跟踪尼维诺尔，且我相当肯定她于裂谷城内与不止一人发生过婚外情。我尚未取得她通奸的实证，因此在我确证前，请勿以这些情报与她对质。现下我暂且免除惯常收取的费用，但一旦我掌握证据请全额付款。

translations.english: <font face="$HandwrittenFont">Things to do: 1. Repair holes in nets. Sending to Markarth too expensive, look for local solution. Valindor perhaps? 2. Repair wood damage on fish pens. No skill required for this, should simply have Wujeeta take care of it. 3. Adjust fishing charts for Lake Honrich. Need to keep ship clear of Goldenglow Estate. They took potshots at our ship last time we moored within a stone's throw of their location, no idea why and answers to Aringoth have gone unanswered. 4. Tell Nivenor to stop spending so much of our damn money!
translations.chinese: <font face="$HandwrittenFont">待办事项： 1.修补渔网的破洞。寄到马卡斯城去修太贵了，还是尽量在本地解决吧。也许可以找瓦林多问问？ 2.修复破损的鱼栏。这不是什么技术活，让巫杰塔去办吧。 3.调整霍利奇湖的捕鱼线路图。不能再让船只靠近金色光辉庄园了。上次我们只是停在离他们一石之遥的地方，就遭到了未知原因的猛烈攻击，找阿林格斯讨说法也没得到回复。 4.得告诉尼维诺尔别再乱花钱了！

translations.english: <font face="$HandwrittenFont">Sweet Haelga, Last night was the most wonderful night of my life. The things you showed me... the things we did... I could never have dreamt that it was possible. Who even knew that someone could manipulate their body in that manner while wearing Daedric armor boots? You are a true master of the Dibellan Arts, my love... a credit to your religion. Perhaps we'll meet again soon but next time, allow me to bring the trout. Your Secret Lover
translations.chinese: <font face="$HandwrittenFont">亲爱的哈尔嘉： 昨晚真是我这辈子最美好的一夜。你给我看的东西……我们做的事……都是我从没想过的。谁能想到有人能穿着迪德拉战靴还能做出这样的动作呢？你可真是迪贝拉艺术大师，甜心……你为你的信仰带来了荣光。也许我们很快就能再见了，我会带鲑鱼当礼物的。 你的秘密情人

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>Wylandriah, Your letter sent to the College of Winterhold was rife with grammatical errors and incomplete thoughts, making them difficult to discern. Could you please clarify the points below for us to ensure we're on the same page? We have no record of a "cloud emulsifier" device or anything involving the magical manipulation of the clouds. Second, we can't send you a sample of the Heart of Lorkhan for experimentation, as no such sample exists. And finally, in the fourteenth paragraph of your letter, you mention a substance called "greenmote." We're assuming this was a simple mistake and you meant to write "greenspore." If that's the case, we have contaminated skeever carcasses with the disease available if needed. We'd also like to thank you for sending us your notes regarding your experiments, we've all had quite a grand time reading them. Mirabelle Ervine </font>
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>维兰瑞亚： 你寄给冬堡学院的信已收到，里面语言七颠八倒，想法也不甚完整，令人难以分辨。可否详细澄清以下几点，确保我们的理解一致。 第一，我们没有所谓“云朵粘合剂”的设备记录在案，也找不到涉及操纵云朵的魔法。第二，我们没法给你邮寄洛克汗之心的样品给你做实验，我们这儿也没这东西。第三，在你来信的第十四段你提到了一种叫“绿包子”的物质。我们简单假设这是你把“绿孢子”写错了。如果需要的话，恶鼠尸体上大概有的是。 也感谢你给我们寄来的实验笔记，我们读得很开心。 米拉贝勒·厄文 </font>

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: LetterRiftenKeep01
Translations:
- BOOK:DESC | EN: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>Wylandriah, Your letter sent to the College of Winterhold was rife with grammatical errors and incomplete thoughts, making them difficult to discern. Could you please clarify the points below for us to ensure we're on the same page? We have no record of a "cloud emulsifier" device or anything involving the magical manipulation of the clouds. Second, we can't send you a sample of the Heart of Lorkhan for experimentation, as no such sample exists. And finally, in the fourteenth paragraph of your letter, you mention a substance called "greenmote." We're assuming this was a simple mistake and you meant to write "greenspore." If that's the case, we have contaminated skeever carcasses with the disease available if needed. We'd also like to thank you for sending us your notes regarding your experiments, we've all had quite a grand time reading them. Mirabelle Ervine </font> | ZH: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>维兰瑞亚： 你寄给冬堡学院的信已收到，里面语言七颠八倒，想法也不甚完整，令人难以分辨。可否详细澄清以下几点，确保我们的理解一致。 第一，我们没有所谓“云朵粘合剂”的设备记录在案，也找不到涉及操纵云朵的魔法。第二，我们没法给你邮寄洛克汗之心的样品给你做实验，我们这儿也没这东西。第三，在你来信的第十四段你提到了一种叫“绿包子”的物质。我们简单假设这是你把“绿孢子”写错了。如果需要的话，恶鼠尸体上大概有的是。 也感谢你给我们寄来的实验笔记，我们读得很开心。 米拉贝勒·厄文 </font> | SID: 010988

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>A quick note regarding my son, Sibbi. He's to be treated as I'd expect you to treat any one of the Black-Briar family and all of his requests are to be honored without question. However, if he wishes to be released, you are not to do so unless I expressly authorize it. Sibbi needs to learn his place, and the only way that will happen is if he's kept under lock and key. Maven </font>
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>关于我儿西比的事。希望你们能按对待黑棘家族的规矩，无条件尊重他的所有要求。但是，除非有我点头，就算他希望出狱，也不许你们同意。西比必须好好认清自己的位置。唯一的办法就是把他关起来。 玛雯 </font>

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>To the owner of Riftweald Manor, I'm not accustomed to working under these conditions of secrecy, but your generous compensation for the inconvenience was more than adequate to complete the project. Both the balcony ramp and the floor mechanism were interesting projects, and I hope you'll find them functioning to your surprisingly specific specifications. If you should have any further need for my talents, please call on me again. Kilthinius Dandoril
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>致裂野庄园主人： 我不习惯在这种秘密条件下工作，但您对此的慷慨补偿足以完成这个项目。阳台坡道和地板机关都很有趣，希望能满足您的具体要求。如果您还需要我的才能，欢迎再次联系我。 基尔提纽斯·丹多利尔

translations.english: <font face="$HandwrittenFont">M, Not certain how you managed to get your hands on that item we discussed, but I'm more than pleased. I thought you'd simply wait until it was being transported from Castle Dour to its final destination, but according to what I've heard, it vanished right from their armory. I wish I knew how you were able to slip by the guards, bypass the portcullis, unlock the armory door and break into that dwarven puzzle-locked chest... you need to teach me that little trick some time. I've left your cut in the usual drop spot and might have another job for you soon. R
translations.chinese: <font face="$HandwrittenFont">M： 虽然不知道你是怎么拿到咱们讨论过的那个东西的，但我很高兴。我以为你会等它从阴郁堡运到目的地再动手，但据我所知，它是直接从军械库里消失的。真希望知道你是怎么溜过守卫，绕过铁闸，打开军械库的门，还破开那个矮人谜题箱的。你可得找时间教教我。我把你那份放在平时的交货点了，或许很快就有新工作给你。 R

translations.english: <font face="$HandwrittenFont">Lady Mjoll, I hope this letter finds safe passage to your hands. We are in desperate need of help and we have nowhere else to turn. Everyone in Dawnstar is having nightmares. These horrible visions plague our slumber and leave us feeling frightened and tired even after a full night's sleep. I myself have awoken from one of the dreams bathed in cold sweat after having one of these nightmares. The things that I saw were simply too appalling to describe. There's a priest of Mara that claims he might be able to help us, but so far, he simply sits within the Windpeak Inn scribbling notes. If you could find it in your heart to make the journey to our city and help us, I would forever be in your debt. Madena
translations.chinese: <font face="$HandwrittenFont">穆月尔女士： 但愿信件能安全送到您的手中。我们急需帮助，而且也无处可逃了。晨星现在人人都在做噩梦。可怕的幻象正在困扰我们的睡眠，令人恐惧疲惫，不得安歇。我自己也做过这样的噩梦，一觉醒来浑身都是冷汗。梦里看到的景象简直无法形容。有个玛拉祭司说可能能帮我们，但目前为止他只是坐在风岳旅店里写笔记。如果您能来我们的城市帮助我们，我将永远感激您。 玛迪娜

translations.english: <font face="$HandwrittenFont">Bersi, I got your last request, but there's no way I'm going near Shroud Hearth Barrow. I know that the trinkets from the Nordic Barrows sell quite well, but it isn't worth getting killed. You probably think I'm crazy, but I'm certain that the place is haunted and I refuse to become another victim of... whatever lives there. Sorry, old friend. Wilhelm Vilemyr Inn, Ivarstead
translations.chinese: <font face="$HandwrittenFont">波西： 你上次的请求我已经收到了，但我绝不会接近覆炉古坟。我也清楚从诺德古墓里出土的小饰品卖得不错，但为这东西丧命也不值当的。你可能在想我是疯了，但我很确定那地方正在闹鬼，我可不想成为下一个受害者……谁知道那里面有什么。抱歉了，老朋友。 威尔海姆 伊瓦尔镇，烂醉如泥旅店

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>Delvin, I have a full score of glass arrows coming in. If you want a piece, I'll sell them to you for my cost. I need to keep the merchandise moving or else that bitch might catch on to our operation. If you want them, they'll be stashed under the docks in the usual place. I'll check back with you in a week. Tuldinwae
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>戴尔文： 我刚刚进了一整批玻璃箭。想分一份儿的话，可以成本价倒给你。我得让货流动起来，否则那贱人可能会发现咱们的行动。如果想要的话，东西就藏在码头下面的老地方。我一周后再找你核对。 图丁瓦

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>Vex, Give an old man a chance, why don't you? I know I may have a few years under my belt, but that doesn't mean we can't have some fun. Believe me, I can show you a thing or two. Quit playing hard to get... I saw how you blushed when Dirge started reading from the Lusty Argonian Maid. You're a firebrand, and we all know it. Take me up on my offer and stop playing the tough girl. We all know the toughest ones are the softest on the inside. Delvin
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>小烦： 再给老头子一个机会，成不？我知道我可能老了点，但也不代表咱们找不到乐子啊。相信我，我能让你体验点新鲜的。别再撑着绷着了……挽歌读《元气满满的阿尔贡女仆》的时候，我看到你羞得满脸通红。我们都知道，你内心可是躁动得很。接受我的提议吧，别再故作坚强了。谁都知道，越坚强的人，内心就越柔软啊。 戴尔文

translations.english: <font face="$HandwrittenFont">Balimund, I've been quite impressed with the quality of your work and I hope that it continues. I've informed everyone within the keep, including the guard, that all repairs and requests for new weapons should be sent your way. Jarl Laila has been notified of this as well, and she extends her sincerest thanks for your contributions to the defense of the city. Just remember, I've stuck my neck out for you by using my name, so don't make me look the fool by letting your standards slide. Harrald
translations.chinese: <font face="$HandwrittenFont">巴利蒙德： 你的工作质量确实不错，好好坚持下去。我已经通知了城堡里的所有人，包括卫兵在内，以后所有的维修和锻造订单都给你了。莱拉领主也听说了，对你为保卫城市所做的贡献深表感谢。记住，我可是拿自己的名誉替你担了不小的风险，所以不要偷工减料，免得让我被看扁。 哈拉尔德
