translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>Concerned Citizen, You've received this letter because you're a businessman in Riften who's sick and tired of being pushed around by the Black-Briar Family and their cronies. You're sick of the Thieves Guild taking your last coin from your already meager earnings. And you're sick of the corruption that runs through Mistveil Keep like a disease. We at the Society of Mercantile Freedom in Riften are behind you and wish to unify to fight our common enemies! Join us, and together we'll stand up and smash the injustice that's ruined this once-fine city. If you're interested in becoming a part of our organization, simply mark your business with a white x and you'll be contacted by a representative. The Society of Mercantile Freedom in Riften </font>
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>致有心的市民： 你能收到这封信，说明你身为裂谷城的商人已经厌倦了被黑棘家族和他们的走狗摆布。也烦透了盗贼公会从你微薄的收入里抠走最后一枚金币。也受够了雾隐堡垒像疾病一样蔓延的腐败。我们在裂谷城的自由商业协会支持你，团结起来对抗我们共同的敌人！加入我们吧，我们一起粉碎这座曾经美好城市里的不公。如果你有兴趣加入，就在您的店铺摊位上打上一个白叉，我们的代表会去联系你。 裂谷城自由商业协会 </font>

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: LetterRiftenSMFRInitialLetter
Translations:
- BOOK:DESC | EN: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>Concerned Citizen, You've received this letter because you're a businessman in Riften who's sick and tired of being pushed around by the Black-Briar Family and their cronies. You're sick of the Thieves Guild taking your last coin from your already meager earnings. And you're sick of the corruption that runs through Mistveil Keep like a disease. We at the Society of Mercantile Freedom in Riften are behind you and wish to unify to fight our common enemies! Join us, and together we'll stand up and smash the injustice that's ruined this once-fine city. If you're interested in becoming a part of our organization, simply mark your business with a white x and you'll be contacted by a representative. The Society of Mercantile Freedom in Riften </font> | ZH: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>致有心的市民： 你能收到这封信，说明你身为裂谷城的商人已经厌倦了被黑棘家族和他们的走狗摆布。也烦透了盗贼公会从你微薄的收入里抠走最后一枚金币。也受够了雾隐堡垒像疾病一样蔓延的腐败。我们在裂谷城的自由商业协会支持你，团结起来对抗我们共同的敌人！加入我们吧，我们一起粉碎这座曾经美好城市里的不公。如果你有兴趣加入，就在您的店铺摊位上打上一个白叉，我们的代表会去联系你。 裂谷城自由商业协会 </font> | SID: 010B3E
- BOOK:FULL | EN: To A Concerned Citizen | ZH: 致有心的市民 | SID: 010C5E

translations.english: <font face="$HandwrittenFont">Drifa, I was wondering if you could speak to Maramal about perhaps presiding over a marriage ceremony for myself and Keerava. She's the love of my life and I wish to be with her forever, but only if we can be wed in traditional Argonian fashion. Traditional Argonian bonding ceremonies are somewhat long and complex, involving unique rituals spoken in our native language. I'd be more than happy to provide a book describing what I'm looking for as long as Maramal doesn't mind. Talen-Jei
translations.chinese: <font face="$HandwrittenFont">丁雅： 你能不能和玛拉莫谈谈，看看能不能给我和基拉瓦主持婚礼。她是我一生的挚爱，我希望能和她永远在一起，但前提是我们要以阿尔贡的传统举行婚礼。传统的阿尔贡婚礼有些漫长复杂，还要用我们的母语主持独特的仪式。如果玛拉莫愿意，我可以提供一本书来描述我需要的东西。 塔伦-杰

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: LetterRiftenTempleOfMara01
Translations:
- BOOK:DESC | EN: <font face="$HandwrittenFont">Drifa, I was wondering if you could speak to Maramal about perhaps presiding over a marriage ceremony for myself and Keerava. She's the love of my life and I wish to be with her forever, but only if we can be wed in traditional Argonian fashion. Traditional Argonian bonding ceremonies are somewhat long and complex, involving unique rituals spoken in our native language. I'd be more than happy to provide a book describing what I'm looking for as long as Maramal doesn't mind. Talen-Jei | ZH: <font face="$HandwrittenFont">丁雅： 你能不能和玛拉莫谈谈，看看能不能给我和基拉瓦主持婚礼。她是我一生的挚爱，我希望能和她永远在一起，但前提是我们要以阿尔贡的传统举行婚礼。传统的阿尔贡婚礼有些漫长复杂，还要用我们的母语主持独特的仪式。如果玛拉莫愿意，我可以提供一本书来描述我需要的东西。 塔伦-杰 | SID: 010C56
- BOOK:FULL | EN: Argonian Ceremony | ZH: 阿尔贡仪式 | SID: 0108E6

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>Maramal, We've gotten numerous reports of disturbances in the graveyard area next to the temple and we'd like you to investigate. The reports describe strange noises, described as "stone grating on stone" and shadowy figures moving about the mausoleum. I've sent a guard to investigate, but they've come up empty-handed. We've already spoken to Alessandra, but she assures me that these odd reports have nothing to do with any rituals of Arkay she might be performing. Any help you could render would certainly be appreciated. Anuriel, Steward of Riften </font>
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>玛拉莫： 我们收到很多报告，说神殿旁边的墓地发生骚乱。希望你能去调查一下。报告里称听到了“石头摩擦”的奇怪声音，还有模糊的人影在墓地周围走动。我派出了卫兵去调查，但都空手而归。我们已经和亚历山德拉谈过了，但她向我们保证了那些怪异报告与她可能要进行的阿尔凯仪式没有任何关系。如果你能提供帮助，则不胜感激。 裂谷城总管 安努瑞尔 </font>

translations.english: <font face="$HandwrittenFont">Rune, I've used every source at my disposal and I still can't find a trace of your parents. Whoever they are, they've completely erased themselves from history. This is quite a feat considering the quality of my sources. If I come up with anything else, I'll be certain to contact you. Athel Newberry
translations.chinese: <font face="$HandwrittenFont">符文： 我已动用所有可用资源，但还是没有找到你父母的线索。不管他们到底是谁，他们已经把自己从历史里抹去了。考虑到我资源的质量，这应该是比较可靠的结论了。如果我还能找到别的办法，我一定再联系你。 “鲜莓”艾瑟

translations.english: <font face="$HandwrittenFont">Brynjolf, I'm certain that there's some kind of rival Thieves Guild manifesting itself up here in Windhelm. As soon as things settle down with your own, why don't you send someone up here to investigate? I think you'll find I can open quite a few doors for the Guild once you've reestablished yourselves up here. Remember, friends are difficult to come by these days. Don't disappoint me. Your Friend In The North
translations.chinese: <font face="$HandwrittenFont">布林乔夫： 我能确定目前风舵城有盗贼公会的竞争对手存在。等你手头的事解决了，何不派个人来调查调查？只要你们能在这里重新站稳脚跟，我可以为公会再行些方便。记住，这时候朋友可是很难得的。别让我失望。 北边的朋友

translations.english: <font face="$HandwrittenFont">Brynjolf, This Goldenglow Estate situation is getting out of hand. I want you to find someone capable to take care of it. Maven Black-Briar is breathing down my neck and I just can't have that right now. Send Vex if you have to, but I want it handled immediately. Mercer
translations.chinese: <font face="$HandwrittenFont">布林乔夫， 金色光辉庄园情势已然失控。你去找个能搞定这事的人。玛雯·黑棘盯得我受不了。如果你觉得有必要，就派小烦过去。但你立刻把这事处理干净。 墨瑟

translations.english: <font face="$HandwrittenFont">These chests are for practice use only. Please refrain from using them for storage. The locks on these chests have been specially constructed to reset themselves after a short amount of time. If you have any issues, please speak to Niruin.
translations.chinese: <font face="$HandwrittenFont">这些箱子仅供练习使用。请勿用于私人储蓄。箱子上的锁经过特殊设计，短时间内就会自动重置。有任何问题，请联系尼鲁因。

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>Mercer, I'd consider it a personal favor if I could once again utilize Cynric's unique skills for a delicate situation in the Cidha Mines. A close friend has been incarcerated in that horrible place, and I should like him freed as soon as possible. I'd recommend Cynric avoid the Forsworn element that's prevalent within the mine and stick to as simple an escape plan as possible.</font>
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>墨瑟： 不知我是否有荣幸能再度借用希利克的绝技来应对希讷矿场的微妙情况。我的一个好友被关在那鬼地方，我希望他能早点被放出来。建议希利克避开矿场里流行的弃誓者风气，尽量制定简单点的逃跑计划。</font>

I'd recommend Cynric avoid the Forsworn element that's prevalent within the mine and stick to as simple an escape plan as possible.</font> | ZH: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>墨瑟： 不知我是否有荣幸能再度借用希利克的绝技来应对希讷矿场的微妙情况。我的一个好友被关在那鬼地方，我希望他能早点被放出来。建议希利克避开矿场里流行的弃誓者风气，尽量制定简单点的逃跑计划。</font> | SID: 010BB9

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>Mercer, I've pressed our contact at the East Empire Company for information, but that lizard's as stubborn as he is careless. He claims the company has nothing to offer, but I think he's hiding something. I'd suggest that you refrain from having him visited by the Brotherhood for now. He may yet be of some use to us.
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'>墨瑟： 我已经向咱们在东帝国公司的线人打听过了，但那个蜥蜴既固执还粗心。他坚称公司没有提供什么，但我觉得他在故意隐瞒。建议暂时不要找兄弟会。留着他也许还有些用处。

translations.english: Pay me? You think this is about money?
translations.chinese: 给钱？你以为是钱的问题？

translations.english: Have you seen the man? He's completely out of his head. A jester? Here, in Skyrim? Ain't been a merryman in these parts for a hundred years.
translations.chinese: 没看到那个人吗？完全失智了。小丑？在天际？这里一百年没来过滑稽艺人了。

translations.english: He could have anything in there. War contraband. Weapons. Skooma. Ain't no way I'm getting involved in any of that.
translations.chinese: 他可能在里面夹带任何东西。战争违禁品。武器。斯库玛。我可不想扯进这种事里。

translations.english: And he's transporting some giant box. Says it's a coffin, and he's going to bury his mother. Mother my eye.
translations.chinese: 看他在运的那个大箱子。说是棺材，要给母亲下葬。信他就见鬼了。

translations.english: So why not help him? I'm sure he'll pay you.
translations.chinese: 所以为什么不帮他一把呢？我确信他会付钱的。

translations.english: Khajiit are a feline race native to Elsweyr. It is infamous for producing Moon Sugar, which can be refined into Skooma.
translations.chinese: 卡吉特是艾斯维尔的类猫种族。那里因生产可以提炼斯库玛的月亮糖而臭名昭著。

translations.english: Orcs, also known as Orsimer, are natives of Orsinium, a small mountain kingdom between Hammerfell and Skyrim. It has been sacked and rebuilt many times.
translations.chinese: 兽人，又称奥辛莫，是奥辛纽姆的原住民。那里是位于落锤与天际之间的山地小国。已经被毁弃与重建多次。

translations.english: "Tradition has it that the Nords came to Tamriel from the continent of Atmora in ancient days." -- Unknown, Pocket Guide to the Empire
translations.chinese: “传统说法认为，古时候诺德人从阿特莫拉大陆来到了泰姆瑞尔。”——《泰姆瑞尔袖珍指南》，佚名

translations.english: "Out of this time also rose one of the most legendary of all Tamrielic figures, Ysgramor, from whom all Nordic kings to this day are descended." -- Unknown, Pocket Guide to the Empire

translations.english: Daedric princes are god-like beings that inhabit the plane of Oblivion. Most are considered evil, forcing their worshippers to build their shrines far from civilized places.
translations.chinese: 迪德拉君王是居住在湮灭位面的神般存在。他们大多数被视为邪恶的，这迫使他们的信仰者不得不把他们的祭坛建在远离文明的地方。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: LoreSkyrim04
Translations:
- LSCR:DESC | EN: Daedric princes are god-like beings that inhabit the plane of Oblivion. Most are considered evil, forcing their worshippers to build their shrines far from civilized places. | ZH: 迪德拉君王是居住在湮灭位面的神般存在。他们大多数被视为邪恶的，这迫使他们的信仰者不得不把他们的祭坛建在远离文明的地方。 | SID: 011648

translations.english: "The best techniques are passed on by the survivors." -- Gaiden Shinji, 1E 490
translations.chinese: “最好的技术都是由幸存者们代代传流的。”——盖登·辛吉，1E490年

translations.english: Tiber Septim brought peace to Tamriel in 2E 896, by conquering all of the known world. Thus began the Third Era.
translations.chinese: 2E896年，泰伯·塞普汀征服了整个已知世界，为泰姆瑞尔带来了和平。第三纪元就此开始。

translations.english: The War of the Red Diamond began in 3E 121 when Uriel III captured the throne with his mother, Queen Potema. It ended in 3E 127 with their defeat at the Siege of Solitude.
translations.chinese: 红钻战争开始于3E121，尤瑞尔三世与他的母亲王后波特玛夺取皇位。结束于3E127，他们在独孤城包围战中战败。

translations.english: Pelagius III, also known as Pelagius the Mad, was Jarl of Solitude before ascending to the throne of the Emperor in 3E 145.
translations.chinese: 佩拉吉奥斯三世，又称“疯子”佩拉吉奥斯，在他于3E145登上皇帝宝座前，是独孤城的领主。

translations.english: In 3E 389 Emperor Uriel VII was imprisoned by his Imperial Battlemage, Jagar Tharn, who then impersonated him for years.
translations.chinese: 3E389年，皇帝尤瑞尔七世被他的帝国战斗法师贾伽·萨恩囚禁了。其后，贾加·萨恩扮成他的模样很多年。

translations.english: The Fourth Era began 200 years ago when Martin Septim sacrificed himself to save the world from the Oblivion Crisis.
translations.chinese: 第四纪元开始于200年前，当时马丁·塞普汀自我牺牲，将世界从湮灭危机中拯救了出来。

translations.english: Wood Elves, also known as Bosmer, are natives of Valenwood. This jungle nation is home to giant, migratory trees that house their cities.
translations.chinese: 木精灵，又称波斯莫，是威伦森林的原住民。威伦森林这个丛林国度是移动巨树的家园，为波斯莫提供了建造城市的住所。

EDID: MagicSoulTrap
Translations:
- LSCR:DESC | EN: Cast Soul Trap on an enemy during combat, and his soul will be captured in one of your empty soul gems, when he dies. | ZH: 在战斗中对敌人施放摄魂陷阱后，当敌人死亡，他的灵魂会被捕捉到你持有的空灵魂石中。 | SID: 001C17

translations.english: A Magic Wall spell creates a barrier that hurts anything that moves through it.
translations.chinese: 魔法墙法术可以制造一个伤害通过者的屏障。

agentText:

EDID: MagicWalls

translations.english: A magical Ward protects the caster from offensive spells, but takes a few seconds to charge up to full power.
translations.chinese: 魔法结界可以保护施法者免受攻击类法术的伤害，但需要几秒钟来充满能量。

translations.english: I have joined the College of Winterhold, and after a tour of the grounds need to find Tolfdir, who looks after the new Apprentices.
translations.chinese: 我已经加入了冬堡学院，在完成参观之后，我要去找负责照看新学徒的托夫迪尔。

translations.english: I have joined the College of Winterhold. Mirabelle Ervine has agreed to show me around in order to become familiar with the grounds.
translations.chinese: 我已经加入了冬堡学院，米拉贝勒·厄文同意带我参观并熟悉场地。

translations.english: I've been allowed to join the College of Winterhold, and need to find Mirablle Ervine for a tour of the grounds.
translations.chinese: 我获得了进入冬堡学院的资格，我要去找米拉贝勒·厄文带我参观校园。

translations.english: In order to join the College of Winterhold, I need to show I'm capable of simple magic by casting Healing Hands on Nirya at the entrance to the College.
translations.chinese: 我需要施放一次治愈之触来证明自己有能力使用简单的魔法，以此获准进入冬堡学院。

translations.english: In order to join the College of Winterhold, I need to show I'm capable of simple magic by casting a Fear spell.
translations.chinese: 我需要施放一次恐惧术来证明自己有能力使用简单的魔法，以此获准进入冬堡学院。

translations.english: In order to join the College of Winterhold, I need to show I'm capable of simple magic by casting a Firebolt spell.
translations.chinese: 我需要施放一次火矢术来证明自己有能力使用简单的魔法，以此获准进入冬堡学院。

translations.english: In order to join the College of Winterhold, I need to show I'm capable of simple magic by summoning a Flame Atronach.
translations.chinese: 我需要召唤一只火焰侍灵来证明自己有能力使用简单的魔法，以此获准进入冬堡学院。

translations.english: In order to join the College of Winterhold, I need to show I'm capable of simple magic by casting a Magelight spell..
translations.chinese: 我需要施放一次魔光术来证明自己有能力使用简单的魔法，以此获准进入冬堡学院。

translations.english: I've found the College of Winterhold, where mages study the arcane arts in Skyrim. If I want to learn more about magic, I'll need to join their ranks.
translations.chinese: 我找到了冬堡学院，法师在那里研习天际的奥术技艺。如果我想了解更多魔法知识，我需要加入他们的行列。

translations.english: After joining the College of Winterhold and speaking with Tolfdir, I've learned a bit about wards and will be accompanying some of the others on an expedition.
translations.chinese: 在加入冬堡学院并和托夫迪尔交谈后，我学习了一些结界知识，并将和其他人一起参加一次探险活动。

translations.english: While in an unexplored area of Saarthal, I received a vision from someone in the Psijic Order saying there's something dangerous in Saarthal. Despite this, Tolfdir wishes to forge ahead and has asked that I follow him.
translations.chinese: 当我们探索萨瑟尔的未开发区域时，我收到了来自赛伊克教团的幻象示警，说萨瑟尔有危险的东西。尽管如此，托夫迪尔还是希望继续前进，并要求我跟着他。

translations.english: While exploring the excavation in Saarthal, I somehow triggered some sort of trap. It has revealed an unexplored section of the ruins, and Tolfdir would like me to follow him further in.
translations.chinese: 在我协助萨瑟尔发掘工作时，我无意触发了某种陷阱。由此发现了未被探索过的遗迹，托夫迪尔希望我能和他一起进一步深入。

translations.english: In the College excavation at Saarthal, I've been asked to assist Arniel Gane with his work uncovering the ruins.
translations.chinese: 在学院发掘萨瑟尔的工作中，我被派去协助阿内尔·甘进行遗迹发掘。

translations.english: Tolfdir has asked the Apprentices to meet him at Saarthal, the site of an ongoing excavation by the College.
translations.chinese: 托夫迪尔要求学徒们在萨瑟尔集合，学院正在那里进行挖掘。

translations.english: While helping in the excavation in Saarthal by gathering enchanted items, I somehow triggered some sort of trap. It has revealed an unexplored section of the ruins, and Tolfdir would like me to follow him further in.
translations.chinese: 在我协助萨瑟尔发掘工作，收集附魔物品的时候，我无意触发了某种陷阱。由此发现了未被探索过的遗迹，托夫迪尔希望我能和他一起进一步深入。

translations.english: Tolfdir has decided to take us to investigate the ruins of Saarthal to explore the more practical uses of magic.
translations.chinese: 托夫迪尔决定带我们去考察萨瑟尔遗迹，探索魔法的更实际用途。

translations.english: I've been asked to assist Arniel Gane in his work at the excavation in Saarthal by collecting enchanted objects scattered around the ruins.
translations.chinese: 我被派去协助阿内尔·甘收集散布在遗迹各处的附魔物品。

translations.english: While following Tolfdir through an unexplored section of Saarthal, a vision from the Psijic Order has suggested that something has been set in motion by the exploration of Saarthal. Tolfdir should be warned.
translations.chinese: 当我跟随托夫迪尔穿过萨瑟尔一片未被探索的区域时，一个自称来自赛伊克教团的幻象称萨瑟尔的探索开启了一些事件。我应该警告托夫迪尔。

translations.english: During an expedition to Saarthal, I uncovered a new section of the ruins, and was warned by a vision from someone in the Psijic Order of danger within. Despite this, Tolfdir and I have explored further and found a strange orb buried deep within Saarthal. Tolfdir has asked that I take news of the discovery to the Arch-Mage.
translations.chinese: 在探索萨瑟尔的时候，我发现了遗迹的一个新区域，并收到了来自赛伊克教团的幻象示警。尽管如此，我和托夫迪尔仍进行了进一步探索，发现了一个深埋萨瑟尔地下的奇怪球体。托夫迪尔让我把消息告诉大法师。

translations.english: I've delivered word to the Arch-Mage that something interesting was found deep within Saarthal.
translations.chinese: 我已经向大法师报告了在萨瑟尔深处发现的有趣物体。
和托夫迪尔谈谈影像的事
在萨瑟尔外与托夫迪尔见面

translations.english: Use the Saarthal Amulet to escape the trap
translations.chinese: 利用萨瑟尔护符逃离陷阱

translations.english: I've been asked to find more information on the object found in Saarthal. Urag suggested that useful books may have been stolen from the Arcanaeum by Othorn, a former Apprentice at the College. His last known location was Fellglow Keep.
translations.chinese: 我被派去寻找更多关于萨瑟尔发现物的信息。乌拉格觉得有用的书被学院曾经的学徒奥拓恩偷走了。他最后出现于光落堡垒。

translations.english: I was asked to find books that may have information about the object discovered in Saarthal, and traveled to Fellglow Keep to retrieve them from Orthorn, a former Apprentice at the College. I've found the books and now need to see them returned to the College.
translations.chinese: 我被派去找回可能有关萨瑟尔发现物信息的书籍。我在光落堡垒从学院前学徒奥拓恩那里把书取了回来。现在要把取回的书送回学院。

translations.english: Since Tolfdir is not available, I've been asked by Mirabelle Ervine to look into information on the object we found in Saarthal by talking to Urag gro-Shub in the Arcanaeum.
translations.chinese: 由于托夫迪尔不在，米拉贝勒·厄文让我到秘藏馆找乌拉格·格洛-舒布看看有没有萨瑟尔发现物的信息。

translations.english: With Tolfdir still occupied in Saarthal, I need to speak to Mirabelle Ervine to find out about researching the discovery in Saarthal.
translations.chinese: 由于托夫迪尔仍待在萨瑟尔，我得和米拉贝勒·厄文谈谈，找出研究萨瑟尔发现物的办法。

translations.english: I've freed Orthorn from Fellglow Keep, and he has offered to help me find the books I'm looking for.
translations.chinese: 我把奥拓恩从光落堡垒放了出来，他说要帮我找到我要的书。

translations.english: In attempting to track down books that may have information about Saarthal, I've been exploring Fellglow Keep and have located Orthorn, the former apprentice who stole the books in the first place. He's now a prisoner, and has begged me to free him.
translations.chinese: 为了找到可能有萨瑟尔信息的书籍，我在光落堡垒找到了当初盗书的前学徒奥拓恩。他现在被关了起来，求我放他出去。

translations.english: I've returned to the College with the books from Fellglow Keep. One of the books, "Night of Tears", has some information about Saarthal that Urag found very interesting.
translations.chinese: 我带着从光落堡垒找到的书返回学院。其中一本名为《泪之夜》的书有关于萨瑟尔的信息，乌拉格觉得非常有趣。
与乌拉格·格洛-舒布交谈

translations.english: Night of Tears Dranor Seleth Saarthal holds a prominent place in Skyrim history, even if most do not remember it by name. It is of course the site of one of the first major Nord settlements, one of the first cities of men in Skyrim, and the earliest known capital of their civilization. It was also the site of terrible bloodshed, when the elves attempted to drive the Nords out of Skyrim, to succeed only in incurring their wrath in the form of Ysgramor and his fabled Five Hundred Companions, who swept the elves from Skyrim and firmly established it as the home of the Nords. All this is known, but little else. What happened on that Night of Tears, when Saarthal was razed to the ground? What provoked the elves to such a deliberate, vicious attack, and what prompted such a severe response from the Nords? Vingalmo's Treatise on the Altmer Antecedent suggests that the elves of the Merethic Era, along with their counterparts the early Dwemer, possessed a degree of sophistication unparalleled in Tamriel. They displayed power beyond what could be expected of the time. While a distinct explanation is not given for this, I believe that this work, compared with the early writings of Heseph Chirirnis, suggest that something greater was at work on that night in Saarthal. The true motives behind the Night of Tears have been obscured to us by the passage of time, but I believe this was not a simple war of territory, or of control of Skyrim. I believe that what happened was a significant event based around something very particular. The Nords found something when they built their city, buried deep in the ground. They attempted to keep it buried, but the elves learned of it and coveted it for themselves. Thus they assaulted Saarthal, their goal not to drive the Nords out but to secure this power for themselves. I believe Ysgramor knew something of what the elves would find under Saarthal, and rallied together his people to keep the elves from gaining it. When Nords once again controlled Skyrim, this power was buried deep below the earth and sealed away. Time has kept this knowledge from us, but it is my hope that Time will also reveal the truth of these words. Every effort will be made to relocate Saarthal, and find that which has been lost to us.
translations.chinese: 泪之夜 德拉诺·塞勒斯 即使大多人早已记不得这个名字，但萨瑟尔在天际历史中却仍占有重要地位。这里无疑是诺德最早的定居地之一，也是天际中最早的人类城市之一，和他们文明已知最早的首都。这里还是可怕流血事件的发生地，精灵试图将诺德人赶出天际，换来的是传说中伊斯格拉默五百战友的怒火。他们将精灵扫出天际，并把这里确立为诺德的家园。 这些是众所周知的，但除此外甚少。在萨瑟尔被夷为平地的泪之夜到底发生了什么？是什么刺激了精灵发起如此恶毒的蓄意袭击，又使得诺德人给出如此强烈的反击？ 文嘉莫的《论傲特莫先祖》表明，精灵纪元的精灵与其锻莫同胞，拥有着泰姆瑞尔无法比拟的渊博学识，表现出超出时代预期的力量。虽然对此没有明确解释，我相信与希瑟弗·奇里尼斯的早期著作相比，这个作品表明，萨瑟尔的那个夜晚有更强大之物发挥了作用。 随着时间流逝，泪之夜背后真正的动机已经不为人知，但我相信这不只是一场简单的领地战争，或对天际控制权的争夺。我认为发生了一起极其特殊的重大事件。 诺德人在建造他们的城市时发现了一些深埋于地下的东西。他们试图将其继续掩埋，但精灵得到了消息，渴望得到它。因此他们袭击了萨瑟尔，目的不是为了赶走诺德人而是确保自己获得这种力量。我相信伊斯格拉默知晓精灵会在萨瑟尔城下找到什么，并集结了他的人民来阻止它落于精灵之手。当诺德人再次掌控了天际后，这种力量被深埋于地下且就此封存。 时间让我们对此无知，但我希望时间也能揭开这些言语背后的真相。我等将竭尽所能去重新定位萨瑟尔，找到失落之物。

translations.english:
[pagebreak]

The Last King of the Ayleids by Herminia Cinna

[pagebreak]

he Ayleids, or Heartland High Elves, ruled Cyrodiil in the long ages of Myth before the beginning of recorded history. One of the earliest recorded dates, in fact, is the Fall of White Gold Tower in 1E 243, which is commonly assumed to mark the end of the Ayleids. Although Ayleid rule over all of Cyrodiil was indeed broken in 1E 243, this was only one of the most obvious stages near the end of a long decline. The first two centuries of the First Era saw increasing strife between the great Ayleid lords of Cyrodiil. Alessia appears to have taken advantage of a period of civil war to launch her uprising. Imperial historians have traditionally attributed her victory to intervention from Skyrim, but it appears that she had at least as much help from rebel Ayleid lords during the siege of White Gold Tower. The popular image of the Ayleids as brutal slavemasters is based in fact, of course, but it is less well-known that a number of Ayleid princes continued to rule parts of Cyrodiil after 263, as vassals of the new Empress of Cyrodiil. This suggests either that Ayleid rule was not universally detested, or that Alessia and her successors were more pragmatic than is traditionally believed, or perhaps some of both. In any event, excavations at a number of Ayleid sites show continued occupation and even expansion during the so-called Late Ayleid Period (1E 243 - c. 498). At first, many Ayleid lords continued to rule as vassals of the new human regime. In some cases, Ayleid supporters of Alessia were even rewarded with new lands taken from slain enemies. It is not clear to what extent human slavery continued under the Cyrodilic Empire. Humans continued to dwell in the Ayleid-ruled areas of Cyrodiil, but there is nothing definitive to show under what terms. This was an uneasy relationship from the beginning, and was not destined to last long. Resentment at the continued presence of Ayleid nobles within the Empire was a contributing factor to the rise of the so-called Alessian Order founded by Maruhk. The first victims of the Alessians were the Ayleids of Cyrodiil. In the early 300s, the surviving Ayleid communities in human-ruled areas were obliterated one by one, the refugees temporarily swelling the power of the remaining Ayleid lordships. Then in 361, the Alessians gained control of the Empire and enforced the Alessian Doctrines throughout its domain. The Ayleid lordships were abolished. Enforcement of this decree does not appear to have required much direct violence -- it seems that by this point the balance of power was so overwhelmingly against them, and their fate so long foreshadowed, that most of the remaining Ayleids simply left Cyrodiil, eventually being absorbed into the Elven populations of Valenwood and High Rock. Indeed, the rise of the Direnni Hegemony may be linked to this exodus of Ayleids from Cyrodiil (a connection so far little studied by historians). Still, a remnant Ayleid population seems to have survived the rule of the Alessians, because we hear of "the last king of the Ayleids" joining the battle of Glenumbria Moors where the Dirennis decisively defeated the Alessians in 482. How this king's people survived the preceding century is unknown. We do not even know who they were, although recent research points to Nenalata as the possible resting place of this "last king." Unfortunately, in the current state of the Empire, funds are no longer available for proper scientific investigation of such extensive ruins, so the answer to these questions will have to be left to future generations.

[pagebreak]

最后的亚历德王 赫米尼亚·辛纳 著

[pagebreak]

亚历德，或称腹地高精灵，早在有记录的历史开始前的长远神话中就统治着希罗帝尔。事实上，最早受记载的日期之一是第一纪元243年的白金塔陷落，一般认为此事件标志着亚历德时代的落幕。 虽说亚历德对整个希罗帝尔的统治确实在第一纪元243年破灭，但这不过是一段漫长衰退将告终结时表露得最为显著的一个阶段罢了。在第一纪元的前两世纪，希罗帝尔的各大亚历德领主间的冲突就不断升级。阿莱西亚乘内战之机发动了起义。传统上，帝国史家总将她的成功归因于天际的介入，然而在围攻白金塔期间，她似乎还从亚历德叛乱领主处得到了不少帮助。 公众对于亚历德的主流印象，就是一伙蛮横残暴的奴隶主。当然了，这的确是基于事实的，但鲜为人知的是，243年后尚有一定数量的亚历德君王作为希罗帝尔新女皇的封臣统治着希罗帝尔的部分地区。该状况表明，要么亚历德的统治并未面临着普遍的怨恨，要么阿莱西亚及其继任者比传统观点所认为的更趋务实，或两者兼而有之。 不论如何，关于一系列亚历德遗迹的发掘工作展示着，在所谓的亚历德统治晚期（第一纪元243年—498年），仍有一些亚历德接续占据、乃至扩张了自己的地盘。首先，许多亚历德领主甘当新人类政权的附庸，从而得以继续统治。在某些情况下，阿莱西亚的亚历德支持者们甚至能从被诛灭的敌方手中夺得的新领土作为奖励。尚不清楚在希罗帝尔帝国治下，人类奴隶制在如何程度上接续存在。人类仍继续居住在亚历德所统治的希罗帝尔地区，但对此，并无确切的证据能展现他们是生活在何种条件下。 从一开始，这便是一种不稳定的对立关系，也注定不会长久。对帝国内部仍有亚历德贵族存续这一状况的怨恨，是马鲁克创立的所谓“阿莱西亚教团”崛起的促成因素。阿莱西亚教团手下的首批受害者便是希罗帝尔的亚历德。第一纪元三世纪早期，残居于人类势力领域内的亚历德族居住地被一个接一个地毁灭。迅速逃亡的亚历德难民们暂时壮大了残余亚历德贵族的势力。 361年，阿莱西亚教团取得了控制全帝国的权柄，且在帝国全境推行阿莱西亚教义。亚历德领主制度被废除。实行该项法令看似并不需要太多直接性暴力。看起来，在这一点上，这种国家层面的强大力量于彼等而言是压倒性的，他们的命运也已昭示，绝大多数亚历德遗民都干脆地背井离乡，把希罗帝尔抛在身后，最终被威伦森林和高岩省的精灵住民吸纳同化。事实上，迪伦尼霸权的雄起可能与这次希罗帝尔的亚历德大逃亡有所关联（迄今为止，史家们仍很少研究其联系）。 虽说如此，仍有些残存的亚历德族人得以在阿莱西亚教团的统治下幸存下来。毕竟，我们曾听闻在482年，“最后的亚历德王”参与了格林纳巴荒野会战，帮助迪伦尼方决定性地击溃了阿莱西亚教团。这位国王的子民究竟如何在过往的百年间生还下来仍不得而知。我们甚至不知晓他们是谁，尽管新近研究指出，尼纳拉塔可能是这位“末王”的长眠之所。很不幸，在帝国目前的状态下，已无足够的经费可支持针对如此广阔的遗迹开展科学调研活动了。因此，我们只能将这些问题留给后人解答。

translations.english: The Last King of the Ayleids

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim EDID: MG03Book02 Translations: - BOOK:DESC | EN: [pagebreak]

The Last King of the Ayleids by Herminia Cinna

[pagebreak]

he Ayleids, or Heartland High Elves, ruled Cyrodiil in the long ages of Myth before the beginning of recorded history. One of the earliest recorded dates, in fact, is the Fall of White Gold Tower in 1E 243, which is commonly assumed to mark the end of the Ayleids. Although Ayleid rule over all of Cyrodiil was indeed broken in 1E 243, this was only one of the most obvious stages near the end of a long decline. The first two centuries of the First Era saw increasing strife between the great Ayleid lords of Cyrodiil. Alessia appears to have taken advantage of a period of civil war to launch her uprising. Imperial historians have traditionally attributed her victory to intervention from Skyrim, but it appears that she had at least as much help from rebel Ayleid lords during the siege of White Gold Tower. The popular image of the Ayleids as brutal slavemasters is based in fact, of course, but it is less well-known that a number of Ayleid princes continued to rule parts of Cyrodiil after 263, as vassals of the new Empress of Cyrodiil. This suggests either that Ayleid rule was not universally detested, or that Alessia and her successors were more pragmatic than is traditionally believed, or perhaps some of both. In any event, excavations at a number of Ayleid sites show continued occupation and even expansion during the so-called Late Ayleid Period (1E 243 - c. 498). At first, many Ayleid lords continued to rule as vassals of the new human regime. In some cases, Ayleid supporters of Alessia were even rewarded with new lands taken from slain enemies. It is not clear to what extent human slavery continued under the Cyrodilic Empire. Humans continued to dwell in the Ayleid-ruled areas of Cyrodiil, but there is nothing definitive to show under what terms. This was an uneasy relationship from the beginning, and was not destined to last long. Resentment at the continued presence of Ayleid nobles within the Empire was a contributing factor to the rise of the so-called Alessian Order founded by Maruhk. The first victims of the Alessians were the Ayleids of Cyrodiil. In the early 300s, the surviving Ayleid communities in human-ruled areas were obliterated one by one, the refugees temporarily swelling the power of the remaining Ayleid lordships. Then in 361, the Alessians gained control of the Empire and enforced the Alessian Doctrines throughout its domain. The Ayleid lordships were abolished. Enforcement of this decree does not appear to have required much direct violence -- it seems that by this point the balance of power was so overwhelmingly against them, and their fate so long foreshadowed, that most of the remaining Ayleids simply left Cyrodiil, eventually being absorbed into the Elven populations of Valenwood and High Rock. Indeed, the rise of the Direnni Hegemony may be linked to this exodus of Ayleids from Cyrodiil (a connection so far little studied by historians). Still, a remnant Ayleid population seems to have survived the rule of the Alessians, because we hear of "the last king of the Ayleids" joining the battle of Glenumbria Moors where the Dirennis decisively defeated the Alessians in 482. How this king's people survived the preceding century is unknown. We do not even know who they were, although recent research points to Nenalata as the possible resting place of this "last king." Unfortunately, in the current state of the Empire, funds are no longer available for proper scientific investigation of such extensive ruins, so the answer to these questions will have to be left to future generations. | ZH: [pagebreak]

translations.english:
[pagebreak]

ON ARTAEUM By Taurce il-Anselma

[pagebreak] [pagebreak]

he Isle of Artaeum (ar-TAY-um) is the third largest island in the Summurset archipelago, located south of the Moridunon village of Potansa and west of the mainland village of Runcibae. It is best known for being home to the Psijic Order, perhaps the oldest monastic group in Tamriel. The earliest written record of Psijics is from the 20th year of the First Era and tells the tale of the renowned Breton sage and author Voernet, traveling to the Isle of Artaeum to meet with Iachesis, the Ritemaster of the Psijics. Even then, the Psijics were the counsellors of kings and proponents of the "Elder Way," taught to them by the original race that inhabited Tamriel. The Elder Way is a philosophy of meditation and study said to bind the forces of nature to the individual will. It differs from magicka in origin, but the effects are much the same. That said, it is perhaps more than coincidence that the Isle of Artaeum literally vanished from the shores of Summurset at the beginning of the Second Era at about the time of the founding of the Mages Guild in Tamriel. Various historians and scholars have published theories about this, but perhaps none but Iachesis and his own could shed light on the matter. Five hundred years passed and Artaeum returned. The Psijics on the Isle consisted of persons, mostly Elves, who had disappeared and were presumed dead in the Second Era. They could not or would not offer any explanation for Artaeum's whereabouts during that time, or the fate of Iachesis and the original council of Artaeum. Currently, the Psijics are led by the Loremaster Celarus, who has presided over the Council of Artaeum for the last two hundred and fifty years. The Council's influence in Tamrielan politics is tidal. The kings of Summurset, particularly those of Moridunon, have often sought the Psijics' opinion. Emperor Uriel V was much influenced by the Council in the early, most glorious parts of his reign, before his disastrous attack on Akavir. It has even been suggested that the fleet of King Orghum of Pyandonea was destroyed by a joint effort of Emperor Antiochus and the Psijic Order. The last four emperors, Uriel VI, Morihatha, Pelagius IV, and Uriel VII, have been suspicious of the Psijics enough to refuse ambassadors from the Isle of Artaeum within the Imperial City. The Isle of Artaeum is difficult to chart geographically. It is said that it shifts continuously either at random or by decree of the Council. Visitors to the island are so rare as to be almost unheard of. Anyone desirous of a meeting with a Psijic may find contacts in Potansa and Runcibae as well as many of the kingdoms of Summurset. Were it more accessible, Artaeum would be a favored destination for travelers. I have been to the Isle once and still dream of its idyllic orchards and clear pastures, its still and silent lagoons, its misty woodlands, and the unique Psijic architecture that seems to be as natural as its surroundings as well as wondrous in its own right. The Ceporah Tower in particular I would study, for it is a relic from a civilization that predates the High Elves by several hundred years and is still used in certain rites by the Psijics. Perhaps one day I might return. [Note: The author is currently on the Isle of Artaeum by gracious consent of Master Sargenius of the Council of Artaeum.]
translations.chinese:
[pagebreak]

论阿塔姆 陶尔斯·伊-安塞尔玛 著

[pagebreak] [pagebreak]

阿塔姆岛（发音为ar-TAY-um），是夏暮群岛的第三大岛，位于波坦萨的莫里度诺村南侧、大陆的朗希巴村西侧。以其为赛伊克教团所在地而闻名。赛伊克教团可能是全泰姆瑞尔最为古老的修士团体。 关于赛伊克的最早的书面记载是第一纪20年代间的一则故事，描述德高望重的布莱顿贤者兼作家沃尔奈特，他南旅阿塔姆岛拜访赛伊克教团的时任仪式大师——艾克西斯。 彼时的赛伊克已是诸王的顾问，还是一群 “古道”的支持者。那是泰姆瑞尔的原住种族教授给他们的冥想与研究的哲学，据说是将自然力量与个人意志相结合。它与魔力起源不同，但效果相近。 在第二纪元开始时，阿塔姆岛如字面意思所述的那样从夏暮岛海岸线处消隐无踪了，而同期发生了法师公会在泰姆瑞尔大陆建立这件大事，这可能并非巧合。无数史家和学者就此事提出各种各样的理论假说，但可能除艾克西斯本人外无人能阐明此事的真相。 五百年过去，阿塔姆岛回来了。岛上那群多数由精灵组成的赛伊克法师均在第二纪元消隐无踪，并被那时的世人推定已然死亡。他们不能或是不想就这段空白期内阿塔姆岛的下落、或是艾克西斯和阿塔姆最初的议会的命运给出任何解释。 目前，赛伊克由博学大师凯勒瑞斯领导。他在过去250年里主持着阿塔姆议会。议会对泰姆瑞尔政局造成的影响时有起伏。夏暮岛诸王，特别是莫里度诺的几位，时常问政于赛伊克。皇帝尤瑞尔五世在位早期，也就是他开展对阿卡维尔的那次灾难性远征之前的黄金期，就受益于议会的巨大影响。甚至有流言称，派安多尼亚之王奥格哈姆的舰队其实是被安条克皇帝和赛伊克联合击破的。但最近四任皇帝——尤瑞尔六世、莫里哈萨、佩拉吉奥斯四世和尤瑞尔七世，却对赛伊克持怀疑态度，乃至拒绝阿塔姆岛使节进驻帝都。 很难在地理图册上标注阿塔姆岛的所在点。传闻其确切位置始终在变迁，或是出于随机性，或是出于议会的号令。罕有访客能真的登岛，甚至基本没多少确凿的登陆记载。任何人如想拜会赛伊克，都可以去波坦萨、朗希巴，以及夏暮群岛诸国寻得他们的对外联络人。 如果真的能轻易抵达，那阿塔姆必然成为游客们的首选。我曾一度登岛，现今仍能在梦中走过那有如田园诗中描绘的百果园、旷人心胸的牧野、依然静谧的泻湖、山雾缭绕的林场，还有那独树一帜的赛伊克风格建筑，它看起来拥有和周围环境融为一体般的自然，却又有自身的奇妙之处。岛上的塞波拉塔是我探求的重点对象，因为它是某个文明的遗迹，其起源比高精灵还要早几百年，至今仍用于赛伊克的某些仪式。或许未来某一天我会回到那里加以探索。 [注：作者目前在阿塔姆岛上——由阿塔姆议会的萨尔格纽斯大师热情地迎允他登岛。]

论阿塔姆 陶尔斯·伊-安塞尔玛 著

[pagebreak] [pagebreak]

阿塔姆岛（发音为ar-TAY-um），是夏暮群岛的第三大岛，位于波坦萨的莫里度诺村南侧、大陆的朗希巴村西侧。以其为赛伊克教团所在地而闻名。赛伊克教团可能是全泰姆瑞尔最为古老的修士团体。 关于赛伊克的最早的书面记载是第一纪20年代间的一则故事，描述德高望重的布莱顿贤者兼作家沃尔奈特，他南旅阿塔姆岛拜访赛伊克教团的时任仪式大师——艾克西斯。 彼时的赛伊克已是诸王的顾问，还是一群 “古道”的支持者。那是泰姆瑞尔的原住种族教授给他们的冥想与研究的哲学，据说是将自然力量与个人意志相结合。它与魔力起源不同，但效果相近。 在第二纪元开始时，阿塔姆岛如字面意思所述的那样从夏暮岛海岸线处消隐无踪了，而同期发生了法师公会在泰姆瑞尔大陆建立这件大事，这可能并非巧合。无数史家和学者就此事提出各种各样的理论假说，但可能除艾克西斯本人外无人能阐明此事的真相。 五百年过去，阿塔姆岛回来了。岛上那群多数由精灵组成的赛伊克法师均在第二纪元消隐无踪，并被那时的世人推定已然死亡。他们不能或是不想就这段空白期内阿塔姆岛的下落、或是艾克西斯和阿塔姆最初的议会的命运给出任何解释。 目前，赛伊克由博学大师凯勒瑞斯领导。他在过去250年里主持着阿塔姆议会。议会对泰姆瑞尔政局造成的影响时有起伏。夏暮岛诸王，特别是莫里度诺的几位，时常问政于赛伊克。皇帝尤瑞尔五世在位早期，也就是他开展对阿卡维尔的那次灾难性远征之前的黄金期，就受益于议会的巨大影响。甚至有流言称，派安多尼亚之王奥格哈姆的舰队其实是被安条克皇帝和赛伊克联合击破的。但最近四任皇帝——尤瑞尔六世、莫里哈萨、佩拉吉奥斯四世和尤瑞尔七世，却对赛伊克持怀疑态度，乃至拒绝阿塔姆岛使节进驻帝都。 很难在地理图册上标注阿塔姆岛的所在点。传闻其确切位置始终在变迁，或是出于随机性，或是出于议会的号令。罕有访客能真的登岛，甚至基本没多少确凿的登陆记载。任何人如想拜会赛伊克，都可以去波坦萨、朗希巴，以及夏暮群岛诸国寻得他们的对外联络人。 如果真的能轻易抵达，那阿塔姆必然成为游客们的首选。我曾一度登岛，现今仍能在梦中走过那有如田园诗中描绘的百果园、旷人心胸的牧野、依然静谧的泻湖、山雾缭绕的林场，还有那独树一帜的赛伊克风格建筑，它看起来拥有和周围环境融为一体般的自然，却又有自身的奇妙之处。岛上的塞波拉塔是我探求的重点对象，因为它是某个文明的遗迹，其起源比高精灵还要早几百年，至今仍用于赛伊克的某些仪式。或许未来某一天我会回到那里加以探索。 [注：作者目前在阿塔姆岛上——由阿塔姆议会的萨尔格纽斯大师热情地迎允他登岛。] | SID: 008BCB - BOOK:FULL | EN: Fragment: On Artaeum | ZH: 文摘：论阿塔姆 | SID: 001D67

translations.english: After speaking with Quaranir from the Psijic Order and being warned of the danger of keeping the Eye of Magnus at the College, I sought out and talked to the Augur of Dunlain, who lives in the Midden underneath the College. The Augur told me that I'll need to find the Staff of Magnus, and to give that information to my superiors immediately.
translations.chinese: 在和赛伊克教团的夸兰尼尔交谈后，我得知玛格努斯之眼留在学院会有危险。我找到了学院秽道里的占卜师杜兰。占卜师告诉我需要找到玛格努斯之杖，让我去向上级汇报。

translations.english: Ancano interrupted my conversation with Tolfdir to insist that I speak with someone claiming to be from the Psijic Order, who is waiting in the Arch-Mage's quarters in the College.
translations.chinese: 安卡诺打断了我和托夫迪尔的谈话，坚持要我去和一个自称来自赛伊克教团的人对话，他正在大法师的住处等着。

translations.english: While discussing the Saarthal orb with Tolfdir, Ancano interrupted and insisted I follow him.
translations.chinese: 当我和托夫迪尔讨论萨瑟尔球体的时候，安卡诺打断了我们的谈话，坚持让我跟他走。

translations.english: Urag has asked me to mention the Night of Tears book to Tolfdir.
translations.chinese: 乌拉格让我向托夫迪尔提一下《泪之夜》这本书。

translations.english: I've been led to the Arch-Mage's quarters by Ancano, who was insistent that I speak to someone claiming to be from the Psijic Order. The monk, named Quaranir, has informed me that the "Eye of Magnus" is dangerous and that to learn how to deal with it, I need to speak with The Augur of Dunlain within the College. I should ask my fellow members where to find him.
translations.chinese: 我被安卡诺带到了大法师的住处，并坚持让我和一个自称赛伊克的人谈谈。僧侣夸兰尼尔告诉我，玛格努斯之眼非常危险，为了让学院知道如何对付它，我需要在学院里找到占卜师杜兰谈谈。我应该去问问同事们在哪儿能找到他。

translations.english: I've mentioned the Night of Tears book to Tolfdir, who seems distracted by the orb from Saarthal, and has some additional thoughts about it.
translations.chinese: 我向托夫迪尔提了《泪之夜》，但他似乎被萨瑟尔带来的球体分散了注意，并且有了一些新想法。

translations.english: After speaking privately with a monk from the Psijic Order, I have been warned that the "Eye of Magnus" is potentially dangerous and must be dealt with. After consulting with the Augur of Dunlain beneath the College, I have brought word to the Arch-Mage that the Staff of Magnus needs to be located.
translations.chinese: 赛伊克教团的僧侣警示我玛格努斯之眼有潜在危险，必须处理。在和学院下面的占卜师杜兰商议后，我给大法师带去消息，要去找回玛格努斯之杖。

translations.english: I've been led to the Arch-Mage's quarters by Ancano, who was insistent that I speak to someone claiming to be from the Psijic Order. The monk, named Quaranir, has informed me that the "Eye of Magnus" is dangerous and that to learn how to deal with it, I need to speak with The Augur of Dunlain within the College. He can be found in the Midden, beneath the College.
translations.chinese: 我被安卡诺带到了大法师的住处，并坚持让我和一个自称赛伊克的人谈谈。僧侣夸兰尼尔告诉我，玛格努斯之眼非常危险，为了让学院知道如何对付它，我需要在学院里找到占卜师杜兰谈谈。我可以到学院的秽道找到他。

- QUST:CNAM [7/7] | EN: After speaking privately with a monk from the Psijic Order, I have been warned that the "Eye of Magnus" is potentially dangerous and must be dealt with. After consulting with the Augur of Dunlain beneath the College, I have brought word to the Arch-Mage that the Staff of Magnus needs to be located. | ZH: 赛伊克教团的僧侣警示我玛格努斯之眼有潜在危险，必须处理。在和学院下面的占卜师杜兰商议后，我给大法师带去消息，要去找回玛格努斯之杖。 | SID: 010B1E
- QUST:CNAM [5/7] | EN: I've been led to the Arch-Mage's quarters by Ancano, who was insistent that I speak to someone claiming to be from the Psijic Order. The monk, named Quaranir, has informed me that the "Eye of Magnus" is dangerous and that to learn how to deal with it, I need to speak with The Augur of Dunlain within the College. He can be found in the Midden, beneath the College. | ZH: 我被安卡诺带到了大法师的住处，并坚持让我和一个自称赛伊克的人谈谈。僧侣夸兰尼尔告诉我，玛格努斯之眼非常危险，为了让学院知道如何对付它，我需要在学院里找到占卜师杜兰谈谈。我可以到学院的秽道找到他。 | SID: 0113CF

translations.english: Ancano has done something to the Eye of Magnus, causing the orb to release incredible amounts of energy, damaging the College and killing the Arch-Mage. The town of Winterhold may be affected as well, and needs to be secured.
translations.chinese: 安卡诺对玛格努斯之眼动了手脚，导致球体内释放出庞大的能量，破坏了学院并害死了大法师。冬堡城镇有可能受到影响，需要尽快保护。

translations.english: Winterhold now appears to be safe from the creatures attacking it. Mirabelle needs to be informed of what's going on.
translations.chinese: 冬堡现在已经从生物的攻击下被保护了起来。米拉贝勒需要知道事情的情况。

translations.english: Ancano has done something to the Eye of Magnus, causing the orb to release incredible amounts of energy, and possibly putting the area in danger. I need to find the Arch-Mage and make sure he's safe.
translations.chinese: 安卡诺对玛格努斯之眼动了手脚，导致球体内释放出庞大的能量，可能会使学院区域出现危险。我得找到大法师，确保他的安全。

translations.english: The town of Winterhold has been secured for now, but the Eye of Magnus cannot be reached and continues to jeopardize the College.
translations.chinese: 冬堡城镇已经安全了，但玛格努斯之眼仍旧在危害学院安全。

translations.english: Paratus Decimius may know the location of the Staff of Magnus, but has asked for my help in completing an experiment in Mzulft. I need to follow him to the top of the ruins.
translations.chinese: 帕拉图斯·德西缪斯应该知道玛格努斯之杖的位置，但他要求我帮忙在姆祖伏特完成一项实验。我要跟着他前往遗迹顶端。

translations.english: Traveling to Mzulft in search of the Synod, I found Paratus Decimius who helped me learn that the Staff of Magnus is located in Labyrinthian. This information needs to get back to Savos Aren at the College immediately.
translations.chinese: 在姆祖伏特寻找希诺的过程中，我找到了帕拉图斯·德西缪斯，他帮我找到了玛格努斯之杖的位置位于迷城。我必须立刻带着消息返回学院汇报给萨沃斯·阿冉。

translations.english: Mirabelle has told me that members of the Synod recently visited the College, mentioning the Staff of Magnus. They were last known to be heading towards Mzulft; they may know more about where to find the staff.
translations.chinese: 米拉贝勒告诉我，希诺成员近期拜访过学院，并提到过玛格努斯之杖。他们的最后目的地是姆祖伏特，他们可能更清楚到哪里去找法杖。

translations.english: I've been asked to speak with Mirabelle Ervine to follow up on the Staff of Magnus.
translations.chinese: 我被派去和米拉贝勒·厄文谈谈玛格努斯之杖的事。

translations.english: Exploring Mzulft while looking for information about the Staff of Magnus, I've encountered Paratus Decimius, the sole surviving member of a Synod expedition. I've found the focusing crystal he needs to finish his experiment, and should return it to him.
translations.chinese: 在寻找玛格努斯之杖的下落时，我在姆祖伏特探险中遇到了希诺远征队的唯一幸存者帕拉图斯·德西缪斯。我找到了他完成实验所需的聚焦水晶，现在该还给他了。

translations.english: After traveling to Mzulft and learning that the Staff of Magnus is located within Labyrinthian, I returned to the College to give the news to Arch-Mage Aren. Aren, however, is more concerned with the Eye of Magnus at the moment, since Ancano has locked himself in the Hall of the Elements with it. I need to help the Arch-Mage reach him at once.
translations.chinese: 在探索姆祖伏特并得知玛格努斯之杖位于迷城之后，我回到学院把消息报告大法师阿冉。但阿冉现在更关心玛格努斯之眼。安卡诺把自己所在元素大厅。我得帮大法师找到他。

translations.english: Paratus Decimius may know the location of the Staff of Magnus, but has asked for my help in completing an experiment in Mzulft. I need to use magic to attenuate Paratus' focusing crystal, and then manipulate the dwarven machinery to line up the beams of light.
translations.chinese: 帕拉图斯·德西缪斯应该知道玛格努斯之杖的位置，但他要求我帮忙完成在姆祖伏特的实验。我需要用魔法来调整帕拉图斯的聚焦水晶，然后操控矮人的机械来排列光束。

translations.english: At Mirabelle's suggestion, I entered the ruins of Mzulft searching for the Synod researchers. I found Paratus Decimius, who appears to be the only surviving member of the Synod expedition, and who has insisted that a "focusing crystal" is necessary to finish his experiment but was stolen by the Falmer.
translations.chinese: 在米拉贝勒的建议下，我进入姆祖伏特遗迹，寻找希诺研究人员。我找到了希诺探险队的唯一幸存者，帕拉图斯·德西缪斯。他坚持认为必须有“聚焦水晶”才能完成实验，但那东西已经被伐莫偷走了。

translations.english: At Mirabelle's suggestion, I entered the ruins of Mzulft searching for the Synod researchers. I found one man who died, and suggested that more people may be inside at something called The Oculory. I should head further into the ruins to see what's going on.
translations.chinese: 在米拉贝勒的建议下，我进入姆祖伏特遗迹，寻找希诺研究人员。我已经发现了一名死了的，我想可能还有更多人在“观测台”。我应该继续往遗迹内部前进，看看发生了什么。

translations.english: After finding the Synod in Mzulft, I learned that the Staff of Magnus can be found in Labyrinthian, and brought this news to the Arch-Mage.
translations.chinese: 我在姆祖伏特找到希诺，得知玛格努斯之杖位于迷城，并把消息告诉了大法师。

translations.english: Place the Crystal into the Oculory
translations.chinese: 将水晶放置在观测台上

translations.english: <font face="$HandwrittenFont"> Attendant Gavros, The Council has become aware of the lack of progress in your group's efforts. They are particularly displeased to learn that your specifications for the focusing crystal were completely incorrect. The entire Binder's Conclave has worked tirelessly, and the Council is quite sure this new crystal will suit your needs. You are herewith entrusted with delivering the crystal to the site, completing your work, and delivering a full report to the Council with all possible haste. The Council trusts you will deliver the crystal to the Oculory personally, and that there will be no further complications. - First Adjunct Oronrel
translations.chinese: <font face="$HandwrittenFont"> 助手加弗罗斯： 议会已察觉到你们小组的努力缺乏进展。他们对你们所写聚焦水晶规格说明错误一事十分不悦。 整个粘合制作组不知疲倦地进行制作，议会非常确信这份新的水晶能够满足你们的需要。我们将委托你把水晶送回研究现场，完成你们的工作，并尽快向议会提交一份完整的报告。 议会相信你能亲自把水晶送到观测台，不要再出现进一步的麻烦了。 ——第一助理 奥伦雷尔

translations.english: The Staff of Magnus has been recovered, and so it's time to assault the College of Winterhold and strike down Ancano.
translations.chinese: 我已经找回了玛格努斯之杖，是时候杀回冬堡学院结果安卡诺了。

translations.english: Ancano has been defeated, but there's still a tremendous amount of energy coming out of the Eye of Magnus. I need to talk to Tolfdir about what to do next.
translations.chinese: 安卡诺被击败了，但仍有大量能量从玛格努斯之眼释放出来。我得和托夫迪尔商量下一步的办法。

translations.english: Ancano has been defeated. The Psijic Monks have removed the Eye of Magnus from the College, saying that the world is not ready for such a thing. With the crisis over, I have been named the new Arch-Mage of the College.
translations.chinese: 安卡诺击败了。赛伊克僧侣将玛格努斯之眼从学院移走，他们说世界还未准备好接受这样的事物。危机结束后，我被任命为学院的新任大法师。

translations.english: The existence of so-called "Doomstones" throughout Skyrim has been repeatedly verified. The meaning of these stones has not.
translations.chinese: 在天际存在所谓“末日石”，这一点已经被反复证实了。这些石头的意义是未知的。

translations.english: Their relative positions do not indicate that any individual stone is part of a larger, unobserved pattern.
translations.chinese: 它们的相对位置也不足以表明它们各个个体之间能组成一个大型的未知图案。

translations.english:
Galerion The Mystic
By Asgrim Kolsgreg


uring the early bloody years of the Second Era, Vanus Galerion was born under the name Trechtus, a serf on the estate of a minor nobleman, Lord Gyrnasse of Sollicich-on-Ker. Trechtus' father and mother were common laborers, but his father had secretly, against the law of Lord Gyrnasse, taught himself and then Trechtus to read. Lord Gyrnasse had been advised that literate serfs were an abomination of nature and dangerous to themselves and their lords, and had closed all bookstalls within Sollicich-on-Ker. All booksellers, poets, and teachers were forbidden, except within Gyrnasse's keep. Nevertheless, a small scale smuggling operation kept a number of books and scrolls in circulation right under Gyrnasse's shadow.

When Trechtus was eight, the smugglers were found and imprisoned. Some said that Trechtus's mother, an ignorant and religious woman fearful of her husband, was the betrayer of the smugglers, but there were other rumors as well. The trial of the smugglers was nonexistant, and the punishment swift. The body of Trechtus' father was kept hanging for weeks during the hottest summer Sollicich-on-Ker had seen in centuries.

Three months later, Trechtus ran away from Lord Gyrnasse's estate. He made it as far as Alinor, half-way across Summerset Isle. A band of troubadours found him nearly dead, curled up in a ditch by the side of the road. They nursed him to health and employed him as an errand boy in return for food and shelter. One of the troubadours, a soothsayer named Heliand, began testing Trechtus' mind and found the boy, though shy, to be preternaturally intelligent and sophisticated given his circumstances. Heliand recognized in the boy a commonality, for Heliand had been trained on the Isle of Artaeum as a mystic.

When the troupe was performing in the village of Potansa on the far eastern end of Summurset, Heliand took Trechtus, then a boy of eleven, to the Isle of Artaeum. The Magister of the Isle, Iachesis, recognized potential in Trechtus and took him on as pupil, giving him the name of Vanus Galarion. Vanus trained his mind on the Isle of Artaeum, as well as his body.

Thus was the first Archmagister of the Mages Guild trained. From the Psijics of the Isle of Artaeum, he received his training. From his childhood of want and injustice, he received his philosophy of sharing knowledge.þeäO
translations.chinese:
秘术师加里兰



于第二纪元初期的血腥年代，瓦努斯·加里兰，以“特雷彻图斯”之名生于索尔利希-昂-克尔，是当地小贵族吉尔纳斯亲王庄园中的农奴。特雷彻图斯的双亲只是平凡的劳苦大众，但他父亲在秘密反抗吉尔纳斯的法令，自学文化并教育特雷彻图斯读写。吉尔纳斯大人曾受进言称，开化的农奴是天生的可憎之物，对他们自身和侍奉的领主来说都是危险的，因此他关停了本地所有书行。除吉尔纳斯自己的要塞外，禁止领地内有书商、诗人和教师。不过，在吉尔纳斯阴影下，仍有小规模走私行动在推动着书籍卷轴流入他的领地。 特雷彻图斯八岁时，走私者们被抓获并监禁。有人说特雷彻图斯的母亲无知且虔诚，而且害怕她的丈夫，于是出卖了走私者们，但也有其他谣传。走私者并未经过审判，就被从速处决了。索尔利希-昂-克尔数世纪以来最炎热的夏天里，特雷彻图斯父亲的遗体被悬吊示众数周。 事隔三个月，特雷彻图斯逃离吉尔纳斯的领地。他一路跋涉到艾琳诺，旅途横跨了半个夏暮岛。当一伙吟游诗人发现他时，他已经蜷缩在路边的沟里几乎要死了。他们看护他直至康复，还雇他当跑腿来换取食物和住所。其中一位兼职预言师的吟游诗人赫利安德，开始测试特雷彻图斯的思维，发现他尽管害羞，但得益于种种复杂过往，他具有异于常人的才智和人情练达。因为赫利安德曾于阿塔姆受过秘术师训练，所以她认为这个男孩与自己有相同之处。 剧团巡游到夏暮岛最东端的波坦萨村驻扎表演时，赫利安德就带着十一岁的特雷彻图斯去了阿塔姆。岛上的魔导师艾克西斯看中特雷彻图斯的潜力，将他收为门生并赐名瓦努斯·加里兰。自此，加里兰便于岛上锤炼自己的心智和身体。 这便是法师公会首位大魔导师如何在阿塔姆岛的赛伊克教团内接受训练的起源。而正因为那贫乏而不公的童年岁月，他就萌生了共享知识的哲学理念。

translations.english: Urag gro-Shub is looking for writings by the Arch-Mage Shalidor, so that he can translate them into something useful for the College. He's asked that I attempt to find another copy for him.
translations.chinese: 乌拉格·格洛-舒布正在寻找大法师沙利多的手迹，并将它们翻译成对学院有用的东西。他想让我帮他再找一本。

translations.english: Urag gro-Shub asked me to bring him more of the writings of the Arch-Mage Shalidor. I was able to find another copy, and have brought it to him. He will translate it as soon as he's able, and then we'll see what we can learn from it.
translations.chinese: 乌拉格·格洛-舒布让我继续帮他寻找大法师沙利多的更多手迹。我找到了另外一本并交给了他。他会尽快翻译，看看我们能从中学到些什么。

translations.english: I've managed to find the writings of the Arch-Mage Shalidor that Urag gro-Shub was looking for. I should take them to him at the Arcanaeum so that he can translate them.
translations.chinese: 我找到了乌拉格·格洛-舒布一直在找的大法师沙利多手迹。我应该把它带回秘藏馆交给乌拉格翻译。

translations.english: I have found and shut down the magical anomaly Tolfdir was worried about. I should return to him and let him know it's been dealt with.
translations.chinese: 我找到了托夫迪尔所说的魔法异常点，并将其关闭。我应该回去告诉他事情解决了。

translations.english: A magical anomaly was reported in Skyrim; it seems to have been connected to Ancano's meddling with the Eye of Magnus. I successfully shut it down before it could become a greater problem.
translations.chinese: 天际中出现了魔法异常现象，似乎与安卡诺干预玛格努斯之眼有关。我成功在其演化成更大问题前解决了它。

translations.english: There have been reports of some sort of magical anomaly in Skyrim. Tolfdir fears it is a side-effect of Ancano's meddling with the Eye of Magnus, and has asked that I look into it. He suggested I take the Staff of Magnus with me, just in case.
translations.chinese: 据称天际出现某种魔法异常现象。托夫迪尔担心是由于安卡诺干预玛格努斯之眼造成的副作用，并要求我前去调查，他建议我带上玛格努斯之杖以防万一。

translations.english: Brelyna Maryon has asked me to act as a test subject while she practices some new spells. Her first attempt ended badly, but she has assured me that if I let her try one more time, it will work out. I should find her once her spell has worn off.
translations.chinese: 布莱丽娜·玛约请我做她练习新法术的测试对象。她的首次尝试失败了，但她保证，如果再试一次，她会成功的。等她的法术失效之后，我再去找她。

translations.english: After two attempts at helping Brelyna with trying out new spells, she has agreed that perhaps she should work a bit more before trying anything else.
translations.chinese: 在两次帮助布莱丽娜尝试新魔法后，她同意在尝试其他魔法前，先再努力一下。

translations.english: Wait for Brelyna's spell to wear off

translations.english: J'zargo has asked for help with a project he's been working on. I'm supposed to test out Flame Cloak scrolls he made, and report back to him when I've tried them out on several undead creatures.
translations.chinese: 杰'扎格有个实验项目寻求帮助。我要测试他制作的火焰斗篷卷轴，在一些亡灵身上测试之后和他谈谈。

translations.english: I've informed J'zargo that the Flame Cloak scrolls he created don't work exactly as he intended. I doubt he'll be asking for additional help.
translations.chinese: 我已经告诉杰'扎格，他制作的火焰斗篷卷轴效果不理想。我觉得他不会再找别人帮忙了。

translations.english: I told J'zargo that I ran out of the scrolls he'd given me, and he no longer wants my help.
translations.chinese: 我告诉杰'扎格卷轴用完了，他不再需要我的帮助了。

translations.english: Test J'zargo's Flame Cloak spell on the undead (<Global=MGRJ1Test>/<Global=MGRJ1Total>)
translations.chinese: 用亡灵测试杰'扎格的火焰斗篷法术(<Global=MGRJ1Test>/<Global=MGRJ1Total>)

translations.english: Onmund has asked me to help him get an amulet with sentimental value back from Enthir.
translations.chinese: 昂蒙德请我帮他从恩希尔处拿回一个具有情感价值的护符。

translations.english: Enthir insists that Onmund sold him the amulet in question, and he will not go back on a trade. If, however, I can recover a particular staff for Enthir, he'll give me the amulet. I'll need to search <Alias=StaffLocation> for the staff.
translations.chinese: 恩希尔坚称昂蒙德已经将护符卖给了他，不会再次进行交易。不过，如果我能帮恩希尔找回一根特殊的法杖，他就会把护符还给我。我需要到<Alias=StaffLocation>寻找法杖。

translations.english: Onmund is grateful that I was able to deal with Enthir and return his amulet.
translations.chinese: 昂蒙德很感激我能够帮他和恩希尔交涉并拿回他的护符。

translations.english: Enthir agreed to return Onmund's amulet to him, and has given it to me. I need to make sure it gets back to Onmund.
translations.chinese: 恩希尔同意把昂蒙德的护符交给我，由我代转昂蒙德。

translations.english: I have found the staff that Enthir wanted, and need to deliver it to him so that he'll exchange it for Onmund's amulet.
translations.chinese: 我找到了恩希尔想要的法杖，只需拿回去与他交换昂蒙德的护符。

translations.english: I've given Arniel Gane the Dwarven cogs he asked for, and he was quite grateful. He's suggested that there may be more I can help with in the future.
translations.chinese: 我给阿内尔·甘带来了他需要的矮人齿轮，他很感激，说以后可能会请我帮更多的忙。

translations.english: Arniel Gane has asked for help with a special project he's working on. Although he won't tell me what they're for, he wants me to bring him a number of Dwarven Cogs.
translations.chinese: 阿内尔·甘为自己正在进行的一个特殊研究项目找寻帮助。他想让我给他带些矮人齿轮回来，却不愿透露东西的具体用途。

translations.english: Deliver ten cogs to Arniel Gane
translations.chinese: 把十个齿轮带给阿内尔

translations.english: I've managed to complete the trade agreement between Enthir and Arniel, and have the object Arniel was interested in. It's some sort of soul gem, though Enthir believes it to be useless. I should deliver it to Arniel.
translations.chinese: 我已经促成了恩希尔和阿内尔之间的交易，并且拿到了阿内尔感兴趣的东西。这是某种灵魂石，但恩希尔觉得毫无用处。我该把它交给阿内尔。

translations.english: Arniel has asked for more help with his project, though this time the request is very different. Enthir is apparently refusing to follow through on a trade; something Arniel needs for his work. He's asked that I go speak with Enthir on his behalf.
translations.chinese: 阿内尔寻求更多项目上的帮助，尽管这次的要求有些特殊。恩希尔拒绝执行和阿内尔之间的交易，我要去代表阿内尔去和恩希尔谈谈。

translations.english: I've successfully completed a deal between Enthir and Arniel that is somehow related to Arniel's special project. He claims to be making progress, though I have no idea what that means.
translations.chinese: 我成功完成了恩希尔和阿内尔之间的交易，这与阿内尔的特殊研究有关。阿内尔声称研究取得了进展，但我不知道那是什么意思。

translations.english: Arniel asked me to deal with Enthir, who was supposedly refusing to complete a business arrangement. Enthir insists that he hasn't been paid, but will consider the deal done if I acquire a staff for him from <Alias=Dungeon>.
translations.chinese: 阿内尔让我去和恩希尔交涉，以完成他们之间的交易。恩希尔坚称他还没拿到报酬，但如果我能为他从<Alias=Dungeon>取来一根法杖，他会完成这此交易。

translations.english: Arniel has finally revealed to me that his secret project deals with the disappearance of the dwarves, though he hasn't been clear about how his work relates to it. He's given me a warped soul gem, and asked me to find several Dwarven Convectors in the various ruins around Skyrim. I'm supposed to place the gem inside a convector, and then heat it using a spell Arniel has taught me. When I've done this several times, I should return the gem to Arniel.
translations.chinese: 阿内尔终于向我透露了自己的秘密项目与矮人消失之谜有关，尽管他还不清楚自己的研究是否能够成功。他交给我一块扭曲的灵魂石，并让我在天际四处的矮人遗迹里找寻几个矮人环流器。我需要把灵魂石放进环流器，然后用阿内尔教给我的法术进行加热。等我完成后，再把灵魂石还给阿内尔。

translations.english: I've once again helped Arniel with his secret, and very vague, project relating to the dwarves. He implied that he's waiting for something else, and then finally maybe I'll see what this is all about.
translations.chinese: 我再次帮阿内尔完成了他那神秘又模糊的矮人研究计划。他好像在等待别的东西，也许到时候我就能知道这一切到底怎么回事了。

translations.english: I've successfully altered Arniel's warped soul gem, and should return it to him. It is somehow critical to his project regarding the disappearance of the dwarves; perhaps he'll explain exactly what he's up to.
translations.chinese: 我成功改变了阿内尔给我的扭曲灵魂石，现在应该还给他了。这可能对他针对矮人消失的计划至关重要，也许他会向我解释自己的想法。

translations.english: Deliver the soul gem to Arniel
Place the warped soul gem into a Convector
translations.chinese: 将扭曲的灵魂石放入环流器

translations.english: Place the warpred soul gem into a final Convector
translations.chinese: 将扭曲的灵魂石放入最后的环流器

translations.english: Place the warped soul gem into another Convector
translations.chinese: 将扭曲的灵魂石放入其他环流器

translations.english: Arniel's experiment is over, but I'm not entirely sure what has happened. He has vanished, leaving behind the dagger Keening. I may never know whether he succeeded in his work.
translations.chinese: 阿内尔的实验结束了，但我不太确定发生了什么。他消失了，只留下了哀鸣匕首。我可能永远也无法知道他是否已经成功了。

translations.english: Arniel was convinced that Enthir was refusing to complete the trade the two of them had arranged, but it turns out that this time Enthir never received the item in question. The courier bringing the item never arrived. If I want to help Arniel finish his work, I'll need to find the courier myself.
translations.chinese: 阿内尔坚信恩希尔拒绝完成他们之间的交易安排，但事实证明，恩希尔也没有收到指定的物品。送东西的信使一直没到。如果我想帮阿内尔完成工作，就得自己去找信使了。

translations.english: Arniel was distraught over being unable to finish his project, believing that Enthir was refusing to complete a trade the two of them had agreed upon. Instead, the courier that was supposed to deliver the item never arrived. I've tracked him down (sadly he did not survive) and have the package Arniel wanted. I should make sure it gets to Arniel as soon as possible.
translations.chinese: 阿内尔正在因无法完成项目心烦意乱，他认定恩希尔再次拒绝完成约好的交易。事实是，信使从未到达。我找到了已经遇难的信使，拿到了阿内尔想要的包裹。我得尽快把它送到阿内尔那里。

translations.english: I've helped Arniel with the final piece of his project, by tracking down a missing courier who was supposed to be delivering an item from Morrowind. That item is Keening, a dwarven dagger that Arniel claims is very important. With it, he says he's able to finish his experiment and has asked that I observe what happens.
translations.chinese: 我帮助阿内尔找到了他实验所需的最后一样东西，从失踪的信使处拿回了他从晨风送来的矮人匕首“哀鸣”。阿内尔说，有了它就能完成实验，并邀请我在一旁观察。

translations.english: Arniel has once again asked me to speak to Enthir, who was supposed to deliver something else relating to Arniel's project.
translations.chinese: 阿内尔再次请我去和恩希尔谈谈。恩希尔好像要为阿内尔的项目提供其他东西。

translations.english: Northward, haunted northern coastline And south, Dwemer live and toil, A simple place, a shield from draft. At this stand wield mage's craft So fierce the sea will boil. [pagebreak] Under Greybeards' morning shadow At this northern watch, long lost Nirn's hoary Throat does scrape the sky. Here unleash a chilling cry And gild this stand with frost.
translations.chinese: 向北， 乃幽灵出没的北部海岸， 向南， 锻莫曾在此地生活劳作， 此地显而易见， 即是遮风的盾牌。 在此， 运用法师的技艺 汹涌的大海亦将沸腾。 [pagebreak] 在灰胡子的晨影之下， 北方守望之处遥望， 早已迷失的奈恩苍白之喉擦过天空。 在此发出令人毛骨悚然的尖叫， 为此处镀上一层寒霜。

Here unleash a chilling cry And gild this stand with frost. | ZH: 向北， 乃幽灵出没的北部海岸， 向南， 锻莫曾在此地生活劳作， 此地显而易见， 即是遮风的盾牌。 在此， 运用法师的技艺 汹涌的大海亦将沸腾。 [pagebreak] 在灰胡子的晨影之下， 北方守望之处遥望， 早已迷失的奈恩苍白之喉擦过天空。 在此发出令人毛骨悚然的尖叫， 为此处镀上一层寒霜。 | SID: 00FE6B
- BOOK:FULL | EN: Power of the Elements | ZH: 元素之力 | SID: 008E59

translations.english: Northward, haunted northern coastline And south, Dwemer live and toil, A simple place, a shield from draft. At this stand wield mage's craft So fierce the sea will boil. [pagebreak] Under Greybeards' morning shadow At this northern watch, long lost Nirn's hoary Throat does scrape the sky. Here unleash a chilling cry And gild this stand with frost. [pagebreak] Over western river waters, By Karth bounded, south and north On mountains sits a humble crown. Sky's wrath on this stand bring forth To shake these snowcaps down.
translations.chinese: 向北， 乃幽灵出没的北部海岸， 向南， 锻莫曾在此地生活劳作， 此地显而易见， 即是遮风的盾牌。 在此， 运用法师的技艺 汹涌的大海亦将沸腾。 [pagebreak] 在灰胡子的晨影之下， 北方守望之处遥望， 早已迷失的奈恩苍白之喉擦过天空。 在此发出令人毛骨悚然的尖叫， 为此处镀上一层寒霜。 [pagebreak] 西有河水， 名唤卡斯， 贯通南北， 山上坐落卑微的王冠。 在此地施天之怒， 震落雪顶坚冰。

- BOOK:FULL | EN: Power of the Elements | ZH: 元素之力 | SID: 00F387

translations.english: Northward, haunted northern coastline And south, Dwemer live and toil, A simple place, a shield from draft. At this stand wield mage's craft So fierce the sea will boil. [pagebreak] Under Greybeards' morning shadow At this northern watch, long lost Nirn's hoary Throat does scrape the sky. Here unleash a chilling cry And gild this stand with frost. [pagebreak] Over western river waters, By Karth bounded, south and north On mountains sits a humble crown. Sky's wrath on this stand bring forth To shake these snowcaps down. [pagebreak] <font face="$HandwrittenFont"> Elemental magic wielded, Elemental thoughts displayed. Havoc wrought as if for sport, Efforts to impress fall short. I'll merely use a blade. Seeking study, wanting learning, Recklessly aroused my rage! My pupil you would be, or more? Presume not of Shalidor, You feeble, foolish mage! Quickly dispatched, worthless weakling, Though this tome I gladly claim. A diamond in the rough, I find, Shining gem from feeble mind. Now die, and curse my name! </font>
translations.chinese: 向北， 乃幽灵出没的北部海岸， 向南， 锻莫曾在此地生活劳作， 此地显而易见， 即是遮风的盾牌。 在此， 运用法师的技艺 汹涌的大海亦将沸腾。 [pagebreak] 在灰胡子的晨影之下， 北方守望之处遥望， 早已迷失的奈恩苍白之喉擦过天空。 在此发出令人毛骨悚然的尖叫， 为此处镀上一层寒霜。 [pagebreak] 西有河水， 名唤卡斯， 贯通南北， 山上坐落卑微的王冠。 在此地施天之怒， 震落雪顶坚冰。 [pagebreak] <font face="$HandwrittenFont"> 挥舞元素的魔法， 展示元素的想法， 浩劫仿佛一场娱乐， 单纯努力终是徒劳。 我仅用剑一把。 孜孜不倦，求学若渴， 但你的鲁莽激起了我的愤怒！ 你只是我的门生，还是在寻求超越？ 不要盲从沙利多， 你这软弱愚蠢的法师！ 退散吧，毫无价值的弱者， 虽然我以此书尽兴。 但我发现了一颗未经雕琢的钻石， 从软弱的头脑中找到了闪耀的宝石。 现在去死吧，诅咒我的名字吧！ </font>

translations.english: I have followed the clues in Power of the Elements, allowing me to finish the book.
translations.chinese: 我根据《元素之力》中的线索完成了那本书。

translations.english: I've asked Faralda about additional training in Destruction. She gave me a book called "Power of the Elements" and hinted that it could lead me to new, powerful spells. I should examine the book to see what I can learn.
translations.chinese: 我向法劳达询问关于毁灭系的额外训练。她交给我一本名为《元素之力》的书籍，并暗示这本书可以指引我找到新的强大法术。我应该阅读一下这本书，看看能够了解些什么。

translations.english: Complete the book Powers of the Elements

translations.english: Drevis Neloren has told me that there are books hidden throughout the College of Winterhold that contain information about powerful Illusion spells. I need to use the spell he's given me, Vision of the Tenth Eye, to find them.
translations.chinese: 德莱维斯·内罗仁告诉我冬堡学院藏有一些关于强大幻术法术信息的书。我需要用他教给我的法术——第十视界来找到它们。

translations.english: I have found the Master Illusion Texts hidden throughout the College and delivered them to Drevis Neloren. In return, he has given me one of the Master Illusion spells.
translations.chinese: 我找到了隐藏在学院各处的幻术系大师课本，并交给了德莱维斯·内罗仁。作为奖励，他给了我一本幻术系大师法术。

translations.english: Bring the Four Master Illusion texts to Drevis Neloren
translations.chinese: 将四部大师级幻术课本带给德莱维斯·内罗仁

translations.english: Phinis Gestor has told me that in order to inscribe powerful Conjuration spells, he'll need a sigil stone from an Oblivion gate. To get one, I'll need to summon an Unbound Dremora and bend it to my will.
translations.chinese: 菲尼斯·盖斯特告诉我，为了刻录强大的法术，他需要一块来自湮灭之门的印记石。我需要召唤一个不受束缚的魔人，让它臣服于我，为我拿取一个。

translations.english: I have subdued an Unbound Dremora and had him retrieve a sigil stone for me, which Phinis Gestor has used to inscribe the Master Conjuration spells. In exchange for doing this, he has given me the first of the spells.
translations.chinese: 我降服了一个不受束缚的魔人，让它为我取回了一块印记石。菲尼斯·盖斯特用这块印记石刻录了大师级召唤系法术。作为交换，他将第一个法术交给了我。

translations.english: Phinis Gestor requires a sigil stone to inscribe powerful Conjuration spells for me. I subdued an Unbound Dremora and had it retrieve one for me, which I should now take to Phinis.
translations.chinese: 菲尼斯·盖斯特需要一块印记石来刻录强大的法术。我制服了一个不受束缚的魔人，派它给我找回了一个印记石。我现在该把东西带给菲尼斯。

translations.english: Summon and subdue an Unbound Dremora
translations.chinese: 召唤并降服一个不受束缚的魔人

translations.english: At Tolfdir's request, I've used Kahvozein's Fang to collect dragon heartscales. Hopefully this will help him to create the new Alteration spell he's been working on.
translations.chinese: 应托夫迪尔的要求，我用卡沃奇恩之牙收集了龙之心鳞。希望这能帮助他创造出新的变化系法术。

translations.english: I've assisted Tolfdir in his research by collecting dragon heartscales, which he needed to figure out a new Alteration spell. As a reward for helping him, he's given me the first copy of the tome.
translations.chinese: 我帮助托夫迪尔收集了龙之心鳞，他想用这东西来创造新的变化系法术。作为回报，他将新法术的第一本交给了我。

translations.english: Tolfdir is working on a new Master Alteration spell, and has asked for my help. He wants to study dragon heartscales, but in order to collect them I'll first need to obtain a special dagger known as Kahvozein's Fang.
translations.chinese: 托夫迪尔正在研究新的大师级变化系法术，并寻求我的帮助。他想研究龙之心鳞，为了收集该物，我需要先弄到一把名为卡沃奇恩之牙的特殊匕首。

translations.english: Use Kavohzein's Fang to collect Heartscales
translations.chinese: 用卡沃奇恩之牙收集心鳞
将龙之心鳞带给托夫迪尔

translations.english: What happened on the 30th of Frostfall?

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: MQ0030thFrostfallTopic
Translations:
- DIAL:FULL | EN: What happened on the 30th of Frostfall? | ZH: 霜落月30日发生了什么？ | SID: 005318

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: MQ00ArngeirCeremonyA1
Translations:
- DIAL:FULL | EN: What did you actually say? | ZH: 你们到底说了什么？ | SID: 007464

translations.english: No doubt. The appearance of a Dragonborn at this time is not an accident. Your destiny is surely bound up with the return of the dragons.
translations.chinese: 不用说。龙裔出现在这个时候绝非偶然。你的命运肯定和龙族回归息息相关。

translations.english: You should focus on honing your Voice, and soon your path will be made clear.
translations.chinese: 你应该专注磨练自己的吼声，你的前路很快就会清晰了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: MQ00ArngeirDragonsReturn
Translations:

translations.english: But in your case, Dragonborn, it is a privilege to guide you towards mastery of your Voice.
translations.chinese: 但你不同，龙裔，能引导你掌握自己的吼声是一种荣幸。

translations.english: We study the Way of the Voice, according to the teachings of our founder, Jurgen Windcaller.
translations.chinese: 我们研习吼声之道，这是创始人“唤风者”约根的教诲。

translations.english: Very few are permitted to study with us here at High Hrothgar.
translations.chinese: 很少有人获准留在霍斯加修道院与我们一同修炼。

- DIAL:FULL | EN: There are only four of you? | ZH: 你们只有四个人？ | SID: 0009E9

Translations:
- DIAL:FULL | EN: Why don't the others talk? | ZH: 其他人为什么不说话？ | SID: 004651

EDID: MQ00ArngeirSkyAbove
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Sky above, Voice within. | ZH: 苍天在上，吼声在心。 | SID: 001950

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: MQ00ArngeirSkyGuardYou
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Sky guard you. | ZH: 愿天空守护你。 | SID: 00B3BF

translations.english: True mastery of the Voice can only be achieved when your inner spirit is in harmony with your outward actions.
translations.chinese: 只有当你的内在精神与外在行为和谐一致的时候，你才算真正掌握了吼声的真谛。

translations.english: The Voice was a gift of the goddess Kynareth, at the dawn of time. She gave mortals the ability to speak as dragons do.
translations.chinese: 吼声是凯娜瑞丝女神黎明时代的赐福，她赋予凡人像龙一样呼喊的能力。

translations.english: In the contemplation of the sky, Kynareth's domain, and the practice of the Voice, we strive to achieve this balance.
translations.chinese: 我们对着凯娜瑞丝的天空沉思，并不断练习吼声，努力实现行神统一。

translations.english: Although this gift has often been misused, the only true use of the Voice is for the worship and glory of the gods.
translations.chinese: 但这个赐福时常被误用，吼声的唯一正途应该是用来感悟神明的信仰与荣耀。

translations.english: But we never found one. Until now.
translations.chinese: 但我们一直没找到。直到现在。

translations.english: For the last two hundred years, we've been searching for the next Dragonborn to guide and guard, as we are sworn to do.
translations.chinese: 两百年来，我们一直在寻找下一位龙裔，为他提供指引与保护，这是我们的誓言。

translations.english: Exactly. Nobody even remembers our name these days.
translations.chinese: 显然。如今没人记得我们叫什么了。

translations.english: We used to be known across Tamriel as the protectors of the Septim Emperors. Those days are long gone, though.
translations.chinese: 我们曾经因保护塞普汀皇帝而闻名泰姆瑞尔。但那日子早就一去不复返了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: For the last two hundred years, we've been searching for the next Dragonborn to guide and guard, as we are sworn to do. | ZH: 两百年来，我们一直在寻找下一位龙裔，为他提供指引与保护，这是我们的誓言。 | SID: 00304E

translations.english: There's no worse enemy to humankind in Tamriel. The Empire barely survived the last war. The Thalmor don't intend to lose the next one.
translations.chinese: 泰姆瑞尔的人族再没有比这更糟糕的敌人了。帝国在上次战争中勉强保存下来。但梭默可没打算放过下一次机会。

translations.english: The faction that rules the Aldmeri Dominion. The ones who almost destroyed the Empire during the Great War, thirty years back.
translations.chinese: 统治先祖神洲的集团。三十年前的浩大战争中，他们险些摧毁了帝国。

translations.english: They live in seclusion near the top of the Throat of the World, the great mountain of Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 他们隐居在接近世界之喉山顶的地方。那里是天际的最高山。

translations.english: They're masters of the Way of the Voice - of Shouting.
translations.chinese: 他们是吼声之道的龙吼大师。

translations.english: It's a great honor for them to summon you. They speak to very few - in fact, they hardly speak at all.
translations.chinese: 能得到他们的召唤是你的荣幸。他们很少开口，甚至就是不讲话。

translations.english: I have been captured by the Empire and sentenced to death alongside the Stormcloak rebels. We were taken to Helgen, but before I could be executed a dragon appeared and attacked the town. I need to find some way to escape.
translations.chinese: 我被帝国抓捕，和风暴斗篷们一起被判了死刑。我们被押送到海尔根，在我被处决前，一头巨龙出现并袭击了镇子。我得想办法逃出去。

translations.english: I have been captured by the Empire and sentenced to death alongside the Stormcloak rebels. We were taken to Helgen, but before I could be executed a dragon appeared and attacked the town. I need to find some way to escape.
translations.chinese: 我被帝国抓捕，和风暴斗篷们一起被判了死刑。我们被押送到海尔根，在我被处决前，一头巨龙出现并袭击了镇子。我得想办法逃出去。

translations.english: I have escaped both my execution and a dragon attack at Helgen. I now have my freedom to do as I see fit in Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 我成功得躲过了处刑和海尔根的龙袭。我现在可以在天际做我想做的事了。

translations.english: Who did you befriend while escaping from Helgen?

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: MQ101TempChooseSidesMessage
Translations:
- MESG:DESC | EN: Who did you befriend while escaping from Helgen? | ZH: 你逃离海尔根时与谁成为了朋友？ | SID: 0009E1
- MESG:ITXT [1/1] | EN: Ralof (Stormcloaks) | ZH: 拉罗夫（风暴斗篷） | SID: 0009D8
- MESG:ITXT [0/1] | EN: Hadvar (Imperials) | ZH: 哈达瓦（帝国） | SID: 0009DF

translations.english: You rode the cart into Helgen with Ulfric Stormcloak and his men. Just before you were executed, a dragon attacked, and you escaped in the confusion, with the help of Ralof (a fellow prisoner) and Hadvar (one of the Imperial soldiers). You arrive at the keep - Ralof and Hadvar are both there, asking you to follow them. Who do you go with?
translations.chinese: 你与乌弗瑞克·风暴斗篷和他的部下一起乘马车被押送到海尔根。就在你被处决前，一头龙袭击了你，在拉罗夫（另一名囚犯）和哈达瓦（帝国士兵）的帮助下，你从混乱中逃脱了。 你到达了要塞，拉罗夫和哈达瓦都喊你跟上，你要和谁一起走？

translations.english: Ralof's sister Gerdur asked me to take word to the Jarl of Whiterun of the dragon attack on Helgen, and to ask the Jarl to send soldiers to protect Riverwood.
translations.chinese: 拉罗夫的姐姐歌尔朵要我去向白漫的领主报告巨龙袭击海尔根的消息，并请求领主派兵保护河木镇。

translations.english: Hadvar's uncle Alvor asked me to take word to the Jarl of Whiterun of the dragon attack on Helgen, and to ask the Jarl to send soldiers to protect Riverwood.
translations.chinese: 哈达瓦的叔叔阿尔沃要我去向白漫的领主报告巨龙袭击海尔根的消息，并请求领主派兵保护河木镇。

translations.english: Ralof suggested that we head to the nearby town of Riverwood. His sister owns a lumbermill there and should be able to help us.
translations.chinese: 拉罗夫建议我去附近的河木镇。他姐姐是那里的木材厂主，应该能帮到我们。

translations.english: Hadvar suggested that we head to the nearby town of Riverwood. His uncle is the blacksmith there and should be able to help us.
translations.chinese: 哈达瓦建议我去附近的河木镇。他叔叔是那里的铁匠，应该能帮到我们。

translations.english: Ralof suggested that I head to the nearby town of Riverwood. His sister owns a lumbermill there and should be able to help me.
translations.chinese: 拉罗夫建议我去附近的河木镇。他姐姐是那里的木材厂主，应该能帮到我。

translations.english: Hadvar suggested that I head to the nearby town of Riverwood. His uncle is the blacksmith there and should be able to help me.
translations.chinese: 哈达瓦建议我去附近的河木镇。他叔叔是那里的铁匠，应该能帮到我。

translations.english: When I arrived in Whiterun, I told the Jarl about the dragon attack on Helgen, and he rewarded me for my efforts.
translations.chinese: 我抵达白漫城并向领主报告了海尔根的龙袭。他奖赏了我的努力。

translations.english: Ralof's sister Gerdur asked me to take word to the Jarl of Whiterun of the dragon attack on Helgen, and to ask the Jarl to send soldiers to protect Riverwood. I delivered the news to Jarl Balgruuf in Whiterun, and he rewarded me for my help.
translations.chinese: 拉罗夫的姐姐歌尔朵要我去向白漫的领主报告巨龙袭击海尔根的消息，并请求领主派兵保护河木镇。我把消息告诉了巴尔古夫领主，收到了报酬。

translations.english: Hadvar's uncle Alvor asked me to take word to the Jarl of Whiterun of the dragon attack on Helgen, and to ask the Jarl to send soldiers to protect Riverwood. I delivered the news to Jarl Balgruuf in Whiterun, and he rewarded me for my help.
translations.chinese: 哈达瓦的叔叔阿尔沃要我去向白漫的领主报告巨龙袭击海尔根的消息，并请求领主派兵保护河木镇。我把消息告诉了巴尔古夫领主，收到了报酬。

translations.english: When I arrived in Whiterun, I told the Jarl about the dragon attack on Helgen.
translations.chinese: 我抵达白漫城并向领主报告了海尔根的龙袭。

translations.english: When I arrived in Whiterun, I told the Jarl about the dragon attack on Helgen.
translations.chinese: 我抵达白漫城并向领主报告了海尔根的龙袭。

translations.english: I've arrived in Whiterun. I should tell the Jarl about the dragon attack on Helgen.
translations.chinese: 我到了白漫城。我应该向领主报告海尔根被龙袭击的事。

translations.english: I've arrived in Whiterun. I should tell the Jarl about the dragon attack on Helgen.
translations.chinese: 我到了白漫城。我应该向领主报告海尔根被龙袭击的事。

translations.english: Farengar Secret-Fire, Jarl Balgruuf's court wizard, has asked me to retrieve a Dragonstone from Bleak Falls Barrow, a stone tablet that he believes contains a map of ancient dragon burial sites. He hopes this will help him understand how and why dragons are returning to Tamriel.
translations.chinese: 巴尔古夫领主的宫廷巫师，“秘火”法仁加让我去荒瀑古坟找到龙石。他认为石板上记载着古代埋龙的地点。他希望这能帮助他了解龙族回归泰姆瑞尔的方式和原因。

translations.english: Jarl Balgruuf thinks I may be able to help Farengar, his court wizard, with something related to dragons.

translations.english: Farengar Secret-Fire, Jarl Balgruuf's court wizard, asked me to retrieve a Dragonstone from Bleak Falls Barrow, a stone tablet that he believes contains a map of ancient dragon burial sites. He hopes this will help him understand how and why dragons are returning to Tamriel. He was pleased when I returned with it, and promised that the Jarl will reward me for my efforts.
translations.chinese: 巴尔古夫领主的宫廷巫师，“秘火”法仁加让我去荒瀑古坟找到龙石。他认为石板上记载着古代埋龙的地点。他希望这能帮助他了解龙族回归泰姆瑞尔的方式和原因。我把它带回来时，法仁加很高兴，并承诺领主会奖励我的努力成果。

translations.english:
Survey of the Holdings of Jarl Gjalund

As Witnessed by Slafknir the Scribe, so Sworn by the Old Gods and the New [pagebreak] Whiterun - AHROLSEDOVAH - The Jarl's Holding, with Plentiful Water and Pasturage. Home of Jorrvaskr, the Far-Famed Hall of the Companions. Rorik's Steading - RORIKHOFKAH - A Small Farmstead in the Western Plains. Grain, Leather, Horses. Granite Hill - QUETHSEGOL AHROL - Three Farms and an Inn, just North of the Falkreath. A Market is Held here Weekly. H'roldan - AHROLDAN - A Spacious Wooden Hall and Pasturage, recently Seized from the Reachmen. Silver and Iron as Tribute from the Natives. Bromjunaar - BROMJUN1R- An Old Settlement, much Reduced from Former Days. Lumber and Stone. Korvanjund - KORVANJUND- A Small Fortified Settlement. Hides and Meat. Volunruud - VOLUNR5D - A Fortified Wooden Hall near Giants' Gap. Meat and Worked Ivory. Hillgrund's Steading - HILLGRUNDHOFKAH - A Large Farmstead Near the Base of the Monahven. Grain, Mead, Honey.
translations.chinese:
加朗德领主领地调查

由抄写员斯拉夫可尼尔见证，新旧诸神明鉴 [pagebreak] 白漫城 - AHROLSEDOVAH - 领主的领地，水草丰盈。此地坐落月瓦斯卡之家，著名的战友团大厅。 洛里克农庄 - RORIKHOFKAH - 西部平原的小农场。出产粮食、皮革和马匹。 花岗岩山 - QUETHSEGOL AHROL - 坐落佛克瑞斯以北，有三座农场与一个酒馆。此地每周举办一次大集。 霍’罗尔丹 - AHROLDAN - 近期从瑞驰人手中夺取，有宽敞的木制大厅与牧场。土著会上供银与铁。 布罗姆琼那 - BROMJUN1R- 古老定居点，规模远不如前。出产木材与石头。 科万琼德 - KORVANJUND- 小型防御工事。出产毛皮与肉类。 沃伦鲁德 - VOLUNR5D - 巨人隘口附近的坚固木制大厅。出产肉类与象牙制品。 希尔古恩德农庄 - HILLGRUNDHOFKAH - 莫纳文山脚下的大型农场。出产粮食、蜜酒与蜂蜜。

translations.english: A dragon was sighted at a watchtower near Whiterun. Jarl Balgruuf sent me along with his housecarl Irileth with reinforcements. The dragon attacked us and we killed it. We should investigate its corpse to see if we can learn anything about where it came from.
translations.chinese: 在白漫城附近的哨塔发现了龙。巴尔古夫领主派我和他的侍卫伊瑞莱斯去增援。巨龙向我们发起攻击，被我们击杀。我们应该调查一下它的尸体，看看能不能找出它来自何方。

translations.english: A dragon was sighted at a watchtower near Whiterun. Jarl Balgruuf sent me along with his housecarl Irileth with reinforcements. The dragon attacked us and we killed it. When I approached the dragon's corpse, I absorbed some kind of power from it. When I returned to Whiterun, the Jarl rewarded me for my services. I am now a Thane of Whiterun with my own personal housecarl.
translations.chinese: 在白漫城附近的哨塔发现了龙。巴尔古夫领主派我和他的侍卫伊瑞莱斯去增援。巨龙向我们发起攻击，被我们击杀。当我靠近龙的尸体时，从它身上吸取了某种力量。我回到白漫城后，领主奖赏了我的贡献。我现在成为了白漫武卫，还拥有了自己的私人侍卫。

translations.english: A dragon was sighted at a watchtower near Whiterun. Jarl Balgruuf sent me along with his housecarl Irileth with reinforcements. The dragon attacked us and we killed it. When I approached the dragon's corpse, I absorbed some kind of power from it. I should return to Whiterun and tell the Jarl what happened.
translations.chinese: 在白漫城附近的哨塔发现了龙。巴尔古夫领主派我和他的侍卫伊瑞莱斯去增援。巨龙向我们发起攻击，被我们击杀。当我靠近龙的尸体时，从它身上吸取了某种力量。我应该回白漫城向领主报告情况。

translations.english: I recovered the Dragonstone from Bleak Falls Barrow, as the Jarl of Whiterun requested. I should speak to him about my reward.
translations.chinese: 我按照白漫领主的指示，从荒瀑古坟找到了龙石。我应该去索取自己的报酬。

translations.english: A dragon has been sighted at a watchtower near Whiterun. Jarl Balgruuf has sent me along with his housecarl Irileth with reinforcements.
translations.chinese: 在白漫城附近的哨塔发现了龙。巴尔古夫领主派我和他的侍卫伊瑞莱斯去增援。

translations.english: A dragon has been sighted near Whiterun. Irileth, the Jarl's housecarl, asked me to come with her to discuss the situation with Jarl Balgruuf.
translations.chinese: 白漫城附近出现了一头龙。领主侍卫伊瑞莱斯要我和她一起去和巴尔古夫领主讨论情况。

translations.english: Meet Irileth near the Western Watchtower
translations.chinese: 和伊瑞莱斯在西部哨塔附近见面
回去向巴尔古夫领主报告
