translations.english: The Greybeards summoned me to their monastery of High Hrothgar on the slopes of the Throat of the World. Their leader, Arngeir, recognized me as "Dragonborn", and taught me more about my new Voice powers. After passing several tests, they sent me on one final trial, retrieving the legendary Horn of Jurgen Windcaller.
translations.chinese: 灰胡子将我召唤到了世界之喉高坡上的霍斯加修道院。他们的领袖艾恩盖尔认为我是“龙裔”，并教会了更多关于吼声力量的知识。在几番测验后，他们派我进行最后一项试炼，取回传说中“唤风者”约根的号角。

translations.english: The Greybeards have summoned me to their monastery of High Hrothgar on the slopes of the Throat of the World. They seem to have learned of the mysterious power that I gained when I killed the dragon outside Whiterun.
translations.chinese: 灰胡子将我召唤到了世界之喉高坡上的霍斯加修道院。他们好像知道了我在白漫城外杀龙时获得神秘力量的事。

translations.english: The Greybeards summoned me to their monastery of High Hrothgar on the slopes of the Throat of the World. I spoke to Arngeir, one of the Greybeards, who believes that I am "Dragonborn", which means I am especially gifted in the use of the Voice. They have offered to help me learn to use my new abilities.
translations.chinese: 灰胡子将我召唤到了世界之喉高坡上的霍斯加修道院。我和灰胡子艾恩盖尔交谈。他相信我就是“龙裔”。这意味着我在吼声方面独具天赋。他们主动提出要帮我学习如何使用这个新能力。

translations.english: Learn the Word of Power from Einarth
translations.chinese: 从爱纳斯处学习力量之语

translations.english: Speak to Arngeir for further training
translations.chinese: 与艾恩盖尔谈谈进一步的训练

translations.english: Learn the Word of Power from Borri

translations.english: After demonstrating my ability to learn Words of Power and to Shout, the Greybeard Arngeir sent me on a final trial - retrieving the Horn of Jurgen Windcaller from his tomb in Ustengrav. When I arrived, the Horn was missing, and in its place was a note from Delphine asking me to meet her in Riverwood. Delphine gave me the Horn, and I returned it to Arngeir to complete my trial. The Greybeards then greeted me formally as Dragonborn, and High Hrothgar is now open to me.
translations.chinese: 在展示了我学习力量之语和龙吼的能力后，灰胡子艾恩盖尔安排我去做最后的试炼——从乌斯滕格拉取回“唤风者”约根的号角。当我到达时，号角不见了，取而代之的是戴尔芬的一张字条，邀我去河木镇见她。戴尔芬把号角给了我，我将它交给了艾恩盖尔，完成了考验。灰胡子正式以龙裔的身份欢迎了我，霍斯加修道院现在向我开放了。

translations.english: After demonstrating my ability to learn Words of Power and to Shout, the Greybeard Arngeir sent me on a final trial - retrieving the Horn of Jurgen Windcaller from his tomb in Ustengrav. Unfortunately, when I reached the tomb, I found that someone had replaced the Horn of Jurgen Windcaller with a note asking me to meet them in the Sleeping Giant Inn in Riverwood.
translations.chinese: 在展示了我学习力量之语和龙吼的能力后，灰胡子艾恩盖尔安排我去做最后的试炼——从乌斯滕格拉取回“唤风者”约根的号角。不幸的是，我到达墓地的时候，有人把约根的号角换成了一张字条，让我到河木镇的沉睡巨人旅馆见他们。

translations.english: After demonstrating my ability to learn Words of Power and to Shout, the Greybeard Arngeir has sent me on a final trial - retrieving the Horn of Jurgen Windcaller from his tomb in Ustengrav, a burial mound in the marshes of Hjaalmarch.
translations.chinese: 在展示了我学习力量之语和龙吼的能力后，灰胡子艾恩盖尔安排我去做最后的试炼——从乌斯滕格拉取回“唤风者”约根的号角。

translations.english: After demonstrating my ability to learn Words of Power and to Shout, the Greybeard Arngeir sent me on a final trial - retrieving the Horn of Jurgen Windcaller from his tomb in Ustengrav. When I arrived, the horn was missing, and in its place was a note from Delphine asking me to meet her in Riverwood. Delphine has given me the horn, so I can now return to Arngeir and complete my training.
translations.chinese: 在展示了我学习力量之语和龙吼的能力后，灰胡子艾恩盖尔安排我去做最后的试炼——从乌斯滕格拉取回“唤风者”约根的号角。当我到达时，号角不见了，取而代之的是戴尔芬的一张字条，邀我去河木镇见她。戴尔芬把号角给了我，所以我可以去找艾恩盖尔完成我的训练了。

translations.english: Retrieve the Horn of Jurgen Windcaller
translations.chinese: 找回“唤风者”约根的号角

translations.english: Meet with whoever took the horn
Learn the Word of Power from Wulfgar
translations.chinese: 从沃夫加处学习力量之语

translations.english: Delphine believes that dragons are coming back to life and that the next one will resurrect near the town of Kynesgrove. Once I've convinced her that I'm Dragonborn by killing the dragon, she promises to fully explain who she is and what she wants with me.
translations.chinese: 戴尔芬相信龙族是复活的，而下一个是在凯娜之林小镇附近。她向我承诺，一旦我能杀死巨龙证明自己是龙裔，她会向我解释自己的身份和目的。

translations.english: Delphine, the innkeeper in Riverwood, is more than she seems. She was the one that left me the note in Ustengrav. She gave me back the Horn of Jurgen Windcaller. She went to a lot of trouble to get my attention. I should find out what she wants.
translations.chinese: 河木镇的旅馆老板戴尔芬比她看上去要厉害的多。就是她在乌斯滕格拉给我留了字条。她把“唤风者”约根的号角还给我了。她费尽周折引起我的注意。我应该问问她想干什么。

translations.english: Delphine believes that dragons are coming back to life and that only the Dragonborn can stop them. Near Kynesgrove, we saw a dragon Shouting another one back to life. That dragon is dead, and now it's time for Delphine to give me some answers.
translations.chinese: 戴尔芬相信龙族是复活的，只有龙裔可以阻止它们。我们在凯娜之林附近目睹了一头龙在用龙吼复活同伴。复活的那头已经死了。现在该是戴尔芬向我解释的时候了。

translations.english: Delphine believes that dragons are coming back to life and that only the Dragonborn can stop them. It turns out that she was right. Near Kynesgrove, we saw a dragon Shouting another one back to life. After we killed the dragon and I absorbed its power, Delphine accepted that I was Dragonborn as she had hoped, and revealed that she is one of the last members of the Blades, an organization dedicated to protecting the Dragonborn and stopping the dragons.
translations.chinese: 戴尔芬相信龙族是复活的，只有龙裔可以阻止它们。事实证明她说的没错。在凯娜之林附近，我们目睹了一头龙用龙吼将同伴复活。在我们杀死复活的巨龙之后，我吸收了它的力量，戴尔芬接受了我是龙裔的事实。她说她是刀锋会的最后成员之一，他们曾经致力保护龙裔并阻止龙族。

translations.english: Do you know about Delphine's... activities?
translations.chinese: 你对戴尔芬的……行为有了解吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: MQ106OrgnarDelphineTopic
Translations:
- DIAL:FULL | EN: Do you know about Delphine's... activities? | ZH: 你对戴尔芬的……行为有了解吗？ | SID: 00F9B0

translations.english: It seems that things are worse than even Delphine thought. Dragons aren't just coming back to life, they're being resurrected by other dragons. Delphine suspects that the Thalmor might be bringing dragons back for some sinister purpose. I met with her contact, Malborn, who is going to smuggle some of my equipment into the Thalmor ambassador's manor. I'm going to infiltrate the manor posing as a guest at the ambassador's party. Once inside, I need to meet up with Malborn and figure out a way to slip away from the party without being caught.
translations.chinese: 情况比戴尔芬预想的还糟糕。龙族是被其他龙复活的。戴尔芬怀疑是梭默带着龙族回来作恶。我和她的线人马伯恩碰过头了。他会帮我把装备偷运进梭默大使馆。我需要扮成宴会宾客潜入大使馆的庄园里。进去后我就得找到马伯恩，想办法在不被发现的情况下溜出宴会。

translations.english: It seems that things are worse than even Delphine thought. Dragons aren't just coming back to life, they're being resurrected by other dragons. Delphine suspects that the Thalmor might be bringing dragons back for some sinister purpose. She's going to help me infiltrate the Thalmor ambassador's manor and find out what they know about the dragons. I should meet with her contact, Malborn, in the Winking Skeever Inn in Solitude.
translations.chinese: 情况比戴尔芬预想的还糟糕。龙族是被其他龙复活的。戴尔芬怀疑是梭默带着龙族回来作恶。她会协助我潜入梭默大使馆，查看他们对龙族的了解。我要去独孤城的眨眼恶鼠旅店和她的线人马伯恩碰头。

translations.english: It seems that things are worse than even Delphine thought. Dragons aren't just coming back to life, they're being resurrected by other dragons. Delphine suspects that the Thalmor might be bringing dragons back for some sinister purpose. She's going to talk to her contacts about how we can infiltrate the Thalmor Embassy.
translations.chinese: 情况比戴尔芬预想的还糟糕。龙族是被其他龙复活的。戴尔芬怀疑是梭默带着龙族回来作恶。她要和线人商量如何混进梭默大使馆。

translations.english: It seems that things are worse than even Delphine thought. Dragons aren't just coming back to life, they're being resurrected by other dragons. Delphine suspects that the Thalmor might be bringing dragons back for some sinister purpose. Her contact, Malborn, smuggled some of my equipment into the Thalmor ambassador's manor. I infiltrated the manor posing as a guest at the ambassador's party. Now I need to search the ambassador's office to find out what the Thalmor know about the dragons.
translations.chinese: 情况比戴尔芬预想的还糟糕。龙族是被其他龙复活的。戴尔芬怀疑是梭默带着龙族回来作恶。她的线人马伯恩帮我偷运了一些装备进入大使馆。我也冒充大使宴会的宾客混进了庄园。现在我得搜查大使馆办公室，看看梭默对龙有什么了解。

translations.english: It seems that things are worse than even Delphine thought. Dragons aren't just coming back to life, they're being resurrected by other dragons. Delphine suspects that the Thalmor might be bringing dragons back for some sinister purpose. With the help of her contact, Malborn, I infiltrated the manor posing as a guest at the ambassador's party. I've now learned that the Thalmor are just as in the dark as we are - in fact, they're searching Riften for a Blade named Esbern, who they believe knows what the return of the dragons means.
translations.chinese: 情况比戴尔芬预想的还糟糕。龙族是被其他龙复活的。戴尔芬怀疑是梭默带着龙族回来作恶。在线人马伯恩的协助下，我以宴会宾客的身份混进使馆庄园。我现在查清，梭默跟我们一样蒙在鼓里。事实上他们正在裂谷城搜寻一个叫伊思本的刀锋会成员，他们认为这个人知晓龙族回归的意义。

translations.english: It seems that things are worse than even Delphine thought. Dragons aren't just coming back to life, they're being resurrected by other dragons. Delphine suspects that the Thalmor might be bringing dragons back for some sinister purpose. With the help of her contact, Malborn, I infiltrated the manor posing as a guest at the ambassador's party. I learned that the Thalmor are just as in the dark as we are - in fact, they're searching Riften for a Blade named Esbern, who they believe knows what the return of the dragons means.
translations.chinese: 情况比戴尔芬预想的还糟糕。龙族是被其他龙复活的。戴尔芬怀疑是梭默带着龙族回来作恶。在线人马伯恩的协助下，我以宴会宾客的身份混进使馆庄园。我现在查清，梭默跟我们一样蒙在鼓里。事实上他们正在裂谷城搜寻一个叫伊思本的刀锋会成员，他们认为这个人知晓龙族回归的意义。

translations.english: Create a distraction and get away from the party

在河木镇与戴尔芬见面

Now I need to search the ambassador's office to find out what the Thalmor know about the dragons. | ZH: 情况比戴尔芬预想的还糟糕。龙族是被其他龙复活的。戴尔芬怀疑是梭默带着龙族回来作恶。她的线人马伯恩帮我偷运了一些装备进入大使馆。我也冒充大使宴会的宾客混进了庄园。现在我得搜查大使馆办公室，看看梭默对龙有什么了解。 | SID: 01060C
- QUST:CNAM [4/5] | EN: It seems that things are worse than even Delphine thought. Dragons aren't just coming back to life, they're being resurrected by other dragons. Delphine suspects that the Thalmor might be bringing dragons back for some sinister purpose. With the help of her contact, Malborn, I infiltrated the manor posing as a guest at the ambassador's party. translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> Status: Active (Capture or Kill), High Priority, Emissary Level Approval Description: Female, Breton, mid 50s Background: Delphine was a high-priority target during the First War, for both operational and political reasons. She was directly involved in several of the most damaging operations carried out by the Blades within the Dominion. She had been identified and was slated for the initial purge, but by bad luck was recalled to Cyrodiil just before the outbreak of hostilities. During the war, she evaded three attempts on her life, in one case killing an entire assassination team. Since then, we have only indirect evidence of her movements, as she has proven extremely alert to our surveillance. She should be considered very dangerous and no move against her should be made without overwhelming force and the most careful preparation. Operational Notes: She is believed to still be working actively against us within Skyrim, although we have no location on her. Assumed to be working alone, as no other Blades are known to be active in Skyrim, and she has in the past avoided contact with other fugitive Blades for her own security (one of the reasons she has so far evaded elimination). Her continued existence is an affront to all of us. Any information on her whereabouts or activities should be immediately forwarded to the Third Emissary. </font>
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> 状态：活跃（抓捕或处死），高优先级，特使级别许可 描述：女性，布莱顿人，五十五岁左右 背景： 无论出于军事和政治原因，戴尔芬都是“第一次战争”期间高优先级别的目标。她直接参与了几次由刀锋会在神洲内进行的最具破坏性的行动。她已经被确认身份并列入最早的清洗名单，然而不幸的是，就在敌对行动爆发前她就被召回希罗帝尔了。在战争期间，她曾躲过三次暗杀行动，其中一次还杀死了整个刺客小队。自那以后，由于她对我们的监视极为警觉，因此我们只能间接获悉她的行踪。她应该被列为最危险分子，如无压倒性力量和最精细的准备，不可对其采取任何行动。 对策摘要： 尽管没能确定其位置，不过我们确信她仍然在天际积极地采取行动对抗我们。由于没有其他已知的刀锋会成员在天际内活动，我们假设她独自行动且出于对自己的安全考量而在过去避免与其他刀锋会逃犯接触（这也是迄今为止未能抓获她的原因之一）。她活着就是对我们全体的侮辱。任何关于她的行踪和行动的情报都应立即上报。 </font>

She was directly involved in several of the most damaging operations carried out by the Blades within the Dominion. She had been identified and was slated for the initial purge, but by bad luck was recalled to Cyrodiil just before the outbreak of hostilities. During the war, she evaded three attempts on her life, in one case killing an entire assassination team. Since then, we have only indirect evidence of her movements, as she has proven extremely alert to our surveillance. She should be considered very dangerous and no move against her should be made without overwhelming force and the most careful preparation. Operational Notes: She is believed to still be working actively against us within Skyrim, although we have no location on her. translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> First Emissary Elenwen, We anticipate a breakthrough in our efforts to uncover the party or power behind the dragon resurrection phenomenon. An informant has identified a possible lead, whom we have brought back to the Embassy for a full interrogation. The subject is obstinate, but by all indications is holding back the information we seek. I have authorized Intermediate Manual Uncoiling - I do not expect more will be necessary, unless you feel time presses. I know you prefer to be present for the final questioning; I will inform you immediately when the subject is fully receptive. Two days should tell the tale. In the meantime, if you wish to audit our technique, your expertise is welcome, as always. I have placed the prisoner in the cell closest to your office stairs, for your convenience. --Rulindil, 3rd Em. </font>
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> 首席特使爱琳温： 我们期待在努力揭开巨龙复活现象背后隐藏的势力或力量一事上取得突破。有知情者掌握疑似线索，我们已经把其带到大使馆全面审问。但该目标十分顽固，但种种迹象表明，这阻碍了我们获得我们所寻求的信息。我已授权使用中级审讯手段，除非您认为时间紧迫，否则现阶段应该足矣。 我知道您希望在最后审讯时在场，当目标完全接受时，我会立即通知你。估计两天就可以了。 同时，若您希望审核我们的刑讯技术，欢迎您的专业点评。我会如往常一样将犯人放在离您办公室楼梯最近的牢房里，以供方便。 --第三特使 鲁林迪尔 </font>
巨龙调查报告：目前状况

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> Status: Fugitive (Capture Only), Highest Priority, Emissary Level Approval Description: Male, Nord, late 70s Background: Esbern was one of the Blades loremasters prior to the First War Against the Empire. He was not a field agent, but is now believed to have been behind some of the most damaging operations carried out by the Blades during the pre-war years, including the Falinesti Incident and the breach of the Blue River Prison. His file had remained dormant for many years, an inexcusable error on the part of my predecessor (who has been recalled to Alinor for punishment and reeducation), in the erroneous belief that he was unlikely to pose a threat due to his advanced age and lack of field experience. A salutary reminder to all operational levels that no Blades agent should be considered low priority for any reason. All are to be found and justice exacted upon them. Operational Notes: As we are still in the dark as to the cause and meaning of the return of the dragons, I have made capturing Esbern our top priority, as he is known to be one of the experts in the dragonlore of the Blades. Regrettably, we have yet to match their expertise on the subject of dragons, which was derived from their Akaviri origins and is still far superior to our own (which remains largely theoretical). The archives of Cloud Ruler Temple, which is believed to have been the primary repository of the oldest Blades lore, were largely destroyed during the siege, and although great effort has been made to reconstruct what was lost, it now appears that most of the records related to dragons were either removed or destroyed prior to our attack. Thus Esbern remains our best opportunity to learn how and why the dragons have returned. It cannot be ruled out that the Blades themselves are somehow connected to the dragons' return. We have recently obtained solid information that Esbern is still alive and hiding somewhere in Riften. Interrogation of a possible eyewitness is on-going. We must proceed carefully to avoid Esbern becoming alerted to his danger. If he is indeed in Riften, he must not be given an opportunity to flee. </font>
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> 状态：在逃（仅可活捉），最高优先级，特使级别许可 描述：男性，诺德人，70多岁 背景： 在对抗帝国的“首次”大战前，伊思本曾为刀锋会博学者之一。他并非一线密探，然而现在我们相信在战前几年，他在幕后参与了由刀锋会进行的大部分破坏活动，其中包括佛林纳斯提事故以及蓝河监狱的破坏行动。部分出于我前任的判断失误，认为此人年事已高且缺乏实战经验故而威胁不大，导致此人的档案被封存多年。这是一个不可原谅的错误（该成员已被召回艾琳诺接受处罚和再教育）。该事件是对所有成员的教训，不可出于任何理由而低估刀锋会探员。要把他们每个人都揪出来，施以正义的制裁。 对策摘要： 在巨龙回归的原因和意义尚不明朗时，我将抓捕伊思本列为最首要的任务，因为众所周知他是刀锋会中龙类学识的专家。遗憾的是，我们关于龙的知识还赶不上他们。他们的这些知识是来自他们的阿卡维尔出身，且目前很大程度仍然远远超过我们那些大多仅存在于理论上对于龙的认识。据说凌云者神殿的档案馆保存了多数最古老的刀锋会学识，但大多在围攻期间被毁。尽管我们已经尽很大努力重整遗失的资料，目前看来，似乎大多数与龙相关的记录在我们进攻之前就已经被摧毁或者转移了。因此伊思本的存在是我们学习巨龙回归方式和原因的绝佳机会。不排除刀锋会本身与巨龙的回归在某种程度上存在联系的可能性。 近期我们获得可靠消息称伊思本还活着，藏身在裂谷某地。针对疑似目击者的审问工作正在进行。我们的行动务必要谨慎，谨防打草惊蛇。如果他确实在裂谷，那绝不能让他逃脱。 </font>

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> Description of target: Bosmer male, goes by Malborn. Believed to be working for the Blades, so approach with caution. He has inside knowledge of our procedures, so he will be warier than usual. Malborn is not his real name - he's now been identified as a survivor of a family of traitors who were all believed to have died in a fire in Falinesti. Do not risk him evading us. He's likely trying to leave Skyrim. Make sure of your kill, and do not implicate us. </font>
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> 目标描述： 波斯莫男性，名马伯恩。应为刀锋会协助者，所以小心行事。 该目标知道我们的内部情况，所以会格外小心。马伯恩并非本名，现在已确认为叛徒家族的幸存者，该家族本已认定在法林纳斯提的火灾中身亡。 别冒险惊动，导致目标躲避我们。他可能试图离开天际。确保杀死目标，不要牵扯到我们。 </font>

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: MQ201MalbornAssassinNote
Translations:
- BOOK:DESC | EN: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> Description of target: Bosmer male, goes by Malborn. Believed to be working for the Blades, so approach with caution. He has inside knowledge of our procedures, so he will be warier than usual. Malborn is not his real name - he's now been identified as a survivor of a family of traitors who were all believed to have died in a fire in Falinesti. Do not risk him evading us. He's likely trying to leave Skyrim. Make sure of your kill, and do not implicate us. </font> | ZH: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> 目标描述： 波斯莫男性，名马伯恩。应为刀锋会协助者，所以小心行事。 该目标知道我们的内部情况，所以会格外小心。马伯恩并非本名，现在已确认为叛徒家族的幸存者，该家族本已认定在法林纳斯提的火灾中身亡。 别冒险惊动，导致目标躲避我们。他可能试图离开天际。确保杀死目标，不要牵扯到我们。 </font> | SID: 0049D8

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> Status: Asset (uncooperative), Dormant, Emissary Level Approval Description: Jarl of Windhelm, leader of Stormcloak rebellion, Imperial Legion veteran Background: Ulfric first came to our attention during the First War Against the Empire, when he was taken as a prisoner of war during the campaign for the White-Gold Tower. Under interrogation, we learned of his potential value (son of the Jarl of Windhelm) and he was assigned as an asset to the interrogator, who is now First Emissary Elenwen. He was made to believe information obtained during his interrogation was crucial in the capture of the Imperial City (the city had in fact fallen before he had broken), and then allowed to escape. After the war, contact was established and he has proven his worth as an asset.The so-called Markarth Incident was particularly valuable from the point of view of our strategic goals in Skyrim, although it resulted in Ulfric becoming generally uncooperative to direct contact. Operational Notes: Direct contact remains a possibility (under extreme circumstances), but in general the asset should be considered dormant. As long as the civil war proceeds in its current indecisive fashion, we should remain hands-off. The incident at Helgen is an example where an exception had to be made - obviously Ulfric's death would have dramatically increased the chance of an Imperial victory and thus harmed our overall position in Skyrim. (NOTE: The coincidental intervention of the dragon at Helgen is still under scrutiny. The obvious conclusion is that whoever is behind the dragons also has an interest in the continuation of the war, but we should not assume therefore that their goals align with our own.) A Stormcloak victory is also to be avoided, however, so even indirect aid to the Stormcloaks must be carefully managed. </font>
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> 状态：有利用价值（不合作），停止活动，特使级别许可 描述：风舵城领主，风暴斗篷起义军领袖，帝国军团退伍军人 背景： 我们是在对抗帝国的“第一次战争”中首次注意到乌弗瑞克，当时他是白金塔战役中的俘虏。在审讯过程中，我们认识到他的潜在价值（风舵城领主之子），他的审讯人，如今的首席特使爱琳温认定其有利用价值。我们使他相信，我们在审讯期间获悉的情报对于攻占白金塔至关重要（事实上在他越狱前我们就已经攻陷了这座城市），然后我们让他逃脱。战后，我们建立了接触途径，他证明了自己是一位很有利用价值的对象。从我们在天际的战略目标来看，所谓“马卡斯事件”尤其有价值，尽管此事导致乌弗瑞克不再愿意与我们直接接触。 对策摘要： 在极端情况下，我们仍然可能进行直接接触，但是总体上其价值应视为蛰伏状态。只要内战情况以目前这种摇摆不定的情况发展，我们就不应该插手。海尔根事故就是一个例外，很明显乌弗瑞克之死会急剧增加帝国的胜算，进而损害我们在天际的整体地位。（注：海尔根有龙突然介入仍在调查中。结论显而易见，不论是谁幕后指使龙族，他们对战争的进行也感兴趣，然而我们不能因此就认定他们的目标与我们一致）。不过我们也应避免风暴斗篷获胜，因此即使是对风暴斗篷进行间接援助也应谨慎安排。 </font>
梭默档案：乌弗瑞克·风暴斗篷

Under interrogation, we learned of his potential value (son of the Jarl of Windhelm) and he was assigned as an asset to the interrogator, who is now First Emissary Elenwen. He was made to believe information obtained during his interrogation was crucial in the capture of the Imperial City (the city had in fact fallen before he had broken), and then allowed to escape. translations.english: The Thalmor are just as puzzled as we are about why dragons are returning. I learned that they are looking for a Blade named Esbern, who Delphine says is an expert on ancient dragon lore. We need to find him before the Thalmor do.
translations.chinese: 梭默和我们一样为龙族回归的事困惑不已。我查明他们想要找到一个叫伊思本的刀锋会成员，戴尔芬说他是研究古代龙族知识的专家。我们得在梭默之前找到他。

translations.english: The Thalmor are just as puzzled as we are about why dragons are returning. I learned that they are looking for a Blade named Esbern, who is supposed to be an expert on ancient dragon lore. I found Esbern hiding in the Ratway in Riften, and convinced him to let me in to explain myself.
translations.chinese: 梭默和我们一样为龙族回归的事困惑不已。我查明他们想要找到一个叫伊思本的刀锋会成员，据说他是研究古代龙族知识的专家。我打听到伊思本躲在裂谷城的鼠道里，并尝试说服他让我进门解释。

translations.english: The Thalmor are just as puzzled as we are about why dragons are returning. I learned that they are looking for a Blade named Esbern, who is supposed to be an expert on ancient dragon lore. I've learned that he's hiding out in the Ratway Warrens in Riften.
translations.chinese: 梭默和我们一样为龙族回归的事困惑不已。我查明他们想要找到一个叫伊思本的刀锋会成员，据说他是研究古代龙族知识的专家。我打听到他藏在裂谷城的鼠道窝棚里。

translations.english:
Annals of the Dragonguard 2800-2819

Scribe's Note: I have faithfully copied the following from the Annals of the Dragonguard of Sky Haven Temple for the years 2800-2819 (4329-4338 in the Old Calendar), Brother Annulus, 2E 568. 2801: Emperor Kastav again ordered the Dragonguard to sieze hostages from Markarth and Hroldan to ensure that the jarls meet their conscription quotas. Our Master's official protest was denied, as usual. This will make relations with the local populace more difficult, although the "hostages" are in fact housed and trained with the other acolytes. 2804: Upon the outbreak of the Winterhold Rebellion, our Master refused orders to send the Dragonguard out to help supress the rebellion. The Emperor ordered our supplies cut off, but we have made arrangements with the local Reachmen and are effectively self-sufficient. The Grandmaster supports our Master's action on the grounds that it violates the Oath of Allegiance. 2805: The Temple is besieged. The fool Kalien was sent to Winterhold and sacked the city. There was a reason he was denied entry into the Dragonguard. But the local people do not count the difference between Akaviri. All our years of building up trust with people of Skyrim are now for naught. 2806: We learned of the accession of Reman II (of blessed name) when the siege of the Temple was lifted. We provided the honor guard for the Emperor's first visit to Skyrim, a great boost to the Temple's prestige. 2809: We received reports of a dragon in the east. Scouts were sent immediately, and signs of it were discovered, but it fled at our approach. The survivors have grown wary indeed. 2812: We finally received permission from the Emperor to begin construction of Alduin's Wall. Craftsmen from Temples across the Empire have arrived and begun the great work, overseen by our own Master, as is only fitting, as she is unmatched in her dragonlore. 2813: Work on Alduin's Wall progresses. The Master dismissed several craftsmen (from a western Temple that I do not need to name, they are so well-known for stiff-necked pride), which has delayed the work, but there must be no compromise. Alduin's Wall is our gift to those that come after us. 2815: The Grandmaster visited the Temple in the summer to view the progress of the Wall. He has received complaints about the expense (there is no doubt where these originate), but he was so impressed by the Wall even in its half-finished state that he gave our Master a Writ of Requisition under the Emperor's seal. There will be no more delays! Further reports of dragons in the east which could not be verified. 2818: An auspicious year. Alduin's Wall was finished, a dragon was located and slain, and Emperor Reman II visited to officially dedicate the Wall. The Blood Seal was consecrated in the presence of all the Dragonguard of Skyrim, a great honor of which few Temples can boast.
translations.chinese:
龙卫编年史 2800-2819

抄录记：我忠实地从安努鲁斯修士2E568年写于天佑神殿的《龙卫编年史》中抄录了2800—2819年（旧历法4329-4338年）部分。 2801：卡斯塔夫皇帝再次命令龙卫从马卡斯与霍尔丹扣押人质，以确保领主们足额征兵。我们的宗师提出的正式抗议一如既往遭到了拒绝。这使得与当地民众的关系越发紧张。尽管“人质”实际上是和其他侍僧一样被安置与训练的。 2804：冬堡起义爆发时，宗师拒绝了派龙卫镇压叛乱的命令。皇帝下令切断了我们的补给，但我们已经与当地瑞驰人达成协议，现在可以自给自足了。大宗师支持了我们宗师的行为，因为这些命令违背了我们的效忠誓言。 2805：神殿被围困了。愚不可及的卡里恩被派往了冬堡，洗劫了那座城市。拒绝他加入龙卫不为无因。但当地人并没有考虑阿卡维尔人之间的区别。我们多年以来与天际居民建立信任的努力全部付之东流了。 2806：当神殿之围解除时，我们得知了雷曼二世（愿这个名字得到祝福）加冕了。我们为皇帝首次出访天际提供仪仗队，这大大提升了神殿的声望。 2809：我们收到报告，东边有龙出没。我们立即派出侦察兵，发现了它的踪迹，但它在我们接近时逃走了。幸存的龙确实是变警惕了。 2812：我们终于获得了皇帝的许可，开始建造奥杜因之墙。来自帝国各地神殿的工匠齐聚这里，在我们宗师的监督下开始这项伟大的工程，也只有她能担得起这项任务，因为她关于龙的知识无人出其右。 2813:奥杜因之墙的工作正在开展。宗师解雇了几个工匠(来自一个我不知道名字的西部神庙，他们素来强项傲慢)，虽然这会耽搁工程，但绝不能妥协。奥杜因之墙是我们送给后人的礼物。 2815：大宗师在夏天参观了神殿，视察墙的建造进展。他曾收到过关于花费过高的抱怨（这倒是事实），但他对这未完工的墙印象很深，所以给了我们宗师一份加盖皇帝印玺的征用令状。这下不会再延误了！ 关于东边巨龙出没的进一步报告无法得到证实。 2818：吉祥之年。奥杜因之墙竣工了，找到了一头龙并杀掉，雷曼二世陛下也前来为墙揭幕。血印在全天际龙卫见证下神圣地刻下，这是很少有神殿能得到的荣耀。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim EDID: MQ202SkyHavenBook Translations: - BOOK:DESC | EN:

Annals of the Dragonguard 2800-2819

Scribe's Note: I have faithfully copied the following from the Annals of the Dragonguard of Sky Haven Temple for the years 2800-2819 (4329-4338 in the Old Calendar), Brother Annulus, 2E 568. 2801: Emperor Kastav again ordered the Dragonguard to sieze hostages from Markarth and Hroldan to ensure that the jarls meet their conscription quotas. Our Master's official protest was denied, as usual. This will make relations with the local populace more difficult, although the "hostages" are in fact housed and trained with the other acolytes. 2804: Upon the outbreak of the Winterhold Rebellion, our Master refused orders to send the Dragonguard out to help supress the rebellion. The Emperor ordered our supplies cut off, but we have made arrangements with the local Reachmen and are effectively self-sufficient. The Grandmaster supports our Master's action on the grounds that it violates the Oath of Allegiance. 2805: The Temple is besieged. The fool Kalien was sent to Winterhold and sacked the city. There was a reason he was denied entry into the Dragonguard. But the local people do not count the difference between Akaviri. All our years of building up trust with people of Skyrim are now for naught. 2806: We learned of the accession of Reman II (of blessed name) when the siege of the Temple was lifted. We provided the honor guard for the Emperor's first visit to Skyrim, a great boost to the Temple's prestige. 2809: We received reports of a dragon in the east. Scouts were sent immediately, and signs of it were discovered, but it fled at our approach. The survivors have grown wary indeed. 2812: We finally received permission from the Emperor to begin construction of Alduin's Wall. Craftsmen from Temples across the Empire have arrived and begun the great work, overseen by our own Master, as is only fitting, as she is unmatched in her dragonlore. 2813: Work on Alduin's Wall progresses. The Master dismissed several craftsmen (from a western Temple that I do not need to name, they are so well-known for stiff-necked pride), which has delayed the work, but there must be no compromise. Alduin's Wall is our gift to those that come after us. 2815: The Grandmaster visited the Temple in the summer to view the progress of the Wall. He has received complaints about the expense (there is no doubt where these originate), but he was so impressed by the Wall even in its half-finished state that he gave our Master a Writ of Requisition under the Emperor's seal. There will be no more delays! Further reports of dragons in the east which could not be verified. 2818: An auspicious year. Alduin's Wall was finished, a dragon was located and slain, and Emperor Reman II visited to officially dedicate the Wall. The Blood Seal was consecrated in the presence of all the Dragonguard of Skyrim, a great honor of which few Temples can boast. | ZH:

龙卫编年史 2800-2819

抄录记：我忠实地从安努鲁斯修士2E568年写于天佑神殿的《龙卫编年史》中抄录了2800—2819年（旧历法4329-4338年）部分。 2801：卡斯塔夫皇帝再次命令龙卫从马卡斯与霍尔丹扣押人质，以确保领主们足额征兵。我们的宗师提出的正式抗议一如既往遭到了拒绝。这使得与当地民众的关系越发紧张。尽管“人质”实际上是和其他侍僧一样被安置与训练的。 2804：冬堡起义爆发时，宗师拒绝了派龙卫镇压叛乱的命令。皇帝下令切断了我们的补给，但我们已经与当地瑞驰人达成协议，现在可以自给自足了。大宗师支持了我们宗师的行为，因为这些命令违背了我们的效忠誓言。 2805：神殿被围困了。愚不可及的卡里恩被派往了冬堡，洗劫了那座城市。拒绝他加入龙卫不为无因。但当地人并没有考虑阿卡维尔人之间的区别。我们多年以来与天际居民建立信任的努力全部付之东流了。 2806：当神殿之围解除时，我们得知了雷曼二世（愿这个名字得到祝福）加冕了。我们为皇帝首次出访天际提供仪仗队，这大大提升了神殿的声望。 2809：我们收到报告，东边有龙出没。我们立即派出侦察兵，发现了它的踪迹，但它在我们接近时逃走了。幸存的龙确实是变警惕了。 2812：我们终于获得了皇帝的许可，开始建造奥杜因之墙。来自帝国各地神殿的工匠齐聚这里，在我们宗师的监督下开始这项伟大的工程，也只有她能担得起这项任务，因为她关于龙的知识无人出其右。 2813:奥杜因之墙的工作正在开展。宗师解雇了几个工匠(来自一个我不知道名字的西部神庙，他们素来强项傲慢)，虽然这会耽搁工程，但绝不能妥协。奥杜因之墙是我们送给后人的礼物。 2815：大宗师在夏天参观了神殿，视察墙的建造进展。他曾收到过关于花费过高的抱怨（这倒是事实），但他对这未完工的墙印象很深，所以给了我们宗师一份加盖皇帝印玺的征用令状。这下不会再延误了！ 关于东边巨龙出没的进一步报告无法得到证实。 2818：吉祥之年。奥杜因之墙竣工了，找到了一头龙并杀掉，雷曼二世陛下也前来为墙揭幕。血印在全天际龙卫见证下神圣地刻下，这是很少有神殿能得到的荣耀。 | SID: 000880 - BOOK:FULL | EN: Annals of the Dragonguard | ZH: 龙卫编年史 | SID: 00B442

translations.english: Crazy old coot, from what I've heard. For that to stand out down here, he must really be off his nut.
translations.chinese: 老疯子一个。他能在那坚持住那么久，肯定疯的厉害。

translations.english: He's holed up in the Ratway Warrens. Hardly ever leaves the place - has someone bring him food and such.
translations.chinese: 他躲在鼠道窝棚里从不出来。可能有人给他带点食物什么的。

translations.english: Who else is looking for Esbern?

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: MQ202WhosHuntingForEsbernTopic
Translations:
- DIAL:FULL | EN: Who else is looking for Esbern? | ZH: 还有谁在找伊思本？ | SID: 00E712

translations.english: I've gotten to the Blades loremaster Esbern ahead of the Thalmor. I hope he's as knowledgeable about dragons as Delphine promised.
translations.chinese: 我赶在梭默之前找到了刀锋会的博学者伊思本。但愿他如戴尔芬所言，对龙族十分了解。

translations.english: I found the Blades loremaster Esbern and brought him to Riverwood to talk to Delphine. He believes that the secret to defeating Alduin will be revealed by Alduin's Wall, an artifact created by the ancient Blades. We need to go to Sky Haven Temple to find Alduin's Wall and see what it can tell us.
translations.chinese: 我找到了刀锋会的博学者伊思本，并带他到河木镇找到了戴尔芬。他认为打败奥杜因的秘密藏在由古代刀锋会建造的奥杜因之墙上。我们需要前往天佑神殿，找到奥杜因之墙，看看能够找到些什么线索。

translations.english: I found the Blades loremaster Esbern and brought him to Riverwood to talk to Delphine. He believed that the secret to defeating Alduin would be revealed by Alduin's Wall, an artifact created by the ancient Blades. We went to the hidden Blades stronghold of Sky Haven Temple, and found Alduin's Wall inside. It showed that Alduin was defeated in the past by some kind of Shout.
translations.chinese: 我找到了刀锋会的博学者伊思本，并带他到河木镇找到了戴尔芬。他认为打败奥杜因的秘密藏在由古代刀锋会建造的奥杜因之墙上。我们前往了名为天佑神殿的刀锋会隐秘要塞。奥杜因之墙表明，奥杜因在古代是被某种龙吼击败了。
护送伊思本前往河木镇

translations.english: Learn the secret of Alduin's Wall
translations.chinese: 了解奥杜因之墙的秘密

translations.english: Gain entrance to Sky Haven Temple

translations.english: We'll look around Sky Haven Temple and see what else the old Blades might have left for us. It's a better hideout than I could have hoped for.
translations.chinese: 我们会在天佑神殿四处转转，看看以前的刀锋们有没有给咱们留下些什么。这里是个不错的藏身处。

translations.english: Right. Good thing they've already let you into their little cult. Not likely they'd help Esbern or me if we came calling.
translations.chinese: 对。幸好他们把你当做了他们小团体的一员。要是我和伊思本去找他们，他们应该不会帮我们。

translations.english: Alduin's Wall... one of the lost secrets of the Blades. Where they recorded all they knew of Alduin and his return. Part history, part prophecy.

translations.english: With Esbern's help, I've deciphered Alduin's Wall in Sky Haven Temple. It revealed that Alduin was defeated in ancient times by a Shout of some kind. Maybe the Greybeards can teach me this Shout, or at least tell me how I can learn it.
translations.chinese: 在伊思本的帮助下。我破解了天佑神殿的奥杜因之墙。它表明，奥杜因在古代是被一种龙吼打败的。灰胡子也许能教我，或者告诉我怎么去学。

translations.english: With Esbern's help, I've deciphered Alduin's Wall in Sky Haven Temple. It revealed that Alduin was defeated in ancient times by a Shout of some kind. Arngeir sent me to talk to Paarthurnax, who he said was the only one who might know this Dragonrend Shout. It turns out that Paarthurnax is actually a dragon.
translations.chinese: 在伊思本的帮助下。我破解了天佑神殿的奥杜因之墙。它表明，奥杜因在古代是被一种龙吼打败的。艾恩盖尔让我去找帕图纳克斯，说只要他知道“龙魂撕裂”龙吼。结果我发现，帕图纳克斯是一头龙。

translations.english: With Esbern's help, I've deciphered Alduin's Wall in Sky Haven Temple. It revealed that Alduin was defeated in ancient times by a Shout of some kind. Arngeir sent me to talk to Paarthurnax, the Greybeards' leader, who turned out to be a dragon. Paarthurnax didn't know the Dragonrend Shout, but believes that there's a way for me to learn it from the ancient heroes who used it against Alduin.
translations.chinese: 在伊思本的帮助下。我破解了天佑神殿的奥杜因之墙。它表明，奥杜因在古代是被一种龙吼打败的。艾恩盖尔让我去找灰胡子的领袖，帕图纳克斯。我发现他其实是龙。帕图纳克斯也不知道“龙魂撕裂”。但他说我可以从反抗奥杜因的古代英雄们那里学的到。

translations.english: With Esbern's help, I've deciphered Alduin's Wall in Sky Haven Temple. It revealed that Alduin was defeated in ancient times by a Shout of some kind. Arngeir knew the name of the Shout, "Dragonrend", but could not teach it to me. However, he has agreed to show me the way to reach Paarthurnax, the Greybeards' leader, who lives at the top of the Throat of the World. Arngeir says that Paarthurnax is the only one who may know this Dragonrend Shout.
translations.chinese: 在伊思本的帮助下。我破解了天佑神殿的奥杜因之墙。它表明，奥杜因在古代是被一种龙吼打败的。艾恩盖尔知道那龙吼叫做“龙魂撕裂”，却不能教我。但他同意指明去找帕图纳克斯的路。帕图纳克斯是灰胡子们的领袖，住在世界之喉山巅。他可能是唯一知道“龙魂撕裂”的人。

translations.english: Use your "Fire Breath" Shout on Paarthurnax
translations.chinese: 对帕图纳克斯使用“烈焰吐息”

translations.english: Learn the Word of Power from Paarthurnax
translations.chinese: 从帕图纳克斯处学习力量之语

translations.english: Use the "Clear Skies" Shout to open the path

translations.english: In order to learn and use this Shout, you will be taking this evil into yourself.

translations.chinese: 你学会一种龙吼之后，会把它带入自身的本质。某种意义上，你就成为龙吼。

translations.english: I met the master of the Greybeards, the dragon Paarthurnax. He told me that the ancient Nords used an Elder Scroll to cast Alduin forward in time. Now that I've recovered that Elder Scroll, I may be able to use it to learn the "Dragonrend" Shout directly from the ancient heroes.
translations.chinese: 我见到了灰胡子的领袖，巨龙帕图纳克斯。他告诉我，古诺德人用上古卷轴将奥杜因放逐到了未来。现在我找回了上古卷轴，也许就能用它直接向古代英雄学习“龙魂撕裂”了。

translations.english: I met the master of the Greybeards, the dragon Paarthurnax. He told me that the ancient Nords used an Elder Scroll to cast Alduin forward in time. If I can recover that same Elder Scroll, I may be able to use it to learn the "Dragonrend" Shout directly from the ancient heroes. Arngeir suggested that someone at the College of Winterhold might know how to find this Elder Scroll.
translations.chinese: 我见到了灰胡子的领袖，巨龙帕图纳克斯。他告诉我，古诺德人用上古卷轴将奥杜因放逐到了未来。如果我能找回那卷上古卷轴，我就能从古代英雄那里直接学到“龙魂撕裂”。艾恩盖尔认为冬堡学院的人可能知道去哪里找到上古卷轴。

I've learned that a scholar named Septimus Signus might know where to find it.

translations.english: I read the Elder Scroll near the Time-Wound, and learned the Dragonrend Shout in a vision of the Nord heroes fighting Alduin in the distant past. Now I need to use Dragonrend to defeat Alduin in the present time.
translations.chinese: 我在时之痕附近阅读了上古卷轴，从遥远过去诺德英雄对抗奥杜因的场景中学会了龙魂撕裂。现在我要用龙魂撕裂打败此刻的奥杜因。

translations.english: I read the Elder Scroll near the Time-Wound, and learned the Dragonrend Shout in a vision of the Nord heroes fighting Alduin in the distant past. When I returned from the vision, Alduin attacked me, and I used Dragonrend to bring him down and defeat him.
translations.chinese: 我在时之痕附近阅读了上古卷轴，从遥远过去诺德英雄对抗奥杜因的场景中学会了龙魂撕裂。当我从幻象中回归，奥杜因袭来，我用龙魂撕裂击落并打败了他。

translations.english: I've located the Elder Scroll that was used to cast Alduin forward into our time by the Nord heroes of old. If Paarthurnax is right, if I read it near the Time-Wound I will get a vision of the past, when the ancient Nords used the Dragonrend Shout against Alduin.
translations.chinese: 我找到了古代诺德英雄用来将奥杜因放逐到我们时代的上古卷轴。如果帕图纳克斯说的没错，我在时之痕附近阅读它，就能看到过去，古诺德人用龙魂撕裂对抗奥杜因的场面。

translations.english: After I defeated Alduin on the top of the Throat of the World, he fled from me. One of his dragon allies may be able to tell me where he's gone. With the help of the Jarl of Whiterun, I've trapped the dragon Odahviing in Dragonsreach. Now to interrogate Odahviing and learn the location of Alduin's lair so I can finish him off, once and for all.
translations.chinese: 我在世界之喉之巅击败了奥杜因。他逃走了。他的龙族盟友也许能告诉我他的去向。在白漫城领主的帮助下，我在龙临宫活捉了巨龙傲达威英。现在我要审问傲达威英，找出奥杜因的藏身之处，这样我就能一劳永逸地解决他了。

translations.english: After I defeated Alduin on the top of the Throat of the World, he fled from me. One of his dragon allies may be able to tell me where he's gone. The Jarl of Whiterun has agreed to help me trap a dragon in Dragonsreach. I've learned a Shout which is the name of one of Alduin's allies, which should serve to bring him to the Dragonsreach courtyard so I can trap him there. Then I can interrogate the dragon and learn the location of Alduin's lair so I can finish him off, once and for all.
translations.chinese: 我在世界之喉之巅击败了奥杜因。他逃走了。他的龙族盟友也许能告诉我他的去向。白漫领主同意帮助我在龙临宫捕获巨龙。我已经学会了召唤奥杜因一位盟友名字的龙吼。应该能把他引到龙临宫的大门廊困起来。然后我就能审问奥杜因巢穴的具体位置并彻底消灭他了。

translations.english: After I defeated Alduin on the top of the Throat of the World, he fled from me. One of his dragon allies may be able to tell me where he's gone. The Jarl of Whiterun has agreed to help me trap a dragon in Dragonsreach. Then I can interrogate the dragon and learn the location of Alduin's lair so I can finish him off, once and for all.
translations.chinese: 我在世界之喉之巅击败了奥杜因。他逃走了。他的龙族盟友也许能告诉我他的去向。白漫领主同意帮助我在龙临宫捕获巨龙。这样我就能审问奥杜因巢穴的具体位置并彻底消灭他了。

translations.english: After I defeated Alduin on the top of the Throat of the World, he fled from me. One of his dragon allies may be able to tell me where he's gone. The Jarl of Whiterun has agreed to help me trap a dragon in Dragonsreach. Now I need some way to lure a dragon into the trap. Esbern or Paarthurnax might be able to help.
translations.chinese: 我在世界之喉之巅击败了奥杜因。他逃走了。他的龙族盟友也许能告诉我他的去向。白漫领主同意帮助我在龙临宫捕获巨龙。现在我需要想办法把龙引到陷阱中。伊思本或者帕图纳克斯也许能帮上忙。

translations.english: After I defeated Alduin on the top of the Throat of the World, he fled from me. One of his dragon allies may be able to tell me where he's gone. I've learned that Dragonsreach, the Jarl's palace in Whiterun, was once used to imprison a dragon. If I can arrange a truce in the civil war, the Jarl of Whiterun has agreed to help me trap a dragon in Dragonsreach. Then I can interrogate the dragon and learn the location of Alduin's lair so I can finish him off, once and for all.
translations.chinese: 我在世界之喉之巅击败了奥杜因。他逃走了。他的龙族盟友也许能告诉我他的去向。我得知白漫城领主的宫殿——龙临宫，曾经用来囚禁巨龙。如果我能安排内战休战，白漫领主同意帮我在龙临宫捕捉巨龙。然后我就可以审问奥杜因巢穴的具体位置并彻底消灭他了。

translations.english: After I defeated Alduin on the top of the Throat of the World, he fled from me. One of his dragon allies may be able to tell me where he's gone. I've learned that Dragonsreach, the Jarl's palace in Whiterun, was once used to imprison a dragon. I need to persuade the Jarl of Whiterun to help me trap a dragon in Dragonsreach.
translations.chinese: 我在世界之喉之巅击败了奥杜因。他逃走了。他的龙族盟友也许能告诉我他的去向。我得知白漫城领主的宫殿——龙临宫，曾经用来囚禁巨龙。我需要说服白漫领主帮助我在龙临宫捕获巨龙。

translations.english: After I defeated Alduin on the top of the Throat of the World, he fled from me. One of his dragon allies may be able to tell me where he's gone. With the help of the Jarl of Whiterun, I've trapped the dragon Odahviing in Dragonsreach. Odahviing revealed that Alduin's lair is located in the ancient temple of Skuldafn, which is only accessible by air. Odahviing has offered to take me there, in return for his freedom.
translations.chinese: 我在世界之喉之巅击败了奥杜因。他逃走了。他的龙族盟友也许能告诉我他的去向。在白漫城领主的帮助下，我在龙临宫活捉了巨龙傲达威英。傲达威英透露，奥杜因的巢穴在远古神庙斯库达芬，只能靠飞行到达。傲达威英提出带我过去，以换取自由。

translations.english: After I defeated Alduin on the top of the Throat of the World, he fled from me. I need to locate his lair so I can finish him off, once and for all.
translations.chinese: 我在世界之喉之巅击败了奥杜因。他逃走了。我需要找到他的老巢，一劳永逸地解决他。

translations.english: Talk to the Jarl of Whiterun

translations.chinese: 将傲达威英召唤到龙临宫
学会召唤傲达威英的龙吼

translations.english: Get Greybeards' help in negotiating a truce
translations.chinese: 在休战谈判中取得灰胡子的帮助

- QUST:CNAM [2/7] | EN: After I defeated Alduin on the top of the Throat of the World, he fled from me. One of his dragon allies may be able to tell me where he's gone. I've learned that Dragonsreach, the Jarl's palace in Whiterun, was once used to imprison a dragon. If I can arrange a truce in the civil war, the Jarl of Whiterun has agreed to help me trap a dragon in Dragonsreach. Then I can interrogate the dragon and learn the location of Alduin's lair so I can finish him off, once and for all. | ZH: 我在世界之喉之巅击败了奥杜因。他逃走了。他的龙族盟友也许能告诉我他的去向。我得知白漫城领主的宫殿——龙临宫，曾经用来囚禁巨龙。如果我能安排内战休战，白漫领主同意帮我在龙临宫捕捉巨龙。然后我就可以审问奥杜因巢穴的具体位置并彻底消灭他了。 | SID: 002C4E
- QUST:CNAM [1/7] | EN: After I defeated Alduin on the top of the Throat of the World, he fled from me. One of his dragon allies may be able to tell me where he's gone. - QUST:CNAM [7/7] | EN: After I defeated Alduin on the top of the Throat of the World, he fled from me. One of his dragon allies may be able to tell me where he's gone. translations.english: The Jarl of Whiterun won't help me capture a dragon as long as the civil war is raging. If I can get the Greybeards to host a peace council, I can try to convince the Imperials and the Stormcloaks to agree to a truce in order to defeat Alduin, who is a threat to both sides in the civil war.
translations.chinese: 白漫领主拒绝在内战持续的情况下帮助我捉龙。如果我能让灰胡子主持一次和平会议，就能说服帝国和风暴斗篷同意休战以击败奥杜因。奥杜因对于内战双方都是威胁。

translations.english: The Jarl of Whiterun wouldn't help me capture a dragon as long as the civil war was raging. Arngeir agreed to host a peace council at High Hrothgar. With Esbern's help, I persuaded General Tullius and Ulfric Stormcloak to agree to a truce in order to defeat Alduin, who is a threat to both sides in the civil war.
translations.chinese: 白漫领主拒绝在内战持续的情况下帮助我捉龙。艾恩盖尔同意在霍斯加修道院主持和平会议。在伊思本的帮助下，我说服了图留斯将军和乌弗瑞克·风暴斗篷正视奥杜因的威胁，休战以击败他。

translations.english: The captured dragon Odahviing has revealed that Alduin has escaped to Sovngarde, the Nord underworld, where he feeds on the souls of the dead. His portal to Sovngarde is located in the ancient dragon temple of Skuldafn, high in the Jerall Mountains. The only way to reach it is to set Odahviing free so he can fly me there.
translations.chinese: 被俘的巨龙傲达威英供述出奥杜因已经逃到了诺德的死后世界松加德，在那里以死者灵魂为食。他去往松加德的传送门位于杰拉尔山脉的古代龙族神庙中。去那里的唯一方法就是释放傲达威英，让他带我过去。

translations.english: The captured dragon Odahviing revealed that Alduin has escaped to Sovngarde, the Nord underworld, where he feeds on the souls of the dead. His portal to Sovngarde is located in the ancient dragon temple of Skuldafn, high in the Jerall Mountains. I set Odahviing free, and he flew me to Skuldafn as agreed. Now I just have to reach the portal.
translations.chinese: 被俘的巨龙傲达威英供述出奥杜因已经逃到了诺德的死后世界松加德，在那里以死者灵魂为食。他去往松加德的传送门位于杰拉尔山脉的古代龙族神庙中。我释放了傲达威英，他按照约定带我飞到了斯库达芬。现在我需要找到传送门。

translations.english: The captured dragon Odahviing revealed that Alduin has escaped to Sovngarde, the Nord underworld, where he feeds on the souls of the dead. His portal to Sovngarde is located in the ancient dragon temple of Skuldafn, high in the Jerall Mountains. I set Odahviing free, and he flew me to Skuldafn as agreed. I fought my way to the top of Skuldafn, and entered Alduin's portal to Sovngarde.
translations.chinese: 被俘的巨龙傲达威英供述出奥杜因已经逃到了诺德的死后世界松加德，在那里以死者灵魂为食。他去往松加德的传送门位于杰拉尔山脉的古代龙族神庙中。我释放了傲达威英，他按照约定带我飞到了斯库达芬。我奋力抵达斯库达芬之巅，进入了奥杜因通往松加德的传送门。

translations.english: I've passed through Alduin's portal into Sovngarde, the realm of Aetherius where the souls of Nord heroes go to feast and battle until the final reckoning. Now to find Alduin and defeat him once and for all.
translations.chinese: 我已经通过奥杜因的传送门进入了松加德。这里是光界的领域，诺德英灵们在那里欢宴战斗直至最终决战到来。我要去找奥杜因，彻底打败他。

translations.english: I've passed through Alduin's portal into Sovngarde, the realm of Aetherius where the souls of Nord heroes go to feast and battle until the final reckoning. Alduin has laid some kind of soul-snare across the valley of Sovngarde, a mist where he hides and feeds upon the trapped souls. My only hope is to reach the Hall of Heroes.
translations.chinese: 我已经通过奥杜因的传送门进入了松加德。这里是光界的领域，诺德英灵们在那里欢宴战斗直至最终决战到来。奥杜因在松加德的山谷中布下了某种灵魂陷阱，他藏身在迷雾中并以被困的灵魂为食。英雄大厅是我唯一的希望。

translations.english: I've passed through Alduin's portal into Sovngarde, the realm of Aetherius where the souls of Nord heroes go to feast and battle until the final reckoning. Alduin has laid some kind of soul-snare across the valley of Sovngarde, a mist where he hides and feeds upon the trapped souls. I reached the Hall of Heroes and met Gormlaith Golden-Hilt, Hakon One-Eye, and Felldir the Old - the three heroes who I saw defeat Alduin in my vision of the past. They have been permitted by Shor, the god of the underworld, to join me in my battle against Alduin.
translations.chinese: 我已经通过奥杜因的传送门进入了松加德。这里是光界的领域，诺德英灵们在那里欢宴战斗直至最终决战到来。奥杜因在松加德的山谷中布下了某种灵魂陷阱，他藏身在迷雾中并以被困的灵魂为食。我在英雄大厅遇到了“金剑柄”葛姆拉丝、“独眼”哈肯、“老者”费迪尔，我曾在幻象中看到这三位英雄击败了奥杜因。他们得到幽域之神舒尔的许可，加入了我对抗奥杜因的战斗。

translations.english: Find out how to defeat Alduin
translations.chinese: 找到击败奥杜因的方法

translations.english: Talk to the heroes of Sovngarde
translations.chinese: 与松加德的英雄们交谈

translations.english: Gain admittance to the Hall of Valor
translations.chinese: 获得进入勇士大厅的许可

translations.english: Gormlaith Golden-Hilt, Hakon One-Eye, and Felldir the Old have come to help me try to defeat Alduin. Together we may be strong enough to dispel the evil mist in which he hides. Once that is gone, he will have no choice but to face us in open battle.
translations.chinese: “金剑柄”葛姆拉丝、“独眼”哈肯、“老人”费迪尔来帮我击败奥杜因。只要我们齐心协力，也许就能驱散他藏身的邪恶迷雾。一旦迷雾消散，他将被迫与我们正面战斗。

translations.english: Gormlaith Golden-Hilt, Hakon One-Eye, and Felldir the Old have come to help me try to defeat Alduin. Together, we used Clear Skies to dispel the evil mist in which Alduin was hiding. We fought and defeated him. Sovngarde and Skyrim are now free from the fear of his return. I have fulfilled my destiny as Dragonborn.
translations.chinese: “金剑柄”葛姆拉丝、“独眼”哈肯、“老人”费迪尔来帮我击败奥杜因。我们齐心协力用澄澈天空驱散了他藏身的邪恶迷雾。我们击败了他。松加德和天际都不必再害怕他的回归了。我完成了作为龙裔的使命。

translations.english: Gormlaith Golden-Hilt, Hakon One-Eye, and Felldir the Old have come to help me try to defeat Alduin. Together, we used Clear Skies to dispel the evil mist in which Alduin was hiding. Now he has no choice but to face us in open battle.
translations.chinese: “金剑柄”葛姆拉丝、“独眼”哈肯、“老人”费迪尔来帮我击败奥杜因。我们齐心协力用澄澈天空驱散了他藏身的邪恶迷雾。他现在要被迫与我们正面战斗。

translations.english: This was a mighty deed! The doom of Alduin encompassed at last, and cleansed is Sovngarde of his evil snare.
translations.chinese: 了不起的伟业！奥杜因末日临头，它在松加德布下的邪恶陷阱也被扫清。

translations.english: When you have completed your count of days, I may welcome you again, with glad friendship, and bid you join the blessed feasting.
translations.chinese: 等你过完你的一生，我将再次友好地欢迎你，邀请你参加神圣的宴会。

translations.english: They will sing of this battle in Shor's hall forever. But your fate lies elsewhere.
translations.chinese: 他们会在舒尔的大厅永久传唱这场战斗，但你现下不该留在此处。

translations.english: He may be permitted to return at the end of time to fulfill his destiny as the World-Eater.
translations.chinese: 他也许会被允许在世界末日来临时回来完成世界吞噬者的使命。

translations.english: But that is for the gods to decide. You have done your part.
translations.chinese: 但那是诸神决定的事，你已经尽了你自己的本分。

translations.english: Perhaps, perhaps not. Dragons are not like normal mortal creatures, and Alduin is unique even among dragonkind.
translations.chinese: 或许死了，或许没有。奥杜因不是寻常凡类生物，即使在龙族中，他也是独一无二的。

translations.english: Trust me, there's no need to be afraid. Think of Tiber Septim. Do you think he'd have founded the Empire if he'd listened to the Greybeards?
translations.chinese: 信我吧，没什么可怕的。想想泰伯·塞普汀，要是他听从了灰胡子，还能建立帝国吗？

translations.english: The Greybeards are so afraid of power that they won't use it.
translations.chinese: 灰胡子们极为害怕力量，甚至不敢动用。

translations.english: If they had their way, you'd do nothing but sit up on their mountain with them and talk to the sky, or whatever it is they do.
translations.chinese: 如果按他们的方式，你什么都做不了。也就是和他们一起坐在山上冲着天空说话什么的。

translations.english: No. And they're afraid of you, of your power.
translations.chinese: 没有。而且他们害怕你，还有你的力量。

translations.english: Think about it. Have they tried to stop the civil war, or done anything about Alduin?
translations.chinese: 想想吧。他们有尝试阻止内战，或者做些什么来对抗奥杜因吗？

translations.english:
Atlas of Dragons 2E 373 Compiled by Brother Mathnan

[pagebreak] Herein is recorded the list of known dragons, both living and dead, including those slain by the Dragonguard since the time of its founding, as well as those slain in earlier ages, where they can be identified. Unfortunately, only a few of the dragons slain by our Akaviri predecessors during the Crusade were recorded and thus this list is sadly incomplete. [pagebreak] Deceased by Report Nahagliiv - Local tales name him as the dragon buried in the mound west of Rorikstead. No date associated with his death, although almost surely dates to the Dragon War era. Odahviing - Records dating to the Crusade of interrogation of captured Dragon Cultists indicate that this dragon was buried in a mound in the southeast of Skyrim, near Riften. Sahloknir - Local legends claim this is the dragon buried in the mound near Kyne's Grove, slain by the Nord hero Jorg Helmbolg in the First Era. Viinturuth - Death dating back to Dragon War era, according to documents recovered from Dragon Cult temples which record his burial near Lake Yorgrim. Vuljotnaak - Death dating back to Dragon War or just after, according to recovered Dragon Cult documents, which record his burial in a mound near Granite Hill. [pagebreak] Slain by the Dragonguard Grahkrindrog - Slain in 2E 184 after perpetrating great slaughter in Winterhold and Eastmarch. Name confirmed with assistance from the College mages. Krahjotdaan - Slain in 1E 2871 in the southern Jerall Mountains, name confirmed by the dragon's own account. Unnamed Dragons - Numbering 12, as recorded in the Annals dating back to the founding of Sky Haven Temple. [pagebreak] Known to Live Ahbiilok - Sightings dating back to the early years of the Dragonguard throughout the northern Jerralls. Multiple attempts to kill him have failed. He is believed to be lairing somewhere in Morrowind. Mirmulnir - Last sighted in the Reach in 2E 212. Nahfahlaar - Repeated alliances with mortal protectors which have prevented his elimination. His last known protector was the King Casimir II of Wayrest, which the Dragonguard successfully ended in 2E 369. He escaped and current location is unknown. Paarthurnax - The legendary lieutenant of Alduin in the Dragon War. He is now known to lair on the Throat of the World under the protection of the Greybeards of High Hrothgar. Master Araidh continues the established policy of avoiding direct confrontation with the Greybeards while waiting for an opportunity to exact justice upon him.
translations.chinese:
巨龙图志 2E373年 马斯南修士 著

[pagebreak] 这里记录已知的龙族名录，包括仍存活的和已死的，已死的记录可辨别是早期被杀还是龙卫成立以来被杀。不幸的是，神圣远征中被我们的祖先阿卡维尔人杀死的龙只有少数被记录下来，因此这个名单很遗憾是不完整的。 [pagebreak] 已死报告 纳哈格立夫-当地传说称他就是埋在洛利克镇西边龙冢里的龙。没有关于他死亡的确切日期，只能确定是巨龙战争时期。 傲达威英-讨伐被俘拜龙教教徒的记录显示，该龙被埋在天际东南接近裂谷城的一个龙冢里。 撒洛克尼尔-当地传说称他就是埋在凯娜之林附近龙冢里的龙。于第一纪元被诺德英雄约格·海姆伯格讨伐。 维图鲁斯-死亡时间可追溯到巨龙战争时代，根据从拜龙教神庙里找到的文书，他被埋在约格利姆湖附近。 福爵纳克-死亡时间可追溯到巨龙战争时期或战争刚刚结束，根据复原的拜龙教文书，他被埋在花岗岩山附近的龙冢里。 [pagebreak] 被龙卫所杀的 格拉克林德罗格-2E184年在冬堡及东陲两领内犯下大屠杀后被杀。学院法师协助下，名字得以确认。 克拉爵丹尼-1E2871年讨伐于杰拉尔山脉南部，该龙亲口描述了自己的名字。 无名龙-编号12，根据编年史记载，可以追溯到天佑神殿建立。 [pagebreak] 已知存活的 阿比洛克-龙卫早年在杰拉尔山脉北部发现其踪迹。多次尝试杀死未果。该龙可能藏匿在晨风某地。 米拉墨尼尔-最后一次发现记录为2E212年的瑞驰。 纳法拉尔-多次与凡人结盟，庇护者阻止他被消灭。最后一个已知的庇护者是途歇国王卡西米尔二世，龙卫在2E369年成功结束了他的统治。该龙现已逃脱，目前下落不明。 帕图纳克斯-巨龙战争中奥杜因的传奇副将。他现在由霍斯加修道院的灰胡子保护，藏身于世界之喉。宗师阿莱伊德继续执行既定政策，避免与灰胡子直接对抗，同时等待对他的正义审判。

translations.english: Eltrys has asked me to uncover evidence surrounding the murder of woman in Markarth's marketplace, who was attacked in broad daylight by a man claiming to be a member of the Forsworn.
translations.chinese: 艾翠斯请我找出马卡斯市场一名女子被杀的证据，她在光天化日之下被一名声称是弃誓者的男子袭击了。

translations.english: I've received a note from a man named Eltrys in Markarth. He wants me to meet him at the Shrine of Talos, presumably to talk about the recent murder in Markarth's marketplace.
translations.chinese: 我收到一封马卡斯城艾翠斯写的信。他约我到塔洛斯祭坛会面，大概是与最近发生在马卡斯城市场的谋杀案有关。

translations.english: Eltrys is dead, and I've been framed for his murder. My only option to clear my name is to let myself be imprisoned inside Cidhna Mine and locate Madanach, the King in Rags.
translations.chinese: 艾翠斯死了，我被诬陷谋杀了他。唯一洗清我罪名的办法就是在关押我的希讷矿场里找到“褴褛王”迈德纳奇。

translations.english: [pagebreak]<font face='$HandwrittenFont'> Meeting at the Treasury House later today. Took them long enough. These people act like they own everything. Thonar Silver-Blood is the younger brother, but he's obviously the one in charge. Makes all the deals, bullies local landowners into selling to him. Even employs that wispy girl at the door to deter "trouble-makers" like me. General Tullius is growing impatient, but I'll bring back the deed to Cidhna Mine. On my life, I won't allow a group of Stormcloak sympathizers to own the prison to the most notorious criminals of the Reach. They say no one escapes. Why? Is it really that secure? Maybe I've played my hand too soon by rushing the confrontation with Thonar. There are shadows around every corner in this city, and I know I'm being watched. </Font>
translations.chinese: [pagebreak]<font face='$HandwrittenFont'> 今天晚些时候在珍宝屋开会。他们花了很长时间。表现得好像自己拥有一切。 托纳尔·银血虽然是弟弟，但很明显掌握话语权。所有交易都是他的手笔，强迫当地的地主把地卖给他。甚至用门口那个柔弱的女孩来阻止我这样的“麻烦制造者”。 图留斯将军越发不耐烦了，但我会拿回希讷矿场的契约。我以生命起誓，我不会允许一群风暴斗篷的支持者把监狱交给瑞驰地区最臭名昭著的罪犯。他们说没人能逃脱。谁信？真的有那么安全？ 也许我过早与托纳尔对峙了。这座城市每个角落都有影子，我知道我被监视了。 </Font>

translations.english: [pagebreak]<font face='$HandwrittenFont'> I grow guilt-ridden in my old age. So many of the young sent to their deaths. All in the name of the Forsworn. All in the name of Madanach. My king. Who watches us from behind the iron bars of Cidhna Mine. How long have I served you? Since the uprising against the Nords? Was there ever a time when all that violence hasn't over-shadowed our destinies? What choice do I have but to do as I am instructed? </font>
translations.chinese: [pagebreak]<font face='$HandwrittenFont'> 人老了就会内疚。很多人被送去送死。全都是以弃誓者之名，以迈德纳奇之名。 我的王。他在希讷矿场的铁窗后注视着我们。我为您效忠多久了？从反抗诺德人的起义开始吗？是否曾经有那么一段时间，任何暴力都不能遮蔽我们的命运吗？ 除了按指示去做，我还有什么选择？ </font>

Was there ever a time when all that violence hasn't over-shadowed our destinies? translations.english: I've been playing this game for almost 20 years. Sending the young to their deaths. All in the name of the Forsworn. And I'm tired. So tired.
translations.chinese: 我玩这场游戏已经玩了20年。以弃誓者之名送年轻人去死。我累了。太累了。

translations.english: Ah, yes. You've proven to be a real bloodhound. Well, you've sniffed me out.
translations.chinese: 啊，没错。你已经证明了自己是个好侦探。别说，你还真把我嗅出来了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: MS01ThonarDealTopic
Translations:
- DIAL:FULL | EN: You made a deal with the Forsworn? | ZH: 你与弃誓者做了交易？ | SID: 0061AD

translations.english: [pagebreak]<font face='$HandwrittenFont'> Madanach is becoming unruly. You'd think that 20 years in prison would calm a beast like him down a bit. Maybe I should have let the Jarl execute him after the uprising after all. Still, he's been invaluable in getting rid of several "problems" over the years. Maybe I'm overreacting. No one knows about our little arrangement. Not even the Forsworn. I wonder how they would react knowing their "King in Rags" was one of my most important assets? This little shadow rebellion of his better not start to include me, though. If I find out he's even thinking about double-crossing me, I'll make sure he dies inside Cidhna Mine, like the animal he is. </font>
translations.chinese: [pagebreak]<font face='$HandwrittenFont'> 迈德纳奇开始不守规矩了。20年的牢狱之灾都没让这老畜生平静下来。也许早在叛乱结束时就该让领主处决他。 可尽管如此，这些年来他在解决某些“问题”方面还是发挥了不可估量的作用。也许是我反应过度了。没人知道我们之间的小约定。即使是弃誓者。我很想知道当他们知道了他们的“褴褛王”是我最重要的资产之一时会作何感想？ 不过他的小小阴谋叛乱最好别扯上我。如果发现他想卖我，我就让他像畜生一样死在希讷矿场。 </font>

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: MS01ThonarJournal
Translations:
- BOOK:DESC | EN: [pagebreak]<font face='$HandwrittenFont'> Madanach is becoming unruly. You'd think that 20 years in prison would calm a beast like him down a bit. Maybe I should have let the Jarl execute him after the uprising after all. Still, he's been invaluable in getting rid of several "problems" over the years. Maybe I'm overreacting. No one knows about our little arrangement. Not even the Forsworn. I wonder how they would react knowing their "King in Rags" was one of my most important assets? This little shadow rebellion of his better not start to include me, though. If I find out he's even thinking about double-crossing me, I'll make sure he dies inside Cidhna Mine, like the animal he is. </font> | ZH: [pagebreak]<font face='$HandwrittenFont'> 迈德纳奇开始不守规矩了。20年的牢狱之灾都没让这老畜生平静下来。也许早在叛乱结束时就该让领主处决他。 可尽管如此，这些年来他在解决某些“问题”方面还是发挥了不可估量的作用。也许是我反应过度了。没人知道我们之间的小约定。即使是弃誓者。我很想知道当他们知道了他们的“褴褛王”是我最重要的资产之一时会作何感想？ 不过他的小小阴谋叛乱最好别扯上我。如果发现他想卖我，我就让他像畜生一样死在希讷矿场。 </font> | SID: 00AA19

translations.english: I have helped Madanach escape Cidhna Mine, and he and his Forsworn have taken credit for all my past crime, clearing my name in the Reach.
translations.chinese: 我帮助迈德纳奇逃离了希讷矿场，他和弃誓者担负了我过去所有罪行，帮我洗脱了在瑞驰的罪名。

translations.english: Thonar Silver-Blood has granted me a pardon for killing Madanach. My name has now been cleared in the Reach.
translations.chinese: 托纳尔·银血赦免了我杀死迈德纳奇的罪行。我已经洗脱了在瑞驰的罪名。

translations.english: And after they made me watch as her head rolled off the block, they threw me in here anyway, to dig up their silver.
translations.chinese: 我眼睁睁看他们把她的头砍了下来掉在地上，然后又把我扔进了这里，去给他们挖银矿。

translations.english: But my little Aethra didn't want to see her papa leave her. She pleaded to the Jarl to take her instead.
translations.chinese: 但我的小艾瑟拉不希望爸爸被带走。她求领主把她带走。

translations.english: The Nords didn't care who was and who wasn't involved in the Forsworn Uprising. I had spoken to Madanach once, that was enough.
translations.chinese: 诺德人不关心到底谁参与了弃誓者叛乱。我和迈德纳奇说过话，这就足够了。

translations.english: I had a daughter, once. She'd be 23 this year. Married to some hot-headed silver worker or maybe on her own learning the herb trade.
translations.chinese: 我以前有个女儿。今年的话，也该23岁了。或许会嫁给个鲁莽的银匠，也可能自学草药生意。

translations.english: I am to be inducted into the Bards College at the Burning of King Olaf festival. Unfortunately the festival cannot begin until the effigy is done and Jorn will not complete it without General Tullius' Coat. I must steal the coat and return to Jorn.
translations.chinese: 我将在火烧奥拉夫王节上正式加入吟游诗人学院。不幸的是，如果没有图留斯将军的外套，乔恩是无法完成庆典必须的肖像的。我必须把外套偷来，然后回去找乔恩。

translations.english: I am to be inducted into the Bards College at the Burning of King Olaf festival. I should attend the festival in the Bards College courtyard in Solitude.
translations.chinese: 我将在火烧奥拉夫王节上正式加入吟游诗人学院。我应该去独孤城的吟游诗人学院参加节日庆典。

translations.english: I am to be inducted into the Bards College at the Burning of King Olaf festival. I must speak to Jorn who is in charge of preparing the Effigy.
translations.chinese: 我将在火烧奥拉夫王节上正式加入吟游诗人学院。我得去找负责准备奥拉夫王肖像的乔恩。

translations.english: I have applied at the Bards College. As part of the Application, I helped Headmaster Viarmo reconstruct King Olaf's Verse. I should go watch Viarmo present the verse to the court at the Blue Palace.
translations.chinese: 我申请加入吟游诗人学院。作为申请考核的一部分，我帮维阿墨院长重编了《奥拉夫王之诗》。我应该去蓝宫观看维阿墨的宫廷表演。

translations.english: I have applied at the Bards College. As part of the Application, Headmaster Viarmo asked me to retrieve King Olaf's Verse. Parts of the verse have decayed, I must help Viarmo reconstruct it so he can present it in court.
translations.chinese: 我申请加入吟游诗人学院。作为申请考核的一部分，维阿墨院长希望我找到《奥拉夫王之诗》。但诗句有部分已经腐朽，我必须帮维阿墨重新修复，这样他才能到宫廷呈上诗歌。

translations.english: I have been inducted into the Bards College in Solitude.
translations.chinese: 我正式加入了独孤城的吟游诗人学院。

translations.english: I am to be inducted into the Bards College at the Burning of King Olaf festival. Unfortunately the festival cannot begin until the effigy is done and Jorn will not complete it without General Tullius' Coat. I must place the coat on the effigy.
translations.chinese: 我将在火烧奥拉夫王节上正式加入吟游诗人学院。不幸的是，如果没有图留斯将军的外套，乔恩是无法完成庆典必须的肖像的。我必须把外套放在肖像上。

translations.english: I have applied at the Bards College. As part of the Application, I helped Headmaster Viarmo reconstruct King Olaf's Verse. The court has accepted the Verse I should speak to Viarmo about my application.
translations.chinese: 我申请加入吟游诗人学院。作为申请考核的一部分，我帮维阿墨院长重编了《奥拉夫王之诗》。领主宫廷已经接受了诗歌。我应该和维阿墨谈谈我的申请。

translations.english: I am to be inducted into the Bards College at the Burning of King Olaf festival. I've been told to speak to Jorn who is preparing the effigy of King Olaf.
translations.chinese: 我将在火烧奥拉夫王节上正式加入吟游诗人学院。我得去找乔恩，他正在准备奥拉夫王的肖像。

translations.english: I have applied at the Bards College. As part of the Application, Headmaster Viarmo wants me to find and bring to him King Olaf's Verse.
translations.chinese: 我申请加入吟游诗人学院。作为申请考核的一部分，维阿墨院长希望我找到《奥拉夫王之诗》带给他。

translations.english: Place the Coat on the Effigy

translations.chinese: 观看维阿墨演唱奥拉夫之诗

translations.english: Meet Viarmo at the Blue Palace

translations.chinese: 帮助维阿墨重整奥拉夫之诗
将奥拉夫王诗集交给维阿墨

translations.english: Attend The Burning of King Olaf

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> King Olaf's Verse O, Olaf, our subjugator, the one-eyed betrayer; death-dealing demon and dragon-killing King. Your legend is lies, lurid and false; your cunning capture of Numinex, a con for the ages. </font> <font face='$SkyrimBooks_UnreadableFont'> 12 2345 123 12345123 123 12312312 1234512 122345 1 23 1234 5123 12 3 1231 23121234512 </font> <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> Olaf grabbed power, by promise and threat; From Falkreath to Winterhold, they fell to their knees; But Solitude stood strong, Skyrim's truest protectors. Olaf's vengeance was instant, inspired and wicked. </font> <font face='$SkyrimBooks_UnreadableFont'> 12 2345 123 12345123 123 12312312 1234512 122345 1 23 1234 5123 12 3 1231 23121234512 </font> <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> So ends the story of Olaf the liar, a thief and a scoundrel we of Solitude commit to the fire. In Solitude bards train for their service, they also gather each year and burn a King who deserves it. </font>
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> 奥拉夫王之诗 哦，奥拉夫，我们的征服者、独眼的背叛者； 致命的魔头与屠龙王。 你的传说不过是耸人听闻的谎言； 你投机取巧捕获了怒米奈科斯，真真欺世盗名。 </font> <font face='$SkyrimBooks_UnreadableFont'> 12 2345 123 12345123 123 12312312 1234512 122345 1 23 1234 5123 12 3 1231 23121234512 </font> <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> 奥拉夫软硬兼施攫取权力； 从佛克瑞斯到冬堡，人人匍匐在地； 唯有独孤城依旧挺立，我们是天际最忠实的保护者。 奥拉夫的报复转瞬即至，又邪恶狡诈。 </font> <font face='$SkyrimBooks_UnreadableFont'> 12 2345 123 12345123 123 12312312 1234512 122345 1 23 1234 5123 12 3 1231 23121234512 </font> <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> 奥拉夫的故事就此告终，欺世盗名的窃国刁棍，我们独孤的人民将他扔到火里焚烧殆尽。 独孤城的吟游诗人训练有素，他们年年聚会，火烧一位罪有应得的王。 </font>

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: MS05KingOlafBook01
Translations:
- BOOK:DESC | EN: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> King Olaf's Verse O, Olaf, our subjugator, the one-eyed betrayer; death-dealing demon and dragon-killing King. Your legend is lies, lurid and false; your cunning capture of Numinex, a con for the ages. </font> <font face='$SkyrimBooks_UnreadableFont'> 12 2345 123 12345123 123 12312312 1234512 122345 1 23 1234 5123 12 3 1231 23121234512 </font> <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> Olaf grabbed power, by promise and threat; From Falkreath to Winterhold, they fell to their knees; But Solitude stood strong, Skyrim's truest protectors. Olaf's vengeance was instant, inspired and wicked. </font> <font face='$SkyrimBooks_UnreadableFont'> 12 2345 123 12345123 123 12312312 1234512 122345 1 23 1234 5123 12 3 1231 23121234512 </font> <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> So ends the story of Olaf the liar, a thief and a scoundrel we of Solitude commit to the fire. In Solitude bards train for their service, they also gather each year and burn a King who deserves it. </font> | ZH: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> 奥拉夫王之诗 哦，奥拉夫，我们的征服者、独眼的背叛者； 致命的魔头与屠龙王。 你的传说不过是耸人听闻的谎言； 你投机取巧捕获了怒米奈科斯，真真欺世盗名。 </font> <font face='$SkyrimBooks_UnreadableFont'> 12 2345 123 12345123 123 12312312 1234512 122345 1 23 1234 5123 12 3 1231 23121234512 </font> <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> 奥拉夫软硬兼施攫取权力； 从佛克瑞斯到冬堡，人人匍匐在地； 唯有独孤城依旧挺立，我们是天际最忠实的保护者。 奥拉夫的报复转瞬即至，又邪恶狡诈。 </font> <font face='$SkyrimBooks_UnreadableFont'> 12 2345 123 12345123 123 12312312 1234512 122345 1 23 1234 5123 12 3 1231 23121234512 </font> <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> 奥拉夫的故事就此告终，欺世盗名的窃国刁棍，我们独孤的人民将他扔到火里焚烧殆尽。 独孤城的吟游诗人训练有素，他们年年聚会，火烧一位罪有应得的王。 </font> | SID: 010323

translations.english: Potema has been summoned from beyond the grave and is gathering power. Styrr has given me the key to Potema's Catacombs. I must enter the catacombs and prevent Potema from fully resurrecting by acquiring her bones.

translations.english: Potema has been summoned from beyond the grave and is gathering power. Falk has sent me to Styrr to get the key to Potema's Catacombs.

translations.english: Potema has been summoned from beyond the grave. I've defeated her in the Catacombs and retrieved her bones. I must return them to Styrr for blessing and tell Falk Potema has been defeated.

Given your involvement with that event I'm asking you to return to Solitude to help us once more. I'm wary of putting all the details in print, please come see me at the Blue Palace. Sincerely, Falk Firebeard </font>
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> <Alias=Player>： 过去几天我们得到了一些令人不安的消息，与狼头骨洞穴事件以及你在那里打断的召唤绑定仪式有关。 鉴于你曾参与那次事件，我请求你能回独孤城再帮我们一个忙。我不敢将所有细节写明，请到蓝宫找我。 此致 “火胡”佛可 </font>

translations.english: I have defeated Jaree-Ra and his bandits.
translations.chinese: 我打败了加雷-拉强盗团。

translations.english: Jaree-Ra has betrayed me and taken the loot from the Icerunner. I've defeated his sister Deeja, now I must track down Jaree-Ra.
translations.chinese: 加雷-拉背叛了我，还从冰驰者号拿走了战利品。我打败了他姐妹蒂亚，现在我必须找到加雷-拉。

translations.english: I've put out the Solitude Lighthouse fire and the Icerunner has run aground. When I went to meet Deeja at the wreck things went horribly wrong. I must defeat Deeja to retrieve my share of the loot.
translations.chinese: 我熄灭了独孤城灯塔的火，冰驰者号搁浅了。我到搁浅现场的时候，蒂亚突然背叛。我必须打倒她才能拿回我那份战利品。

translations.english: I've put out the Solitude Lighthouse fire and the Icerunner has failed to dock. I am to head up Solitude's eastern shoreline to find where it's run aground and meet Deeja.
translations.chinese: 我熄灭了独孤城灯塔的火，冰驰者号没能靠岸。我得到独孤城东部海岸找到搁浅的船只，然后和蒂亚会合。

translations.english: I've put out the Solitude Lighthouse Fire. I must return to Jaree-Ra and find out if a ship has crashed.
translations.chinese: 我已经把独孤城灯塔的火熄灭了。我必须回加雷-拉那里看看船有没有出事。

translations.english: Jaree-Ra on the Solitude docks has an offer for me.
translations.chinese: 独孤城的加雷-拉给了我一个提议。

translations.english: Jaree-Ra has asked me to put out the Solitude lighthouse fire.
translations.chinese: 加雷-拉让我去扑灭独孤城灯塔的火。

translations.english: Jaree-Ra has betrayed me and taken the loot from the Icerunner to Camp Broken Oar. I must defeat Jaree-Ra.
translations.chinese: 加雷-拉背叛了我，还把冰驰者的战利品带到了破桨营地。我必须打败加雷-拉。

translations.english: Find Deeja at the Wreck of the Icerunner
translations.chinese: 在冰驰者号残骸找到蒂亚

translations.english: Listen to Jaree-Ra's offer in Solitude
translations.chinese: 在独孤城听加雷-拉的提议

translations.english: Put out the fire in the Solitude Lighthouse
translations.chinese: 熄灭独孤灯塔上的篝火

translations.english: Find out where Jaree-Ra's bandits took the loot
translations.chinese: 找出加雷-拉的强盗们藏起来的赃物

translations.english: The leader of the so-called "assassins" I've been asked to eliminate claims that Saadia betrayed her people to the Dominion and they are here to bring her to justice. I've agreed to lead her into an ambush at the Whiterun stables.
translations.chinese: 所谓“刺客”的首领告诉我萨蒂亚向先祖神洲出卖自己的人民，他们来此是为了将她绳之以法。我同意把她带到白漫马厩的埋伏处。

translations.english: The barmaid at the Bannered Mare in Whiterun is apparently a fugitive noble from Hammerfell. She claims that she is on the run from assassins sent by rival houses in her homeland and needs someone to stop them before they find her.
translations.chinese: 白漫城悬旗母马的酒保显然是落锤来的流亡贵族。她声称正在躲避来自她家乡的敌对家族派出的刺客，需要找人在他们把她抓走前阻止他们。

translations.english: A group of men calling themselves the Alik'r are looking for a Redguard woman in Whiterun.
translations.chinese: 一群自称阿里克'尔的人正在寻找一个住在白漫城的红卫人。

translations.english: I've helped Saadia escape the clutches of the Alik'r sent after her. With their leader defeated, she believes the rest of them will scatter, affording her some much-needed safety for now.
translations.chinese: 我帮萨蒂亚摆脱了追杀她的阿里克'尔。她相信，首领被杀之后，其余人会散去，她也就获得了急需的安全。

translations.english: After making arrangements with Kematu, I've delivered Saadia to him. He assures me that she will be taken back to Hammerfell alive, though after that her fate is no longer in his hands.
translations.chinese: 与凯马图商量好后，我将萨蒂亚交给了他。他向我保证，会将萨蒂亚活着押解回落锤，但在那之后，她的命运就不掌握在他的手中了。

translations.english: Lead Saadia to the Whiterun Stables
translations.chinese: 把萨蒂亚带到白漫城马厩

translations.english: Kill Kematu OR Convince Saadia to meet Kematu
translations.chinese: 杀死凯马图 或 说服萨蒂亚去见凯马图

translations.english: Find a way to enter the Alik'r hideout
translations.chinese: 想办法进入阿里克'尔的藏身处

translations.english: Inform the Alik'r of Saadia's location
translations.chinese: 把萨蒂亚的位置报告给阿里克'尔

translations.english: Kill Kematu or talk to him
translations.chinese: 杀死凯马图或和他谈谈

translations.english: Inform the Alik'r of Saadia's location
translations.chinese: 把萨蒂亚的位置报告给阿里克'尔
